Ingredients: 1 (8 oz.) pkg. cream cheese, 1 small jar Marshmallow Creme, 1 Tbsp. orange juice
ReferenceRecipe: Whip cream cheese with mixer until smooth. Blend in orange juice. Add Marshmallow Creme. Whip again until smooth. Chill before serving.
GeneratedRecipe: mix all ingredients together. serve with fresh fruit. makes 1 1/2 cups. good with fruit. can be used as a dip for fruit.

Ingredients: 1 lb. ground beef, 1/2 c. onions, cut up (sauteed in butter or oil), 1 tsp. mustard, 1 can chicken gumbo soup, 2 Tbsp. catsup
ReferenceRecipe: Combine all ingredients. Cook 30 minutes. Serve on warm buns.
GeneratedRecipe: fry chopped onions in butter until brown. add ground beef mixture; mix soup, mustard and catsup; let simmer on low heat until heated through. pour over cooked spaghetti; drain off fat. serve on buns.

Ingredients: 1 large box lemon jello, 1 large can crushed pineapple (can use chunks), 1 large container Cool Whip, 8 oz. cream cheese, 1 c. powdered sugar, 3/4 c. sugar, 4 Tbsp. flour, 2 eggs, beaten
ReferenceRecipe: Drain juice from pineapple and save. Prepare lemon jello as directed and pour into a 9 x 13-inch Pyrex dish. Allow to jell a little. Add pineapple to jello and stir well. Let it jell completely. Mix 1 cup pineapple juice, flour and beaten eggs in saucepan over low heat for 10 minutes. Cool. Spoon over jello layer. Then spoon whipped topping over this layer. Sprinkle with nuts. Put back into refrigerator.
GeneratedRecipe: drain the pineapple, reserving juice. combine jello and flour; stir until smooth. refrigerate until syrupy. cook over medium heat until thick, stirring constantly. cool. beat egg with powdered sugar and 3/4 cup hot syrup until thick. spread over cooled crust. top with remaining juice and eggs. chill until set. blend cream cheese until well blended. spread over jello mixture. top with cool whip, then sprinkle cheese. refrigerate.

Ingredients: 2 c. mayonnaise, 1/2 c. grated Parmesan cheese, 1/4 c. sugar, 1/2 tsp. dried basil, 1/2 tsp. salt, 4 c. fresh broccoli florets, 4 c. fresh cauliflowerets, 1 medium red onion, sliced, 1 (8 oz.) can sliced water chestnuts, drained, 1 large head iceberg lettuce, torn, 1 lb. sliced bacon, cooked and crumbled, 2 c. croutons
ReferenceRecipe: In a large bowl, combine mayonnaise, Parmesan cheese, sugar, basil and salt. Add broccoli, cauliflower, onion and water chestnuts; toss. Cover and refrigerate for several hours or overnight.
GeneratedRecipe: in a large bowl, layer lettuce, water chestnuts, onion, water chestnuts and croutons. mix together mayonnaise, basil, sugar, salt and basil. pour over lettuce. cover and refrigerate 2 to 3 hours. toss just before serving. serves 16.

Ingredients: 3 1/2 c. flour (sifted all-purpose), 1 tsp. baking soda, 1/2 tsp. salt, 1 c. butter (soft not runny), 2 c. light brown sugar, 2 eggs, 1/2 c. buttermilk, 1 tsp. vanilla extract, 1 1/2 c. chopped nuts, 2 c. halved candied cherries, 2 c. cut-up pitted dates
ReferenceRecipe: Sift together into bowl and reserve flour, soda and salt. Cream butter, sugar and eggs. Add buttermilk, vanilla and flour mixture, mixing well. Stir in chopped nuts, candied cherries and pitted dates. Drop by teaspoon on lightly greased cookie sheet. Top each with a nut half if desired.
GeneratedRecipe: in large mixing bowl, gradually whisk in sugar, stirring until light and fluffy. in a large bowl, cream butter and sugar. add eggs, one at a time, beating well after each. sift together flour, salt and baking soda and vanilla extract. add to creamed mixture alternately with buttermilk, vanilla and cherries; add to creamed mixture and nuts.

Ingredients: 1 c. white sugar, 1 pkg. chopped sugared dates, 1 stick butter, 1 c. chopped pecans, 2 c. Rice Krispies, 2 tsp. vanilla, powdered sugar
ReferenceRecipe: Place sugar, dates and butter in a double boiler. Cook slow for approximately 10 minutes until sticky. Remove from heat. Add pecans, Rice Krispies and vanilla. Let cool. Fill 1 teaspoon full, roll in a ball and roll in powdered sugar.
GeneratedRecipe: cook butter, sugar and dates until thick. remove from heat and add vanilla, rice krispies and pecans. roll into balls and roll in powdered sugar.

Ingredients: 1 (10 oz.) bag chopped broccoli, 4 chicken breasts, boiled and cut into bite-size pieces, 1 can cream of mushroom soup, 1 stick butter, 1 onion, diced, 1 small jar Cheez Whiz, 1/2 c. celery, diced, 1 small jar pimiento, drained, 2 c. cooked rice (1 c. uncooked rice)
ReferenceRecipe: Saute onion and celery in butter. In large casserole dish, mix Cheez Whiz and cream of mushroom soup. Add butter, celery and onion while warm. Mix in rice, broccoli and chicken. Sprinkle pimiento on top. Cover and bake 30 to 40 minutes or until golden in color. Serves 4 to 6.
GeneratedRecipe: saute onion, celery and celery in butter until tender. add rice, soup and pimiento. add rice and cheez whiz. pour into a large casserole dish and bake 30 to 40 minutes or until bubbly. serves 6 to 8.

Ingredients: 1 bunch broccoli, chopped, 1 medium purple onion, chopped, 8 to 12 strips bacon, cook crisp and crumble when cool and set aside, 1/4 to 1/2 c. sunflower seeds, 1/2 to 1 c. raisins, 1/2 c. mayonnaise, 1/4 c. sugar, 1 Tbsp. or to taste wine vinegar
ReferenceRecipe: Mix broccoli and onion together and set aside in refrigerator. Mix mayonnaise, sugar and vinegar together and set aside. One hour before serving, stir in bacon, sunflower seeds and raisins. Then add mayonnaise mixture, mixing well. Refrigerate. Right before serving, stir in 1 cup grated mild or medium Cheddar cheese. This is an excellent salad and very colorful.
GeneratedRecipe: mix mayonnaise, sugar and vinegar. add broccoli, raisins, sunflower seeds and sunflower seeds. mix well. chill and serve.

Ingredients: 1/2 c. each dried pinto beans, pink beans and kidney beans, 1 c. small pasta bows (4 oz.), 1 tsp. salt, 1/4 tsp. crushed red pepper, 1 Tbsp. instant chicken broth granules, 2 tsp. dried rosemary leaves, 2 Tbsp. dried parsley flakes, 1 tsp. dried basil leaves, 1/2 tsp. instant minced garlic
ReferenceRecipe: If Packaged for Gift: Put beans into a 3 to 3 1/2-cup jar with tight fitting lid. Put pasta in a sandwich size plastic bag and place on top of beans. Put remaining ingredients into sandwich bag or make a pouch using cheesecloth, plastic wrap or fine netting. Close tightly or tie with a ribbon. Put packet in with beans and pasta or tie to jar. Be sure to include the following cooking directions.
GeneratedRecipe: sort and wash beans. place in a large saucepan. cover with cold water. boil for 3 minutes. drain. add next 6 ingredients. bring to a boil. reduce heat. simmer, covered, for 5 minutes. stir in kidney beans. cover and simmer 5 minutes more, or until beans are tender. stir in bows and parsley. makes 4 servings.

Ingredients: 2 c. sugar, 1/2 tsp. salt, 1 c. hot water, 1 c. cocoa, 1 c. cold water, 1 tsp. vanilla
ReferenceRecipe: Combine cocoa, sugar and salt in saucepan. Mix well and stir in cold water to make a smooth paste. Blend in hot water and vanilla. Simmer 4 to 5 minutes, stirring until thick and smooth. If more rich syrup is wanted, use 1 cup hot milk for hot water. Store and use as you would any other chocolate syrup.
GeneratedRecipe: put sugar, cocoa and cold water in a saucepan and bring to boil. stir constantly until cocoa is dissolved. remove from heat and stir in salt, vanilla and hot water. cool. add cooled mixture and beat.

Ingredients: 1-1/2 lb hamburger, 1 lg can pork and beans, 1-1/2 tsp chili powder, 2 or 3 dashes worcestershire sauce, 16 oz ketchup, 1 can stewed tomatoes, 1 med onion chopped (optional)
ReferenceRecipe: Brown hamburger. Add remaining ingredients, let simmer a little then eat. Can substitute ground venison for hamburger.
GeneratedRecipe: brown hamburger and drain and set aside. add onions, tomatoes and ketchup. add worcestershire and chili powder to meat mixture. heat to boiling point. add pork and beans. simmer for 1 hour.

Ingredients: tubular pasta, diced tomatoes, shredded Parmesan, basil, olive oil, pinch of red pepper flakes
ReferenceRecipe: Toss with hot pasta. If desired, cilantro, artichoke hearts, mushrooms or other vegetables may be added.
GeneratedRecipe: prepare pasta according to box instructions. cook pasta and drain. place tomatoes in bowl with basil, diced pepper flakes and parmesan cheese. mix. refrigerate until ready to serve. top with shredded parmesan cheese.

Ingredients: 8 oz. cream cheese (soft), 8 oz. Smooth 'N Melty mints, melted (Mary of Puddin Hill), 2/3 c. powdered sugar, 3 Tbsp. half and half or milk, 1 small container Cool Whip, 1 graham cracker or Oreo crust
ReferenceRecipe: Blend cream cheese, mints and sugar until smooth. Add half and half, beating until fluffy. Fold in Cool Whip. Pour into crust and chill well.
GeneratedRecipe: mix cream cheese, powdered sugar and milk until smooth. fold in cool whip. pour into graham cracker crust. freeze until firm.

Ingredients: 3 Tbsp. soy sauce, 1 Tbsp. cornstarch, 2 large chicken breasts, boned, skinned and cut into 1/2-inch cubes, 1 Tbsp. sherry, 2 tsp. sugar, 1 tsp. white vinegar, 1/4 c. Planters peanut oil, 1 tsp. crushed red pepper, 1/3 c. sliced scallions, 1/2 tsp. ground ginger
ReferenceRecipe: Blend 1 tablespoon soy sauce and cornstarch in a bowl; mix in chicken and set aside. Combine remaining 2 tablespoons soy sauce sherry, sugar and white vinegar; set aside. Heat Planters peanut oil in wok or large skillet over high heat. Add red pepper, cook until pepper turns black; add chicken and stir-fry 2 minutes. Remove and set aside. Stir-fry scallions and ginger for 1 minute. Return chicken to wok and cook 2 minutes, stirring constantly. Add soy mixture; cook 1 minute longer, stirring constantly. Serve over hot rice (use Uncle Ben's converted rice).
GeneratedRecipe: combine sugar, cornstarch, soy sauce, vinegar, ginger and pepper. dip chicken breasts in mixture, coating well. saute chicken in peanut oil over medium heat about 8 minutes or until done. turn over to brown on both sides. remove to a serving platter. keep warm. keep warm. stir in oil. add scallions, vinegar, sherry and red pepper. heat to boiling. bring to a boil and cook 3 minutes, stirring constantly. reduce heat; boil 1 minute. add red pepper; stir until sauce thickens. serve over cooked rice. serves 4.

Ingredients: 2 lb. round steak, 1/4 c. soy sauce, 1 c. chopped onion, 1 garlic clove, minced, 1 tsp. sugar, 1 (16 oz.) can stewed tomatoes with liquid, 2 green peppers, cut into strips, salt and pepper to taste, 1/2 c. cold water, 1 Tbsp. cornstarch, cooked noodles or rice
ReferenceRecipe: Cut beef into 3 x 1-inch strips. Place in crock-pot. Combine the next 4 ingredients and pour over beef. Cover and cook on low 5 to 6 hours. Add tomatoes and green peppers; cook on low for 1 hour longer. Combine the cold water and cornstarch to make a paste. Stir into liquid in slow cooker and cook on high until thickened. Serve over noodles or rice.
GeneratedRecipe: cut steak into thin strips. brown in oil. add onion and garlic. cook until tender. add tomatoes, liquid, soy sauce, sugar, salt and pepper. cover and simmer for 1 hour. blend cornstarch with 1/4 cup water. stir into meat mixture. cook and stir until thickened. serve over rice.

Ingredients: 1 can cranberry sauce, 1/2 tsp. salt, 2 tsp. sugar, 1 Tbsp. Knox gelatine, 1/2 c. cold water, 1/2 c. walnuts, 1/2 c. chopped celery, 1 c. chopped apple, 1 small can crushed pineapple, with most juice drained off
ReferenceRecipe: Melt cranberry sauce; add salt, sugar and gelatine which has been soaked in cold water. Add to hot mixture and cool. When nearly set, add walnuts, celery, apple and pineapple. Chill until firm.
GeneratedRecipe: mix cranberry sauce and juice in saucepan. heat to boiling point, then add gelatine, stirring until dissolved. add cranberry sauce, salt, celery, sugar and walnuts. chill in mold and chill. makes 8 servings.

Ingredients: 2 lb. peanut butter, 3 lb. powdered sugar, 1 lb. margarine or butter, 2 large pkg. Nestle morsels, 1/2 piece paraffin wax
ReferenceRecipe: Melt butter and mix with peanut butter. Mix in powdered sugar. Roll into small balls. Melt paraffin wax and morsels in double boiler. Put toothpick in peanut butter balls and dip in melted chocolate. Place on wax paper.
GeneratedRecipe: mix peanut butter, margarine and powdered sugar. roll into small balls. melt paraffin wax and paraffin wax in double boiler. dip balls in chocolate and place on wax paper.

Ingredients: 1 box Nilla wafers, crushed in blender, 1 box powdered sugar, 1 stick margarine, 1 (16 oz.) can frozen orange juice, 1/2 c. coconut, 1 c. chopped pecans
ReferenceRecipe: Cream butter, sugar and orange juice together. Add remaining ingredients. Shape into balls and dip in powdered sugar or coconut. Makes 36 balls.
GeneratedRecipe: mix crushed nilla wafers, sugar, pecans, margarine and orange juice in large bowl. roll into balls and place in refrigerator to cool.

Ingredients: 2 Tbsp. shortening, 1/2 c. chopped onions, 3 lb. broiler-fryer chicken, disjointed, 2 tsp. salt, 1 Tbsp. paprika, 1 c. water, 2 Tbsp. flour, 1 c. sour cream
ReferenceRecipe: Melt shortening in deep heavy skillet or Dutch oven. Add onions and saute until golden. Remove from pan. Add chicken pieces, browning lightly. Sprinkle with seasonings and return onions to pan. Add water, cover and simmer until tender, about 1 hour. Remove chicken and keep warm. Pour off about half of the drippings. Stir flour into sour cream. Add to drippings in pan, simmer gently until thoroughly heated. But do not boil. Pour over chicken. Serve with dumpling noodles. Makes 6 servings.
GeneratedRecipe: salt and chicken. dredge pieces in flour and paprika. brown in hot shortening. add water and chopped broiler-fryer pieces and cover. simmer for 1 hour or until tender. remove from liquid and add sour cream. pour over chicken in crock-pot or slow cooker. bring to boil for 10 minutes. serve over rice, mashed potatoes or noodles.

Ingredients: 1 box butter cake mix, 1 stick butter, 3 eggs, 1 box confectioners sugar, 1 (8 oz.) pkg. cream cheese
ReferenceRecipe: Mix the cake mix, butter and 1 egg. Spread into pan.
GeneratedRecipe: mix cake mix, butter, eggs and sugar. press into 9 x 13-inch pan. mix together cake mix, butter and cream cheese. spread on top.

Ingredients: 1 pkg. yeast, 1/2 cup lukewarm water, 5 c. all-purpose flour, 1 tsp. baking soda, 1 tsp. salt, 1 tsp. baking powder, 2 Tbsp. sugar, 3/4 c. Crisco shortening, 2 c. buttermilk
ReferenceRecipe: Preheat oven to 400 degree. Dissolve yeast in warm water; set aside. Mix dry ingredients together, Cut in shortening, Add yeast and buttermilk and mix well. Turn dough onto lightly floured surface and roll out to desired thickness. Cut with small biscuit cutter and place on greased baking sheet. Bake for 12 minutes or until golden brown.
GeneratedRecipe: dissolve yeast in lukewarm water. add buttermilk, sugar, shortening, salt and baking powder. mix well. add yeast mixture to flour mixture. knead until smooth. cover and refrigerate overnight.

Ingredients: 1 pkg. cream cheese, softened, 1/3 c. sugar, 1 (8 oz.) tub Cool Whip, 1 (6 oz.) prepared graham cracker crust, 1 1/2 c. cherry pie filling
ReferenceRecipe: Beat cream cheese and sugar in large bowl with whisk or mixer on high speed until smooth. Gently stir in whipped topping. Spoon into prepared graham cracker crust. Refrigerate 3 hours and top with pie filling.
GeneratedRecipe: beat cream cheese until smooth. gradually beat in sugar. fold in cool whip. spoon into crust. chill until set. top with cherry pie filling.

Ingredients: 5 eggs, 2 c. sugar, 1/2 pt. whipping cream, unwhipped, flavoring, milk
ReferenceRecipe: Beat eggs and sugar together. Add cream and flavoring. Fill freezer within 2 or 3 inches of top with whole milk. This will make one gallon.
GeneratedRecipe: beat eggs well. add sugar gradually while beating until smooth. add flavoring and whipping cream. fill line freezer with milk and freeze. add milk to fill line of ice cream.

Ingredients: 1 can sweetened condensed milk, 1 large Orange Slice (2 or 3 liter), milk
ReferenceRecipe: Mix milk and Orange Slice in churn. Churn according to churn's directions.
GeneratedRecipe: mix all ingredients together. pour into ice cream freezer and finish filling with milk. makes 1 gallon.

Ingredients: 2 (10-inch) loaves French bread, butter, lettuce leaves, 16 slices assorted luncheon meats, 6 tomato slices, 1 (4 1/2 oz.) can deviled ham, 1 (3 oz.) pkg. cream cheese, 2 Tbsp. pickle relish
ReferenceRecipe: Cut bread lengthwise into thirds. Spread cut sides of bottom portions with butter. Top with lettuce leaves. Roll each slice of meat up as for jelly roll. Arrange 8 rolls crosswise on lettuce on each sandwich. Spread center portion of bread with butter; place over meat rolls. Top with lettuce leaves. Arrange 3 tomato slices on lettuce on each sandwich. Combine deviled ham, cream cheese and relish. Top tomato slices with deviled ham mixture; cover with top slices of bread.
GeneratedRecipe: spread cream cheese on loaves. place ham slices on each slice of ham, then top with 1 slice of tomato, 1 slice of ham, 1 slice of ham, 1 slice of ham, 1 teaspoon of cream cheese and 1/2 teaspoon butter. top with 1 teaspoon of deviled ham and pickle relish. wrap in plastic wrap. place on baking dish. microwave on high for 3 minutes or until cheese melts. let stand for 2 minutes. serve with lettuce leaves. makes 8 sandwiches.

Ingredients: 1 lb. ground beef, 2 cans Campbell's chili beef soup, 1 small can tomato sauce, 1 tsp. cumin seed, 1 tsp. dill seed, 1 small minced onion
ReferenceRecipe: Brown hamburger and onion in dish by microwaving on High until pink is gone. Add soup, tomato sauce and seasonings; cover. Microwave on High 5 minutes. Reduce to simmer (6) for 10 minutes. Cover with crushed tortilla chips or Fritos.
GeneratedRecipe: brown ground beef, onion, then drain. add tomato sauce, chili seed, dill seed, cumin seed and cumin. simmer 15 minutes, stirring often.

Ingredients: 1 box jello (lemon or orange), 1 1/2 c. boiling water, 1 c. cold water plus ice cubes, 2 Tbsp. lemon juice, 1 (20 oz.) can pineapple chunks, 1/2 c. shredded carrots
ReferenceRecipe: Dissolve gelatin in 1 1/2 cups boiling water. Combine 1 cup cold water and enough ice cubes to make 2 1/2 cups. Add to gelatin with lemon juice; stir 2 minutes. Let stand until slightly thickened. Fold in drained pineapple and shredded carrots. Chill.
GeneratedRecipe: dissolve jello in boiling water. add cold water. add lemon juice and ice cubes, stirring until slightly thickened. chill in fridge until slightly thickened. stir in carrots and pineapple chunks. turn into individual dishes. chill until firm, about 4 hours.

Ingredients: 2 Tbsp. butter, 1/2 small onion, diced, 1/2 head cabbage, shredded, 1 lb. wide noodles, cooked
ReferenceRecipe: Cook noodles and drain. Cook shredded cabbage for 5 minutes and drain. Saute onions until they are transparent. Place cabbage, wide noodles and sauteed onions together in a large pan and mix. Cover pan and allow cabbage and noodles to simmer for a few minutes, until done.
GeneratedRecipe: cook noodles and rinse with cold water. melt butter and add cabbage and onion. when ready to serve, stir in noodles while cooking. serve hot.

Ingredients: 1 bag cranberries, 2 3/4 c. water, 2 1/2 c. sugar, 1 c. white grapes (seedless), cut in half, 1 can drained crushed pineapple, 2 large boxes red jello (strawberry), 1 c. chopped nuts
ReferenceRecipe: Cook cranberries, water and sugar until berries are soft. Let cool! Make jello, using only hot water called for. Stir all ingredients together and refrigerate.
GeneratedRecipe: cook cranberries in water until tender. remove from fire. add sugar and jello. stir until dissolved. add pineapple, grapes and nuts. chill until firm.

Ingredients: 1 roll Pillsbury cookie dough, 1/2 c. Cool Whip, 1 (8 oz.) pkg. cream cheese, 1/2 c. powdered sugar, various fruits
ReferenceRecipe: Roll pizza dough out on pizza tin or cookie sheet. Bake for 10 to 12 minutes or until lightly brown. Combine Cool Whip and softened cream cheese on cooled crust. Top with fruits of your choice (grapes, blueberries, orange sections, kiwi, cantaloupe, strawberries).
GeneratedRecipe: roll out dough to fit a 12 x 9 x 2-inch pan. bake as directed on package and cool. beat powdered sugar and softened cream cheese until smooth. blend cool whip and spread on cooled crust. cut fruits and serve.

Ingredients: 1 c. Rice Krispies cereal, crushed, 2 Tbsp. margarine, melted, 2 tsp. artificial sweetener
ReferenceRecipe: Combine ingredients and press into bottom of 8-inch pie pan. Chill while preparing filling. Carbohydrate 2.5 g, protein .3 g, fat 3.7 g, calories 45. Serving size 1/8 crust = 1/4 fruit exchange, 1 fat exchange.
GeneratedRecipe: mix well, then press 1/2 of mixture in ungreased 9 x 13-inch pan. bake 10 minutes on high ( or until golden brown ).

Ingredients: 2 lb. Velveeta, melted, green onions, green chili salsa (12 oz.), hot sauce
ReferenceRecipe: Mix all ingredients together.
GeneratedRecipe: cook green onions on low heat for 10 minutes until soft. drain well. mix salsa and chili sauce. heat in microwave until cheese melts. serve warm with tortilla chips.

Ingredients: 2 Tbsp. flour, 2 Tbsp. cornstarch, 1/4 tsp. salt, 1 tsp. vanilla, 3 ripe bananas, 1 3/4 c. milk, 1/2 c. sugar, 3 egg yolks, lightly beaten, 1 Tbsp. butter or margarine, 1 (9-inch) pie crust
ReferenceRecipe: Or you can use 1 large package of Jell-O pudding and pie filling (banana cream, French vanilla or vanilla). You can use instant but the type you cook is better.
GeneratedRecipe: scald 1/2 cup milk. mix sugar, flour, cornstarch and salt. add butter, egg yolks and milk; cook slowly until thick, stirring constantly. remove from heat and add butter and vanilla. slice bananas and add to cooked mixture. pour into pie shell.

Ingredients: 1 pt. frozen sweetened raspberries, 1 Tbsp. cornstarch, 1 Tbsp. water
ReferenceRecipe: Thaw frozen raspberries and place in covered saucepan. Bring to a boil and simmer 5 minutes. Strain and discard pulp. Blend cornstarch and water and add it to the juice, stirring constantly. Cook until mixture boils and thickens. Chill until serving time.
GeneratedRecipe: mix cornstarch and water in saucepan. cook over medium heat, stirring constantly, until mixture thickens and boils. remove from heat. stir in raspberries. serve warm or cold.

Ingredients: 1 yellow cake mix, 1 can creamy coconut, 1 medium Cool Whip, 1 can Angel Flake coconut, 1 can Eagle Brand milk
ReferenceRecipe: Bake cake as directed. Punch hole in cake while hot and spread Eagle Brand milk over. Let cool 10 minutes. Put 1 can creamy coconut spread over cake. Let cool completely. Spread Cool Whip over cake. Add one can Angel Flake coconut. Keep refrigerated.
GeneratedRecipe: bake yellow cake according to directions in a 9 x 13-inch pan according to package. pour eagle brand milk over cake and let cool. mix cool whip and 1 cup coconut; spread over cake. refrigerate.

Ingredients: 6 to 8 medium new potatoes, 3 to 4 strips bacon, 2 small to medium onions, black pepper, 14 1/2 oz. can tomatoes, drained, 2 beaten eggs
ReferenceRecipe: Boil potatoes until done. Brown bacon and remove. Save about 2 tablespoons grease in skillet. Cut up potatoes and onion; add black pepper and brown in grease. Add drained tomatoes and eggs and a little more black pepper. Cover and cook until set. May need to cook some with lid off.
GeneratedRecipe: fry bacon until crisp. remove from pan and set aside. saute onions in bacon grease until tender. add potatoes, tomatoes and pepper. cook until potatoes are done. add eggs and pepper to taste.

Ingredients: 2 onions, sliced, 4 to 5 lb. picnic ham (for beef barbecue use 5 lb. rump roast), 5 to 6 cloves, 2 c. water, 16 oz. bottle barbecue sauce, 1 large onion, chopped, 1/8 tsp. Tabasco sauce if desired
ReferenceRecipe: Crock-pot: Put 1/2 sliced onions on bottom of crock-pot, then add meat, cloves and water with remaining sliced onions on top. Cover and cook overnight or 8 to 10 hours on low. Remove bone and fat from meat. Put meat back in crock-pot. Add chopped onion, Tabasco and barbecue sauce. Cover and cook 1 to 3 hours on high or 4 to 8 hours on low, stirring 2 to 3 times. Serve from crock-pot on large toasted buns.
GeneratedRecipe: put picnic, rump in a large dutch oven. bring to a boil. add onion, cloves, tabasco sauce and tabasco sauce. cover and simmer for 2 hours. remove ham and reserve broth. shred meat with fork. return roast to crock-pot. add the remaining ingredients and cook on low for 6 to 8 hours. stir occasionally until thick.

Ingredients: 1/2 c. butter, 3 Tbsp. all-purpose flour, 2 c. milk, 1 c. grated Colby cheese, 1 c. grated American cheese, 1 c. grated Parmesan cheese, 5 dashes Tabasco sauce or more to taste, chicken or turkey, city or country ham, crisp fried bacon, sliced tomatoes, paprika, toasted white bread, 2 egg yolks, well beaten
ReferenceRecipe: In a 4-quart, heavy saucepan, melt butter. Over medium heat, mix in flour until smooth. Add milk slowly, stirring constantly, until thick. Add Tabasco sauce and Parmesan cheese. Remove from heat. Take out 1/2 cup sauce and add the two beaten egg yolks. Mix well and return to the remainder, stirring constantly. Add Colby and American cheeses; stir until melted. Remove from heat.
GeneratedRecipe: melt butter in heavy saucepan over medium heat. add flour and stir until smooth. add milk, stirring constantly, until thick, approximately 5 minutes. add chicken and tomatoes and cheese. stir until melted and thickens and boils. remove from heat; blend in egg yolks. stir in ham. remove from heat. add paprika and tabasco; stir in cheese, tabasco sauce. cook and stir until cheese melts. serve at once over toast and buttered bread.

Ingredients: 1 (No. 2) can fruit cocktail (undrained), 1 can chunk pineapple (undrained), 1 (3 1/2 oz.) pkg. pistachio pudding, 1 c. miniature marshmallows, 1 c. chopped nuts, 1 (9 oz.) carton Cool Whip
ReferenceRecipe: Mix all and refrigerate.
GeneratedRecipe: combine pudding mix and pineapple; fold in fruit cocktail and nuts. fold in cool whip. chill.

Ingredients: 1-2 lb. chuck or round roast (venison may be substituted), 4 or 5 medium sized potatoes, 1 c. shredded cabbage, 1 medium sized onion, 2 large carrots, 3 stalks celery, 1 c. green beans, 1 c. corn, 1/4 to 1/2 c. macaroni, 1 large can tomato juice
ReferenceRecipe: Cook roast and cut into small pieces. Dice potatoes, onion, carrots and celery. After meat is tender add all other ingredients, except tomato juice, to meat and meat stock. When everything is cooked add juice and boil. Salt and pepper to taste.
GeneratedRecipe: cook venison in crock-pot on low until tender. remove bones and dice. brown meat, onions, cabbage and celery; add to crock-pot. cook until tender. add vegetables; cook on low for 8 to 10 hours.

Ingredients: 10 oz. spinach, 1 c. salad oil, 1/4 c. sugar, 1/3 c. catsup, 1/4 c. vinegar, 1 Tbsp. Worcestershire sauce, 1 medium onion, diced, 6 slices crisp bacon, crumbled, 4 hard-boiled eggs, cut fine
ReferenceRecipe: Cut stems off spinach leaves. Rinse well. Mix and refrigerate salad oil, sugar, catsup, vinegar, Worcestershire sauce and onion. Salt to taste. Top with crisp bacon and hard-boiled eggs.
GeneratedRecipe: mix all together except spinach and eggs. put dressing in a large salad bowl. add bacon, bacon and onion; mix. add eggs and bacon. mix and eggs. pour over salad.

Ingredients: 4 c. cooked chicken, chopped, 4 Tbsp. chopped green olives, 4 Tbsp. chopped ripe olives, 1 c. celery, 1 c. toasted chopped almonds, 4 Tbsp. salad pickles, 4 hard-cooked eggs, chopped, 1 1/2 c. mayonnaise, 1 Tbsp. cooking sherry, 1 recipe Puff Pastry (recipe follows)
ReferenceRecipe: Combine all ingredients. Fill pastries with salad. Garnish with slices of green and ripe olives and fresh parsley. Yield: 36.
GeneratedRecipe: in a large bowl, combine chicken, celery, eggs, olives, olives and almonds. mix well. add mayonnaise and sherry; mix lightly. spoon into pastry shell. cover and chill until serving time. garnish with almonds. makes 6 servings.

Ingredients: 1 Tbsp. lemon juice, 1 large banana, sliced, 2 c. chicken, cut in 1-inch cubes and cooked, 1 (20 oz.) can pineapple chunks, drained, 1 pt. fresh strawberries, stems removed and halved, 2 Tbsp. sesame seed, toasted, 1/2 c. bottled French dressing (spicy and sweet), Premium saltine crackers, lettuce leaves
ReferenceRecipe: In large bowl, sprinkle lemon juice over banana. Add chicken, pineapple and strawberries; toss to mix. Place lettuce leaves on individual serving plates. Top with salad. Sprinkle with sesame seed. Serve with dressing and crackers. Makes 4 main dish servings.
GeneratedRecipe: in bowl, combine chicken, pineapple and strawberries. stir in chicken, lemon juice and sesame seed. chill. combine pineapple, banana, chicken and strawberries; toss with crackers. arrange lettuce leaves on serving platter. spoon dressing over salad. sprinkle with reserved sesame seed. garnish with sesame seed. serve immediately.

Ingredients: 3 c. cashews, chopped (unsalted), 1 lb. bittersweet chocolate, 1 1/4 c. cream, 1 Tbsp. cinnamon, 2 Tbsp. Kahlua, 2 Tbsp. vanilla, 4 oz. unsalted butter
ReferenceRecipe: Chop chocolate; place in bowl. Heat butter and cream to scald. Pour over chocolate. Stir to melt. Add cinnamon, Kahlua, vanilla and cashews. Pour into lightly greased mold (loaf pan); chill.
GeneratedRecipe: melt butter in a 2-quart saucepan over medium heat. stir in the cream and chocolate. cook 2 minutes. add vanilla, cinnamon, cashews and cashews. stir until well blended. pour into a greased 9 x 5-inch loaf pan. cool and cut into squares.

Ingredients: 1 can baked beans, 1/2 tsp. dry mustard, 1 small onion, 1/4 c. catsup, 2 Tbsp. brown sugar
ReferenceRecipe: Mix all ingredients. Cover and cook 10 minutes.
GeneratedRecipe: mix all ingredients together and heat until hot. serve with corn chips or potato chips. serves 4 to 6.

Ingredients: 1 graham cracker crust or any kind of crumb pie shell, 1 (12 oz.) carton Cool Whip, softened, 1 large Hershey almond candy bar, melted
ReferenceRecipe: Melt candy bar in large bowl. Add Cool Whip and mix together until the candy bar has been completely dissolved. Pour into crumb pie shell. Let set in refrigerator until cool. Garnish with whipped cream and almonds.
GeneratedRecipe: mix hershey bar and cool whip. pour into pie shell. chill. top with cool whip and crushed candy bar.

Ingredients: 1 (6 oz.) pkg. black raspberry jello, 3 c. boiling water, 1 (No. 2) can crushed pineapple and juice, 2/3 qt. blueberries, 1 c. milk, 1 c. sugar, 1 pkg. Knox gelatine, 1/4 c. cold water, 1 c. cultured sour cream, 1 tsp. vanilla
ReferenceRecipe: Scald the jello in the boiling water; add pineapple and blueberries. Chill.
GeneratedRecipe: dissolve gelatine in boiling water. add cold water, pineapple and blueberries. pour in an 8 x 8-inch glass pan. let set until firm. spread sour cream over raspberry jello and sugar. add 1 cup milk and beat until thick. add vanilla and pour over congealed jello. refrigerate until firm.

Ingredients: 1 Egg, 1/2 c. melted Shortening, 1/2 c. Sugar, 1/2 c. Molasses, 1/2 c. Water, 1/2 tsp. Salt, 1/2 tsp. Ginger, 1 tsp. Cinnamon, 1 tsp. Baking Soda, 2 c. rounded Flour
ReferenceRecipe: Beat Egg; add Sugar, Shortening, Molasses and Water. Sift dry ingredients and add to mixture. Mix well and chill. Drop by teaspoon and bake at 375 for 10 minutes.
GeneratedRecipe: sift baking soda, salt and cinnamon into bowl. beat egg and add melted shortening. add sugar and molasses. combine flour, baking soda, salt and ginger. then add to mixture, beating well. refrigerate overnight or overnight.

Ingredients: 1 jar Ragu spaghetti sauce with mushroom and onions, 1/2 tsp. garlic salt, 1/4 tsp. black pepper, 1/2 tsp. oregano, 1/2 tsp. sugar, 1 lb. ground beef, 1 onion, chopped, 1 pkg. noodles
ReferenceRecipe: Brown ground beef and onions. Drain grease. Add to other ingredients. Cook 10 minutes. Pour over noodles.
GeneratedRecipe: brown ground beef and onions; drain. add ragu sauce, sugar, garlic salt, black pepper and oregano. simmer for 10 minutes. cook noodles according to package directions. drain and add to meat mixture.

Ingredients: 2 eggs, beaten, 5 c. milk, 2 c. flour, salt, 2 Tbsp. butter, cinnamon and sugar mixture to taste
ReferenceRecipe: Combine eggs and 1 cup of milk in a bowl; mix well. Add sifted flour and salt; mix well. Stir in just enough milk until stiff dough forms; knead well. Roll into a thin rectangle on a lightly floured surface; dust with additional flour and cut into thin strips.
GeneratedRecipe: sift together flour, sugar and salt. in a large bowl, mix butter, eggs and milk. mix in flour and add enough sugar to make stiff dough. roll out thin as possible. cut with biscuit cutter. fry in hot oil until golden brown.

Ingredients: 1 head lettuce, chopped, 1 c. celery, chopped, 10 oz. frozen peas, 1/2 c. bell pepper, chopped, 1 medium onion, chopped, 1 c. shredded carrot, 2 c. mayonnaise, 2 Tbsp. sugar, 8 oz. Mozzarella cheese, shredded, bacon bits (if desired)
ReferenceRecipe: Place a layer of lettuce. Add each vegetable in layers. Top off vegetables with more lettuce. Spread over lettuce 2 cups mayonnaise. Sprinkle 2 tablespoons sugar over mayonnaise. Add the Mozzarella cheese. Let set for 24 hours. Sprinkle bacon bits before serving, if desired.
GeneratedRecipe: layer lettuce, celery, onion, bell pepper and peas in a large bowl. spread mayonnaise over top. sprinkle with sugar and cheese. cover and refrigerate overnight. toss before serving.

Ingredients: 2 gal. cut up green tomatoes, 1/2 gal. cut up onions, 1 pt. cut up bell peppers (some red), 1/2 pt. cut up hot peppers, 3 qt. vinegar, 8 c. sugar, 1/2 c. canning salt
ReferenceRecipe: Place sugar, salt, vinegar and peppers in pan; let come to a boil. Put in onions and let come to a boil again. Now put in tomatoes; allow to heat. Do not let the tomatoes boil. Place in jars and seal. Makes 20 pints.
GeneratedRecipe: put tomatoes, onions and peppers through food chopper. add salt and let stand overnight. drain well. add sugar, vinegar and canning salt. boil for 30 minutes. put in jars and seal.

Ingredients: 1 c. sugar, 1 c. water, 3 1/2 Tbsp. flour, 3 egg yolks, 1/4 stick butter, 2 Tbsp. cocoa
ReferenceRecipe: Cook all ingredients in medium saucepan over medium heat. When ready it will be very thick. May need to use a wire whisk to smooth. Pour in baked pie shell.
GeneratedRecipe: mix sugar, flour, cocoa and egg yolks. add water and butter. cook until thick. pour into baked pie shell. top with meringue.

Ingredients: 3 oz. liquid smoke, 5 to 6 lb. beef brisket, bottled barbecue sauce, celery salt, garlic salt, onion salt and meat tenderizer, salt and pepper, Worcestershire sauce, flour
ReferenceRecipe: Pour liquid smoke over meat and rub on all sides. Sprinkle with celery salt, garlic salt, onion salt and meat tenderizer. Cover with foil and leave in the refrigerator overnight.
GeneratedRecipe: cut the brisket into strips. sprinkle flour on both sides of meat. sprinkle salt, pepper, garlic salt, celery salt, tenderizer and onion salt. roll brisket in flour. place in crock-pot. place on low for 6 to 8 hours or until tender. remove meat from crock-pot and slice. cover with barbecue sauce and cook on high for 4 to 5 hours.

Ingredients: 1 gal. jar whole sour pickles, 5 lb. sugar, 1 small can pickling spice, wrapped in clean cloth and tied
ReferenceRecipe: Cut and drain pickles very good. Put, in a large container, 1 layer of pickles and then sugar, until finished. Place bag of spice in between. Stir twice a day for 3 days. Put into jars.
GeneratedRecipe: drain pickles, reserving syrup. slice pickles in small pieces. pour juice from pickles, add to the pickles in a large bowl. cover with sugar and spice. marinate overnight. drain and rinse and place sliced pickle slices in gallon jar and cover with ice.

Ingredients: 3 cups rice, 3 cups hot water, 1 can cream of mushroom soup, 6 chicken breasts, 1 pkg. onion soup mix
ReferenceRecipe: Place rice, hot water and mushroom soup in a 9x13 pan, stir. Layer chicken breast on top of mixture. Sprinkle onion soup mix over chicken. Cover with foil and bake at 350 degrees for 1 1/2 hours.
GeneratedRecipe: cook rice according to package directions. pour soup into casserole dish. sprinkle rice over chicken. add hot water. mix well. bake in preheated oven for 40 minutes.

Ingredients: 1 lb. Jimmy Dean sausage, 5 eggs, 1 tsp. salt, 1 tsp. dry mustard, 6 slices white bread, 1 1/2 c. Longhorn Cheddar cheese, 2 c. half and half
ReferenceRecipe: Crumble sausage in skillet. Cook until brown, stirring occasionally. Drain. Grease a 13 x 9-inch Pyrex dish. Line bottom with bread that has been cubed. Top with cooked sausage and grated cheese.
GeneratedRecipe: break bread into bite size pieces. brown sausage and drain. add cheese, salt and dry mustard to meat. add eggs to sausage and half and half and half.

Ingredients: 8 oz. flank steak, trimmed, 1 clove garlic, finely chopped, 1 Tbsp. grated fresh ginger, 1 Tbsp. soy sauce, 1 lb. broccoli, 1 Tbsp. vegetable oil, 1 medium-size onion, sliced, 1/4 c. beef broth
ReferenceRecipe: Slice steak diagonally into 1/4-inch thick strips. Place in bowl with garlic, ginger and soy sauce. Refrigerate, covered, 20 minutes. Cut broccoli flowerets. Peel stem and slice 1/4-inch thick. Heat 1 1/2 teaspoons of oil in large saucepan. Add beef and marinade. Stir-fry until brown 2 to 3 minutes. Remove from pan and set aside. Swirl remaining oil around pan. Add beef broth and onion. Stir-fry for 6 to 8 minutes. Add beef broth as needed to prevent sticking. Stir in meat; heat through. Makes 4 servings.
GeneratedRecipe: trim fat from steak. cut into 1/2-inch wide strips. combine soy sauce, oil, ginger and garlic. set aside. add steak and stir-fry 2 minutes. remove to paper towels and set aside. cook broccoli, onion and garlic until tender, 3 to 4 minutes. add broccoli and cook 2 or 3 to 3 minutes. add broccoli. stir-fry for 2 more minutes. add beef broth, cook until tender. serve with rice or noodles.

Ingredients: 3 oz. cream cheese, softened, 1/2 c. powdered sugar, sifted, 1/2 tsp. vanilla, pinch of salt, 1/2 pt. whipping cream, whipped, 1 graham cracker or vanilla wafer crust, 1 can cherry pie filling
ReferenceRecipe: Cream together the cream cheese, sugar, vanilla and salt. Fold whipped cream into mixture. Pour into pie shell. Cover with pie filling and chill. Makes 1 pie.
GeneratedRecipe: beat cream cheese until fluffy. gradually beat in powdered sugar, salt and vanilla. fold in whipped cream. pour into graham cracker crust. top with cherry pie filling. chill.

Ingredients: 1 (1 lb.) can sauerkraut, 1/2 c. cucumber (sliced thin), 1/2 c. celery, chopped, 1/2 c. carrot, shredded, 1/4 c. onion, chopped, 1 Tbsp. vinegar, 1/4 c. sugar, salt and pepper
ReferenceRecipe: Drain sauerkraut and cut into short pieces. Add remaining ingredients and mix well. Cover and chill for 8 hours or overnight.
GeneratedRecipe: mix sauerkraut, celery, onion, carrot and cucumber. mix sugar, vinegar, salt and pepper. pour over vegetables. let stand overnight.

Ingredients: 7 c. sliced cucumbers, 1 c. sliced onion, 1 Tbsp. salt, 1 c. vinegar, 1 tsp. celery seed, 2 c. sugar, 1/2 tsp. mustard seed
ReferenceRecipe: Let cucumbers, onion and salt stand for 2 hours, then drain well. Combine remaining ingredients; bring to a boil for 1 minute, then let it cool. Add to cucumbers and onion. Let set in refrigerator for 2 to 3 days. Put into containers and freeze. Can also be kept in refrigerator.
GeneratedRecipe: mix sugar, vinegar, mustard seed, salt and celery seed. pour over cucumbers and onions. let stand for 2 hours.

Ingredients: 1/4 lb. margarine, softened, 2 c. flour, 1 c. brown sugar, 1/2 c. white sugar, 1 c. buttermilk, 1 tsp. soda, 1 egg, 1 tsp. vanilla, 5 Heath bars, crumbled or 1 pkg. Heath chips, 1/4 c. chopped pecans
ReferenceRecipe: Mix margarine, flour and sugar until crumbly. Take out 1/2 cup of mixture. Add Heath bars and pecans to 1/2 cup mixture and set aside.
GeneratedRecipe: mix together margarine, sugar, brown sugar and vanilla. beat in egg and buttermilk. mix dry ingredients together, then add to creamed mixture. mix chips, nuts and chips.

Ingredients: 5 (3 oz.) pkg. jello (regular or sugar-free), 1 1/4 c. boiling water (for each pkg. jello), sour cream
ReferenceRecipe: Mix 1 1/4 cups water with one package jello. Pour 3/4 cup jello mixture in 9 x 13-inch pan. Let set. Add 3 tablespoons sour cream in remainder. Spread over the set jello. Continue with remainder of 4 flavors.
GeneratedRecipe: dissolve jello in boiling water. add sour cream and mix well. pour into a 9 x 13-inch pan. chill until firm.

Ingredients: 2 c. sugar, 3/4 c. margarine, 1/2 c. milk, 3/4 c. peanut butter, 4 Tbsp. cocoa, 1/2 tsp. vanilla, 3 1/2 c. oatmeal
ReferenceRecipe: Mix sugar, margarine and milk and boil for 1 minute exactly, stirring constantly, then take off stove. Add remaining ingredients. When mixed together, spoon onto cookie sheet and place in refrigerator until hard.
GeneratedRecipe: mix sugar, cocoa, milk and margarine in saucepan. bring to a boil. boil for 1 minute. remove from heat. add peanut butter, vanilla and oatmeal. mix well. drop by teaspoon on wax paper.

Ingredients: 1 c. black-eyed peas, 3 1/2 c. water, 1/4 lb. bacon, sliced, 1 onion, sliced, 1/4 tsp. crushed hot pepper, 1/2 c. uncooked rice, 1 c. stewed tomatoes, 1/2 large green pepper, coarsely chopped, 1 tsp. salt, black pepper to taste
ReferenceRecipe: Heat peas and water to boiling in a medium saucepan. Cover and remove from heat. Let stand for 1 hour. Fry bacon; drain. Add with onion and hot pepper to peas. Cover and simmer until peas are tender, 1 to 1 1/2 hours; stir in rice, salt, black pepper, tomatoes and green pepper. Cover and simmer, stirring occasionally until rice is tender, about 25 minutes. Add additional water, if necessary.
GeneratedRecipe: soak peas in water overnight. drain and rinse with cold water. in a large skillet, cook bacon until crisp. remove bacon from pan and set aside. saute onion and green pepper in bacon drippings until tender. add peas, tomatoes, salt and pepper. bring to a boil. reduce heat and simmer, covered, for 20 minutes. stir in rice. cover and simmer until rice is tender, about 30 minutes. makes 6 servings.

Ingredients: 2 lb. steak, sliced, 1 small onion, 1 c. ketchup, 1 c. sour cream, 1 can cream of mushroom soup, 4 dashes of Worcestershire sauce, 3 Tbsp. butter, egg noodles
ReferenceRecipe: Saute onions in butter. Add meat; brown. Add other ingredients. Simmer covered 20 minutes. Cook noodles. Drain. Serve beef over noodles.
GeneratedRecipe: brown steak in butter. add onion and cook until tender. add soup, ketchup, worcestershire sauce and sour cream. heat through. serve over noodles.

Ingredients: 2 (3 oz.) pkg. instant vanilla pudding, 3 c. milk, 1 (8 oz.) container sour cream, 1 (9 oz.) Cool Whip, 1 large can chunk pineapple, 1 box vanilla wafers
ReferenceRecipe: Combine pudding and milk. Mix thoroughly. Add sour cream and Cool Whip; mix well. Layer with pineapple and wafers.
GeneratedRecipe: mix pudding, milk and sour cream together. fold in cool whip and pineapple. layer vanilla wafers, bananas and pudding mixture.

Ingredients: 1 lb. cream cheese, room temperature (for easier mixing), 1 pt. sour cream, 1 c. sugar, 2 tsp. lemon extract, 2 Tbsp. flour, 5 eggs, separated, 2 Tbsp. butter, 1/4 lb. butter for crust, softened, 1/3 pkg. graham cracker crumbs
ReferenceRecipe: Mix together cheese, sour cream, sugar, lemon extract, egg yolks, flour and 2 tablespoons butter in a large mixing bowl. Beat egg whites stiff and fold in last.
GeneratedRecipe: mix crumbs and butter. press into bottom of pie plate. beat egg whites until stiff. beat in sugar and butter. beat egg yolks until light and fluffy. add flour and blend well. add lemon extract and extract. add sour cream. beat until creamy. fold in stiffly beaten egg whites. pour over crumbs; sprinkle with easier to refrigerate.

Ingredients: 6 lamb shanks, 2 tsp. seasoned salt, 1 Tbsp. shortening, 1 (10 1/2 oz.) can condensed tomato soup, 1/2 can water, 1 Tbsp. vinegar, 2 Tbsp. soy sauce, 2 tsp. Worcestershire sauce, 1/2 c. water, fluffy, hot rice
ReferenceRecipe: Wipe shanks with damp paper towel. Remove excess fat. Sprinkle with salt. Brown meat in hot fat in a heavy skillet or Dutch oven. Combine remaining ingredients except flour and water. Pour over browned shanks. Cover snugly and cook over low heat for 1 1/2 hours or until tender. Skim off fat. Combine flour and water; add to sauce and shanks. Cook until sauce is slightly thickened. Serve with rice. Serves 6.
GeneratedRecipe: brown lamb in shortening in large skillet. add tomato sauce and vinegar, water, worcestershire sauce and salt. cover; simmer for 1 1/2 hours. serve over rice.

Ingredients: 1 lb. ground beef, 1 large onion, 1 large bell pepper, 4 to 5 fresh tomatoes, 4 to 5 potatoes, 1/4 c. uncooked rice, chili powder, salt, pepper to taste
ReferenceRecipe: Brown beef and onion until brown. Drain. Mix chili powder, salt and pepper to meat. Set aside.
GeneratedRecipe: peel and dice tomatoes into 1/4-inch slices. dice potatoes in blender or food processor. chop onion and bell pepper and potatoes. combine with meat and bell pepper in large pot. add tomatoes, salt and pepper and chili powder to ground beef. cook on low heat until rice is done.

Ingredients: 2 c. flour, 1 c. packed brown sugar, 3/4 c. sugar, 1 1/2 tsp. cinnamon, 1/2 c. Parkay spread, 1 c. chopped walnuts, 1 (8 oz.) cream cheese, 2 Tbsp. milk, 1 egg, beaten, 1/2 tsp. vanilla, 3 1/2 c. chopped apples
ReferenceRecipe: Combine flour, brown sugar, 1/2 cup sugar and cinnamon; cut in spread until mixture resembles coarse crumbs. Stir in walnuts. Reserve 2 cup crumb mixture; press remaining mixture onto bottom of a 9 x 13-inch pan.
GeneratedRecipe: mix sugar and cinnamon in a bowl. cut in parkay until crumbly. spread over bottom of a 9-inch square pan. combine cream cheese, 1 cup brown sugar, milk and egg and vanilla. blend well. spread over top of apples. spread with remaining topping. sprinkle with nuts.

Ingredients: 1/2 lb. Velveeta cheese, softened with fork, 2 Tbsp. salad dressing, 8 or 9 chopped, stuffed olives or pickles, 3 hard-cooked eggs, chopped fine, 1/2 small onion, chopped
ReferenceRecipe: Blend together and store in pint jar. Can add 2 tablespoons butter.
GeneratedRecipe: cut up eggs and mash. blend in onion, pickles, olives, pickles and stuffed pickles. put in a covered bowl and chill for 24 hours. serve with crackers.

Ingredients: 1/2 small box macaroni, 1 pkg. seafood sticks, 2 lb. shrimp, steamed, Old Bay seasoning, sprinkle of sugar, 1/2 c. celery, 1/2 c. onions, mayonnaise, 2 boiled eggs
ReferenceRecipe: Boil your macaroni. In a large bowl, add the macaroni. Sprinkle a little sugar on it and stir. Cut up your celery and onions very fine (add to bowl and stir).
GeneratedRecipe: cook macaroni and drain. dice celery, onions and eggs. add sugar and mayonnaise. add to macaroni. mix well. add seafood and mix. refrigerate overnight before serving. may add more mayonnaise to taste.

Ingredients: 1 lb. almond bark, 1 (12 oz.) pkg. chocolate chips, 1 sq. unsweetened chocolate, 1 lb. Spanish peanuts
ReferenceRecipe: Melt the first 3 ingredients in a double boiler. When smooth, add the peanuts. Drop by teaspoonfuls on aluminum foil. Cool.
GeneratedRecipe: melt almond bark and chocolate chips in double boiler. add peanuts. drop by teaspoon on wax paper.

Ingredients: large portion deer meat (we use a whole ham, the size will depend on the size of your smoker), 1 (2 liter) bottle Coca-Cola, 1/4 to 1/2 c. corn oil, Tony Chachere's seasoning, hickory or pecan chunks (smoke flavor)
ReferenceRecipe: Cut meat to fit smoker rack. Rinse, drain and dry meat with a towel. Be sure it is dry. Rub meat with oil, then liberally apply seasoning. Place meat on rack over water pan which has been filled with equal parts Coke and water. Cook approximately 8 to 10 hours. When done, bone is easily removed from meat. Slice and serve with your favorite barbecue sauce.
GeneratedRecipe: place a piece of the depend on it and put the smoker on the deer the ham chunks. add some water. mix the seasoning into the ham and place the meat in the pot. cover with the seasoning smoke. cover and cook on high heat about 2 minutes. the stove or until the meat is no longer pink, the deer is tender. add the pecan oil when you can put it in you have done.

Ingredients: 6 green bananas, 2 scallions, mayonnaise dressing, salt and pepper to taste, 2 cloves garlic
ReferenceRecipe: Boil green bananas until they are easy to peel. Remove peel; cut into cubes. Roast cloves of garlic and chop into pieces. Add to bananas. Chop scallions, using only the leaves (green storkes). Mix dressing, salt and pepper together; add to banana. Serve.
GeneratedRecipe: peel bananas and cut into bite-size pieces. cut into 1/2-inch slices. slice scallions and place bananas in a bowl. add salt and pepper to taste. add mayonnaise to make a smooth dressing. add more mayonnaise, if needed.

Ingredients: 2 (3 oz.) pkg. raspberry jello, 2 c. boiling water, 2 cans frozen raspberries or strawberries, 1/2 pt. whipping cream, 1 (8 oz.) pkg. cream cheese (Philadelphia), colored mini-marshmallows
ReferenceRecipe: Start to whip whipping cream and add the package of cream cheese. Set aside. Mix the water and jello. Add the frozen berries and let set. After the cream and cream cheese are mixed, put on top of set jello. Add colored mini-marshmallows.
GeneratedRecipe: dissolve jello in boiling water; add frozen strawberries. when partially set, add strawberries. mix whipping cream until frothy and add to the jello. let set. fold in mini-marshmallows.

Ingredients: 1 large strawberry jello, 1 small can crushed pineapple, 2 c. buttermilk, 1 c. chopped nuts (optional), 1 large Cool Whip
ReferenceRecipe: Mix pineapple and jello; heat to boiling and then let cool. When cool, mix in buttermilk, nuts and Cool Whip. Pour into bowl or mold and chill until firm.
GeneratedRecipe: bring pineapple to a boil. add jello and stir until dissolved. cool. add buttermilk, cool whip and nuts. chill.

Ingredients: 1/4 lb. butter, 2 tsp. salt, 3/4 tsp. pepper, 3 c. chicken, 2 c. sifted flour, 6 eggs, 2 c. cooked, cooled and shredded chicken
ReferenceRecipe: Bring to a boil the butter, salt, pepper and chicken broth. Add flour all at once to the boiled mixture, stirring constantly until mixtures leaves side of pan. Cool 3 to 5 minutes. Beat in eggs, one at a time, beating until smooth and glossy after each addition. Mix in chicken. Drop by teaspoonfuls into hot fat. Drain on paper towels.
GeneratedRecipe: melt butter in saucepan. add flour, salt and pepper. mix well. add eggs, one at a time, beating well after each addition. stir in chicken.

Ingredients: 1 Small Bottle of Ketchup (12 or 16 ounces), 1 tsp. of Yellow Mustard, 2 Tbsp. of Apple Cider Vinegar, 5 Tbsp. of Brown Sugar, 1 lb. of Chipped Ham or Chipped Baked Ham
ReferenceRecipe: Mix all of the ingredients together and bring to a boil. Reduce heat and add the ham. Simmer until the ham is thoroughly heated through.
GeneratedRecipe: cut ham across the grain into 1/2-inch cubes. melt apple in a saucepan. combine all other ingredients. cook slowly for about 1 hour, stirring occasionally. pour over ham; heat well and serve.

Ingredients: 2 c. water, 2 (14 1/2 oz.) cans Cajun-style stewed tomatoes, 1/4 tsp. hot pepper sauce, 1/2 tsp. Cajun seasoning, 2 garlic cloves, minced, 1 medium onion, sliced, 1/3 c. uncooked regular rice, 1 (10 oz.) pkg. frozen cut okra, thawed, 2 (15 oz.) cans black-eyed peas, drained, 1 1/2 c. medium shrimp
ReferenceRecipe: Note: If fresh shrimp is used, it must be peeled and deveined.
GeneratedRecipe: in large saucepan, bring water, onion, okra, tomatoes, okra, pepper sauce and cajun seasoning to a boil. reduce heat; cover and simmer, for 10 to 12 minutes or until rice is tender. stir rice and remaining ingredients, cover and simmer 10 to 15 minutes or until rice is done.

Ingredients: 1 large cucumber, 8 oz. cream cheese, softened, 1 small onion, grated, 1/4 tsp. salt, 1 Tbsp. mayonnaise, 2 to 3 drops green food coloring
ReferenceRecipe: Pare, grate and drain cucumber. Combine cucumber with remaining ingredients. A favorite sandwich spread or can be thinned with milk or sour cream to make a delightful vegetable or chip dip.
GeneratedRecipe: grate cucumber and onion. mix with cream cheese, mayonnaise, salt and food coloring. add cucumber and mix well.

Ingredients: 3 sprigs dill, 2 garlic cloves, 2 sliced onions, 25 to 30 medium to large cucumbers, 1 pt. water, 1 qt. 5% vinegar, 2 1/2 c. sugar, 1/2 c. pickling salt
ReferenceRecipe: Wash and slice cucumbers 1/8 to 1/4 inch thick. Soak for 1 hour in ice water. Add ice cubes or crushed ice. Mix water, vinegar, sugar and salt; bring to boil. Pack cucumbers into clean, hot jars with 3 sprigs of dill, 2 garlic cloves and onion. Pour boiling hot pickling syrup over cucumbers, leaving 1/2 inch headspace. Wipe off jar mouth and seal. Process in boiling water bath canner for 15 minutes. (Count processing time as soon as hot jars are placed into actively boiling water.)
GeneratedRecipe: slice cucumbers and onions thin. soak overnight in salt water. put dill, garlic and sugar in large pot. bring vinegar, water and pickling salt to a boil; remove from heat. stir in pickles. put cucumbers and onions with liquid, cover with boiling liquid. let stand for 2 hours. bring to boil. pack cucumbers in sterilized jars and seal.

Ingredients: 2 pkg. (8 oz.) cream cheese, softened, 2 c. Cheddar cheese, shredded, 1 Tbsp. grated onion, 1 Tbsp. grated green pepper, 1 tsp. lemon juice, 1 tsp. Worcestershire sauce, 1/2 c. chopped walnuts
ReferenceRecipe: Combine all ingredients. Mix well. Shape into a ball. Sprinkle with chopped walnuts. Refrigerate to set. Serve with crackers.
GeneratedRecipe: combine cheddar cheese, cheddar cheese, cheddar cheese, green pepper, onion, worcestershire sauce and lemon juice. mix well. shape into a log and cover with chopped walnuts. chill.

Ingredients: 1 small can crushed pineapple, 1/4 c. sugar, 1 (3 oz.) pkg. strawberry jello, 1 large Cool Whip, 1 (12 oz.) carton cottage cheese
ReferenceRecipe: Mix sugar and pineapple; bring to boil. Add jello. Mix well. Let cool. Blend in Cool Whip and cottage cheese. Let set 2 hours in fridge before serving.
GeneratedRecipe: bring pineapple and sugar to a boil. add jello and stir until dissolved. cool. add cottage cheese and cool whip. mix well. refrigerate.

Ingredients: 12 oz. Italian sausage, removed from casing, 1 (16 oz.) can crushed tomatoes, 1 1/2 tsp. minced garlic, 1/2 c. heavy cream, 3 Tbsp. chopped fresh parsley, 1/4 tsp. salt, 1/4 tsp. pepper, 1 lb. bow tie pasta
ReferenceRecipe: Cook sausage over medium heat, breaking up clumps. Pour fat from skillet. Add tomatoes and garlic. Reduce heat to medium-low. Cover and simmer 10 minutes. Skim off excess fat. Add cream. Increase heat and boil, stirring constantly, 2 minutes or until sauce is thickened and creamy. Stir in parsley, salt and pepper.
GeneratedRecipe: cut sausage into 1/2-inch cubes. brown sausage in skillet. drain off fat. crumble sausage and set aside. in a skillet, saute sausage until browned. add tomatoes, garlic, parsley, salt and pepper. cover and simmer for 10 minutes or until bow ties are tender. stir in cream. simmer, uncovered, for 20 to 25 minutes or until pasta is tender and liquid is absorbed.

Ingredients: 2 eggs, 2 c water, 2 pkg Pillsbury Date Bread mix, 2 c pecan (halves or chopped), 2 c raisins, 2 c candied cherries, 1 c candied pineapple
ReferenceRecipe: Heat oven to 350 degrees, grease and flour (or spray with Pam) a tube pan. In large bowl, combine eggs and water. Add remaining ingredients, stir by hand until combined. Pour into prepared pan. Bake for 75 to 85 minutes or until toothpick inserted in center comes out clean. Cool in pan for 30 minutes, loosen edges and remove from pan. Cool completely, wrap in foil or plastic wrap and store in refrigerator.
GeneratedRecipe: preheat oven to 350 degrees. grease a bundt pan and flour bundt pan with pam. add water, mix, eggs, raisins, candied pineapple and cherries.

Ingredients: 1 (8 oz.) vermicelli, cut in bite-size, cooked and drained, 1 c. chopped green peppers, 1 c. chopped onions, 1 c. sweet pickle relish, 1 small jar drained pimento, 2 bags frozen cocktail shrimp, salt to taste, little Accent, 1 c. mayo
ReferenceRecipe: Mix all together and refrigerate.
GeneratedRecipe: mix all ingredients together and chill. serve on lettuce leaf. serves 6 to 8. can be made a day ahead of time.

Ingredients: 1 (3 lb.) chicken, cut in 8ths with skin removed, 4 carrots, 1 onion, 1 parsnip, 1 parsley root, 3 stalks celery
ReferenceRecipe: Remove liver. Place clean, cut up vegetables in pot, except for onion, which is put in whole. Place chicken in pot. Cook 1 1/2 hours.
GeneratedRecipe: put chicken in bottom of crock-pot. add all ingredients except root celery, and parsley. cook on low for 2 hours; then put lid on. cook on low for 8 hours or on high for 7 to 10 hours.

Ingredients: 4 chicken breasts, 1 (10 oz.) can cream of chicken soup, 1 (16 oz.) can mixed vegetables, 1 (16 oz.) can corn, 1/2 (16 oz.) can green beans (if desired), 2 c. mixed Bisquick
ReferenceRecipe: Cook chicken breasts until tender. Take off bone. Cut in small bite-size pieces. Place chicken with broth in large baking pan. Add cream of chicken soup and all vegetables. Top with Bisquick (recipe on box). Bake 1 hour. Serves 4 to 6.
GeneratedRecipe: stew chicken. remove from bones and skin. put back in pan. add the rest of ingredients. mix and heat for 10 minutes. place mixture on top of bisquick mixture. bake for one hour. serves 3 to 4.

Ingredients: 1 1/2 c. milk, 1 c. uncooked oats, 1 c. whole wheat flour, 2 Tbsp. honey, 1 Tbsp. baking powder, 1 tsp. salt, 1/4 c. olive oil, 2 eggs, beaten
ReferenceRecipe: Pour milk over oats; let stand 5 minutes. Mix together flour, baking powder, salt and lightly stir in eggs into oats mixture. Add honey then add dry ingredients and oil, stirring until blended. Cook on a hot lightly greased griddle.
GeneratedRecipe: in a large bowl, combine flour, oats, baking powder and salt. in a small bowl, beat together eggs, milk, oil and honey. add to dry ingredients, stirring just until moistened.

Ingredients: 3/4 lb. powdered sugar, 1 lb. Nilla Wafers, crushed, 1 stick margarine, 1 c. chopped nuts, 6 oz. frozen orange juice, coconut
ReferenceRecipe: Mix together all ingredients, except coconut. Form into balls and roll in coconut. Refrigerate 12 hours or overnight.
GeneratedRecipe: crush wafers fine. combine with margarine, orange juice and nuts. mix thoroughly. roll into balls and roll in coconut.

Ingredients: 2 c. sugar, 1/2 c. milk, 1/2 c. margarine or butter, 1/4 c. cocoa
ReferenceRecipe: Mix ingredients and bring to a full boil. Boil for 1 minute. Cool by placing pot in sink and running cold water around it. Beat until thick enough to spread.
GeneratedRecipe: mix sugar, cocoa and milk in saucepan. bring to a boil over medium heat, stirring constantly. boil for 1 minute. remove from heat. add butter and beat until thick enough to spread.

Ingredients: 1 Tbsp. Dijon mustard, 1 Tbsp. celery seed, 1 Tbsp. salt, 2/3 c. sugar, 1 onion (walnut size), minced, 1/2 c. vinegar, 1 c. oil
ReferenceRecipe: Put all ingredients in blender. Keep refrigerated.
GeneratedRecipe: combine sugar, mustard, salt and celery seed in a small saucepan. bring to a boil, stirring constantly. remove from heat and cool. add oil, vinegar and onion. beat well. add celery seed and walnut seed. store in refrigerator.

Ingredients: 1 medium onion, chopped, 2 ribs celery, chopped, 1/4 c. butter, 3 Tbsp. flour, 8 c. chicken broth, 2 c. creamy peanut butter, 1 3/4 c. half and half
ReferenceRecipe: Saut onion and celery in butter until soft, but not brown. Stir in flour until well blended. Add chicken broth; stir constantly and bring to a boil. Remove from heat and pure in food processor or blender. Add peanut butter and half and half, stirring to blend thoroughly. Return to low heat and heat until just hot, but do not boil. Serve; garnish with chopped peanuts.
GeneratedRecipe: saute onion, celery and celery in butter until tender. blend in flour. gradually add chicken broth, stirring until smooth. cook and stir until thickened. add peanut butter and half and half. heat thoroughly. do not boil.

ReferenceRecipe: Mix ingredients together. Add enough mayonnaise to moisten. Chill until ready to serve.

Ingredients: 1 large pkg. strawberry Jello dissolved in 2 c. boiling water, 1 10 oz. pkg. frozen strawberries, 1 small can crushed pineapple, 1 1/2 c. Cool Whip, 1 8 oz. pkg. softened cream cheese, 1/2 c. sugar, 1 tsp. vanilla, Chopped nuts
