Ingredients: 1 medium can crushed pineapple (undrained), 1/2 c. sugar, 2 eggs, beaten, 1/4 c. water, 3 Tbsp. lemon juice, 2 c. diced apples, 1/2 c. chopped nuts, 1 c. whipped cream
ReferenceRecipe: Cook pineapple, sugar, eggs, water and lemon juice on low heat until thick. Chill. Stir in apples, nuts and whipped cream. Pour into 8 x 10-inch glass dish. Freeze until firm. Let stand 10 minutes at room temperature before serving.
GeneratedRecipe: in saucepan, combine pineapple, sugar, water and lemon juice. cook over medium heat, stirring constantly, until mixture comes to a boil. remove from heat and cool. fold in apples, nuts and whipped cream. chill.

Ingredients: 2 (6 oz.) cans white crabmeat, 1/2 c. ketchup, 2 Tbsp. chili sauce, 1 tsp. prepared mustard, 2 tsp. horseradish
ReferenceRecipe: Drain crab; shred in bowl. Add all ingredients and mix. If not moist enough, add more chili sauce. Chill in fridge. Serve with crackers.
GeneratedRecipe: combine chili sauce, ketchup and mustard in saucepan. heat until hot. serve with crackers or chips.

Ingredients: 2 c. sugar, 2 Tbsp. cocoa, 1 stick margarine, 1/2 c. milk, 3 c. oatmeal, 1/2 c. peanut butter, 1 tsp. vanilla
ReferenceRecipe: Mix sugar, cocoa, margarine and milk. Bring to a boil and cook 1 minute. Add rest of ingredients and mix well. Spoon onto wax paper and let stand until firm. Add nuts if desired.
GeneratedRecipe: mix sugar, cocoa, milk and margarine in saucepan. bring to a boil. boil for 1 minute. remove from heat and add peanut butter, vanilla and oatmeal. mix well. drop by teaspoon on wax paper.

Ingredients: 1/4 lb. salt pork, 1 sliced onion, 3 c. diced, pared potatoes, 2 c. boiling water, 1 1/2 c. canned corn, 2 tsp. salt, 1/8 tsp. pepper, 1 qt. milk, 1/4 tsp. paprika
ReferenceRecipe: In soup pot, cook salt pork, stirring occasionally until brown and crisp. Remove pork bits. (Instead of pork fat you can use 2 tablespoons butter.) To pork fat, add onion and cook until tender, stirring occasionally. Add potatoes and boiling water; cover. Simmer about 10 minutes or until potatoes are fork-tender. Add corn, salt, pepper, milk and pork fat; heat well on low. Serve sprinkled with paprika. Serve 6.
GeneratedRecipe: brown pork in water. add potatoes, onion, salt, pepper and paprika. cover and simmer until potatoes are tender. add milk and corn. heat thoroughly.

Ingredients: 8 oz. cooked shrimp (save a few to decorate top), 2 (8 oz.) pkg. cream cheese, salt and pepper to taste, 1 Tbsp. Worcestershire sauce, 1/4 c. catsup, 4 to 5 Tbsp. minced onion
ReferenceRecipe: Let cream cheese soften until workable. Mix all ingredients together well by hand. Shape into ball. Decorate top with whole shrimp. Chill at least 2 hours before serving.
GeneratedRecipe: soften cream cheese and blend with catsup, worcestershire sauce and onion. mix well. add shrimp, salt and pepper. serve with crackers or chips.

Ingredients: 2 c. potatoes, grated in food processor, 1 egg plus 1 egg white, beaten, 2 Tbsp. whole wheat pastry flour, 1/8 tsp. baking powder, salt and pepper, if desired, onion juice, chopped onion or onion flakes (optional)
ReferenceRecipe: Mix all ingredients. Drop by rounded tablespoonfuls and saute until browned. Often served with warm applesauce.
GeneratedRecipe: grate potatoes in a bowl. add egg, flour, onion and baking powder. add to potatoes, onion and food processor or blender. add to mixture. add salt and pepper and blend well. drop by teaspoonfuls into hot fat or vegetable oil. fry until golden brown, turning once.

Ingredients: 1 whole fryer, 1 Tbsp. margarine, 3 c. self-rising flour, 1 can cream of chicken soup, 3 Tbsp. margarine, salt and pepper to taste
ReferenceRecipe: Boil chicken; remove meat from bones. Add 1 tablespoon margarine to broth and meat.
GeneratedRecipe: boil chicken until tender. remove from bone and cut into bite size pieces. mix flour, salt and pepper. melt margarine in a large skillet. add chicken and brown on both sides. add cream of chicken soup. cover and cook over low heat for 45 minutes.

Ingredients: 1 1/2 c. chopped onions, 3 to 4 cloves minced garlic, 1/4 to 1/8 c. dill weed (fresh) or 1 Tbsp. dry, 1/4 tsp. fresh milled black pepper, 1 large can crushed tomatoes plus 1 can water, 1 Tbsp. honey, 2 fresh tomatoes, chopped
ReferenceRecipe: Saute onions and garlic in oil in soup pot until soft. Add tomatoes, dill, pepper, honey and water. Cover and cook over low heat at a slow simmer for about an hour or 45 minutes. You can serve this with a dollop of nonfat yogurt.
GeneratedRecipe: saute onions and garlic in a small amount of oil. add tomatoes, water, dill, pepper and dill weed. simmer 10 minutes. remove from heat and let cool.

Ingredients: 1 box Triscuits, 1 jar pizza sauce, 1 (8 oz.) pkg. shredded Mozzarella cheese, 1 pkg. pepperoni
ReferenceRecipe: Place Triscuits on a cookie sheet. Spread pizza sauce on Triscuits. Put pepperoni on top of sauce. Top with Mozzarella cheese. Place under broiler until cheese is bubbly. Serve hot.
GeneratedRecipe: spread pizza sauce on bottom of a 9 x 13-inch pan. top with pepperoni and mozzarella cheese. bake until cheese is melted.

Ingredients: 4 bacon strips, diced, 5 c. shredded cabbage, 1 medium onion, chopped, 1/2 c. water, 1/3 c. vinegar, 2 Tbsp. all-purpose flour, 2 Tbsp. brown sugar, 1/2 tsp. salt, 1/8 tsp. pepper
ReferenceRecipe: In a large skillet, cook bacon until crisp. Remove and set aside. Saute cabbage and onion in drippings until tender. Add remaining ingredients; stir until thickened. Stir in bacon. Serve warm. Serves 6.
GeneratedRecipe: cook bacon until crisp. remove and drain on paper towel. cook onion in bacon fat 3 minutes. stir in flour, salt and pepper. add vinegar and water. cook over low heat 3 or 4 minutes, stirring constantly. add cabbage and crumbled bacon. heat thoroughly. stir in vinegar; cook, brown sugar and stir gently.

Ingredients: 1 egg white, few grains salt, 2 Tbsp. sugar, 1 egg yolk, 1/2 c. cream, whipped, 1 tsp. vanilla or 1 Tbsp. sherry flavoring
ReferenceRecipe: Beat egg white with salt until stiff. Beat in sugar gradually. Add egg yolk and beat until thick. Fold in whipped cream and flavoring. Serve soon after making.
GeneratedRecipe: beat egg yolk and sugar together until fluffy. gradually add salt, beating constantly over medium heat until thick and light and fluffy. add sherry, vanilla flavoring and whipped cream.

Ingredients: 1 (10 to 12 oz.) bag vegetable pasta spirals, 1/2 c. each red and green bell peppers, chopped, 1/2 bunch green onions, chopped, 1 (8 oz.) pkg. reduced shredded cheese, 1 (8 oz.) bottle no-fat Ranch dressing
ReferenceRecipe: Cook pasta as directed on the package. Add peppers and onions, mixing well. Chill pasta mixture for 2 or more hours (overnight is best). Add cheese and dressing to pasta. Mix and chill for at least 30 minutes more, then serve. This is great with any meat or by itself. Yields 10 servings, 131 calories, 1 g. fat.
GeneratedRecipe: cook pasta. rinse with cold water. drain and rinse well. in cold water. rinse and drain. mix pasta, cheese and green onions. toss with pasta. add vegetable dressing. marinate overnight.

Ingredients: 1 head iceberg lettuce or 1/2 spinach and 1/2 head lettuce, 1 Tbsp. fresh parsley, chopped, 1 c. chopped celery, 2 green onions, chopped, 1 can mandarin oranges, drained, 1/4 c. slivered almonds, browned in 1 tsp. butter
ReferenceRecipe: Combine ingredients in	a bowl, cover with plastic wrap and refrigerate.
GeneratedRecipe: combine lettuce, celery, green onions and parsley in a large bowl. melt butter in skillet. add almonds and toss. serve immediately.

Ingredients: 2 lb. small new potatoes, 2 hard-cooked eggs, sliced, 1/2 tsp. dill weed, 2 Tbsp. vegetable oil, 1/2 lb. kielbasa, diced, 1/2 c. chopped onion, 2 Tbsp. all-purpose flour, 2 Tbsp. sugar, 1/3 c. cider vinegar, 1 (10 3/4 oz.) can condensed chicken broth, 1/3 c. water, sliced pimento-stuffed olives
ReferenceRecipe: In a 4-quart saucepan, place potatoes; add water to cover. Over high heat, heat to boiling. Reduce heat to low. Cover; simmer 20 to 30 minutes until fork-tender. Drain. Cool slightly. Cut potatoes into slices.
GeneratedRecipe: cook the potatoes in boiling salted water; drain. in a large saucepan, cook the onion in oil over medium heat until soft. add potatoes and cook for 4 minutes or until tender. drain. stir in dill weed. stir in flour, dill, broth, vinegar, sugar, sugar and dill weed. boil, stirring constantly. reduce heat; simmer 20 minutes, or until slightly thickened, stirring occasionally. remove from heat; stir in kielbasa, olives. add crumbled eggs and olives; toss to coat. serve at once. yield: 6 servings.

Ingredients: 3 qt. water, 1 1/2 c. vinegar, 2 Tbsp. salt, 1 large garlic bulb, 5 or more pieces dill, 1/2 chopped onion, 1 Tbsp. mustard seed, 1 Tbsp. dry mustard, cucumbers
ReferenceRecipe: Bring water, vinegar and salt to a boil. Pack cucumbers in gallon jar with remaining ingredients. Fill spaces in jar with dill. Pour boiling water over pickles. Wipe off rim and tighten lid. Flip over on lid to seal. Let cool and refrigerate at least one week before eating.
GeneratedRecipe: pack cucumbers, dill, chopped onion, dry mustard seed, salt and garlic in jars. pour vinegar mixture over cucumbers. let sit for 2 to 3 weeks.

Ingredients: 1 lb. stew beef, boiled and chopped, 1 large onion, chopped, 1/2 c. medium salsa, 1 pkg. corn tortillas (fresh) *, 1 1/2 c. Monterey Jack, shredded, 1/2 c. Mozzarella, shredded, salad oil, chopped lettuce, chopped tomato, sour cream
ReferenceRecipe: *In the dairy case.
GeneratedRecipe: fry chopped stew meat until done, about 5 or 6 minutes. in another pan, fry onion in oil until tender. add tomato and salsa; add the cheese. stir together. place tortilla in pan and place mixture on top; roll up, seam side up, until all are coated. place tortillas on plate and place on plate; pour salsa over and cover. serve immediately. top with salsa and lettuce.

Ingredients: 2 qt. whole milk, 1 pt. buttermilk, 6 eggs, 1/2 tsp. salt, 1/2 tsp. sugar
ReferenceRecipe: Using a heavy pan, heat milk to near boiling. Have eggs beaten until blended well. Add buttermilk, salt and sugar. Beat again until blended and slowly pour into hot milk, stirring slowly (preferably with a wooden spoon). Allow to heat again a few minutes, stirring slowly until it starts to separate (that's the secret). When whey starts to form, put in a fine wire strainer to drain. After drained, set in refrigerator to chill. Serve with bread and syrup or plain with syrup.
GeneratedRecipe: beat eggs until foamy. add sugar, salt and whole buttermilk. beat well. pour into a 5-quart pan. cook until thick enough to drop from spoon.

Ingredients: 48 graham crackers, 1 c. brown sugar, 1 (6 oz.) pkg. chocolate chips, 1 1/2 sticks margarine, 3/4 c. pecans, chopped
ReferenceRecipe: Line graham crackers in jelly roll pan. Sprinkle pecans and chocolate chips over crackers. Boil margarine and sugar for 2 minutes. Pour over crackers.
GeneratedRecipe: line a 9 x 13-inch pan with whole graham crackers. mix brown sugar, margarine and pecans. bring to a boil and boil for 2 minutes. remove from heat and add chocolate chips. spread over crackers. sprinkle with pecans. melt chocolate chips and spread on top of crackers. cool and cut into squares.

Ingredients: 1 pkg. stew meat, cut in small pieces, 1 (14 oz.) can diced tomatoes, 2 cloves garlic, crushed, 2 Tbsp. cumin, ground, 1 tsp. black pepper, 1 medium onion, diced
ReferenceRecipe: Combine meat, garlic, onion, pepper and cumin. Mix well and refrigerate 2 hours. Brown meats and spices until done. Add tomatoes with juice and simmer 20 to 30 minutes. Serve over steamed rice.
GeneratedRecipe: brown meat, garlic and onions in a large pot. drain grease. add tomatoes, pepper, cumin and cumin. bring to a boil, then reduce heat and cook about 1/2 hour. add water as needed. if you want to add more water. cook longer. serve over hot rice or chinese noodles.

Ingredients: 1 can white tuna (spring water packed), 1 can cream of mushroom soup, 1 c. chopped celery, 1 Tbsp. or less grated onion, 1 c. mayonnaise, 1 (8 oz.) pkg. cream cheese, 1 1/2 pkg. plain Knox gelatine, 1/2 c. cold water
ReferenceRecipe: Heat soup; dissolve the softened cream cheese in soup. Add gelatine which has been dissolved in the cold water; set aside to cool, then add all other ingredients. Pour into oblong pan (12 x 8-inch). Sprinkle with paprika. Keep refrigerated.
GeneratedRecipe: dissolve gelatine in cold water. heat soup and cream cheese until smooth. add remaining ingredients and mix well. pour into mold and chill until firm. serve with crackers.

Ingredients: regular brownie mix, 2 c. confectioners sugar, 2 Tbsp. creme de menthe, 1 stick margarine, 1 c. chocolate chips, 3/4 stick margarine, 1 tsp. creme de menthe
ReferenceRecipe: Prepare brownie mix using a 9 x 13-inch pan. Beat together confectioners sugar, 2 tablespoons creme de menthe and 1 stick margarine until cream. Frost brownies with it. Melt together chocolate chips, 3/4 stick margarine and 1 teaspoon creme de menthe; mix together until well blended. Frost over the confectioners sugar frosting. Cool at least one hour before cutting.
GeneratedRecipe: prepare brownie mix according to package directions. bake in a 9 x 13-inch pan. while still warm, melt margarine and creme de menthe. remove from heat and add confectioners sugar, margarine and chocolate chips. stir until smooth. spread over cooled brownies. cool and cut into squares.

Ingredients: 14 oz. pkg. dry green split peas, 12 oz. pkg. pearl barley, 14 oz. pkg. alphabet macaroni, 12 oz. pkg. lentils, 1 1/2 c. brown rice, 4 c. dry minced onion
ReferenceRecipe: Combine ingredients in a large airtight container. Stir to evenly distribute ingredients. Label container. Store in a cool dry place. Use within 6 months. Shake before using. Makes about 12 1/2 cups of mix.
GeneratedRecipe: bring water to a boil and simmer for 3 to 4 hours. stir in the peas, green onion and barley. cook and stir for 4 to 6 minutes. remove from heat and discard. cool. add to mixture to soup mixture, then add the rice, stirring gently to blend well. makes 12 servings.

Ingredients: 12 c. flour, 4 Tbsp. baking powder, 1 Tbsp. salt, 1 1/2 c. fat
ReferenceRecipe: Sift together flour, baking powder and salt. Use a pastry blender and cut in fat that is firm at room temperature until mixture looks like coarse cornmeal. Store in tightly covered jar or can. (This will keep about 3 months.)
GeneratedRecipe: sift flour, baking powder and salt together. work in 1 cup fat. add water. roll out. let stand 20 minutes on floured board to 1/8-inch thickness, then cut in small strips. fry in deep fat.

Ingredients: 1/2 c. chopped dried apricots, 2 1/2 c. dried bread cubes (2 1/2 slices), 1/3 c. white sugar, 1/2 tsp. vanilla, 2 c. low-fat milk, 1 c. Second Nature, 1/2 tsp. cinnamon
ReferenceRecipe: Soak apricots in milk for 15 minutes.
GeneratedRecipe: in a saucepan, combine apricots, apricots and milk. bring to a boil. reduce heat and simmer until apricots are tender and sugar melts. pour over bread cubes. sprinkle with cinnamon and sugar.

Ingredients: 3/4 lb. beef roast, 1 tsp. vegetable oil, 1/8 tsp. pepper, 3/4 cup water, 2 carrots, sliced, 4 baby onions, 2 potatoes, peeled and quartered
ReferenceRecipe: Brown meat in hot oil. Season with salt and pepper. Add water and cover and simmer for one hour. Add vegetables and simmer another hour.
GeneratedRecipe: brown beef in oil in dutch oven. remove roast to warm platter. add onions and carrots. stir in water and pepper. cover and cook over low heat for 3 hours or until meat is tender. stir in vegetables and carrots. cook until potatoes are tender.

Ingredients: 2 lb. Hamburg, 1 can Peas, 1 can whole Tomatoes, 1/2 lb. Noodles, 1 Onion
ReferenceRecipe: In large sauce pan, brown hamburg. Slice onion very thin over hamburg. Simmer covered for 5 minutes. Place peas on top of hamburg. Cook and drain noodles and place on top of hamburg/onion mixture then adding tomatoes. Put butter pieces over tomatoes. Simmer again uncovered on very low heat for about 10 minutes. It's a good casserole. Serves 6 people.
GeneratedRecipe: brown hamburg and onion; drain. add tomatoes and peas. cook until noodles are done. serve with cornbread.

Ingredients: 1 cup oatmeal, 1 stick margarine, 1 1/2 cups boiling water, 2 eggs, 1 cup brown sugar, 1 cup white sugar, 1 1/3 cups flour, 1 tsp. baking soda, 1 tsp. cinnamon, 1/2 tsp. nutmeg, 1/2 tsp. salt, Nuts or raisins as desired
ReferenceRecipe: All first 3 ingredients to stand in small bowl for 20 minutes. In another bowl, mix all other ingredients. Then stir in cooled oatmeal mixture. Add nuts or fruit if you like at bake in a 9x9 inch pan for 35 minutes or until done. Serves 6-9.
GeneratedRecipe: pour boiling water over oatmeal. let stand for 10 minutes. cream margarine and sugars. add eggs, flour, baking soda, salt, cinnamon, nutmeg and nutmeg. mix well. add raisins and nuts.

Ingredients: 1 (16 oz.) canned or fresh crabmeat, 1 (16 oz.) canned or fresh shrimp, 1 medium green pepper, chopped, 1 medium onion, chopped, 1 c. celery, chopped, 1/2 tsp. salt, 1/4 tsp. pepper, 1 c. or more mayonnaise, saltine crackers, crushed and tossed with butter
ReferenceRecipe: Combine all ingredients, except cracker crumbs. Blend well. Place in baking dish; sprinkle buttered cracker crumbs evenly over casserole. Bake 25 to 30 minutes.
GeneratedRecipe: saute onion, green pepper and celery in butter until tender. add mayonnaise, salt and pepper. mix well. add crabmeat and shrimp. chill. serve on crackers.

Ingredients: 2 lb. lean ground beef, 3/4 c. milk, 1 1/2 c. soft bread crumbs, 1/8 tsp. pepper, 1 carrot, diced, 1 small onion, diced, 2 eggs, beaten, 1/4 c. catsup, 3 Tbsp. brown sugar, 3 Tbsp. mustard
ReferenceRecipe: Mix all ingredients except catsup, brown sugar and mustard. Put in 9 x 5-inch loaf pan. Use remaining ingredients for topping.
GeneratedRecipe: mix together beef, bread crumbs, milk, onion, pepper, eggs and carrot; stir well. pat into a 9 x 13-inch loaf pan. in small bowl combine catsup, sugar, mustard and pepper. pour over meat loaf. microwave on high for 10 minutes. stir and cook additional 30 minutes.

Ingredients: 2 lb. lean ground beef, 1/2 c. old-fashioned chili sauce, 1 tsp. salt, 1/2 tsp. pepper, 1/8 tsp. Tabasco sauce, 1/2 tsp. chili powder, 1/4 tsp. mustard, 1 Tbsp. minced onions, 1/2 tsp. garlic powder, 1/2 tsp. mushroom flavoring
ReferenceRecipe: Mix all ingredients together. Shape into 8 patties. Chill. Brown over charcoal fire or broil on rack in broiling pan. Serves 4.
GeneratedRecipe: brown onions and beef in skillet; drain. add chili powder, chili powder, tabasco sauce and spices. simmer for 10 minutes. stir occasionally. serve over pasta.

Ingredients: 2 c. plain flour, 1 1/2 tsp. soda, 1 tsp. salt, 2 c. sugar, 2 grated carrots, 1/2 c. chopped pecans, 2 tsp. baking powder, 2 tsp. cinnamon, 4 eggs, 1 1/2 c. oil, 1 small can crushed pineapple, drained, 1/2 c. flaked coconut
ReferenceRecipe: Sift together the dry ingredients. Mix eggs, oil, and sugar. Add dry ingredients a little at a time and beat well after each addition. Fold in carrots, pineapple, and nuts. Bake at 350 degrees in three 9 inch cake pans.
GeneratedRecipe: combine flour, sugar, baking powder, salt and cinnamon. add eggs, oil and carrots. mix well. add carrots, pineapple, coconut and pecans.

Ingredients: 1 1/4 lb. ground beef, 1 green pepper, 1 onion, 2 cloves garlic, 2 Tbsp. Worcestershire sauce, salt, 1 can tomato paste, 1 can creamed corn, 1 can ripe olives and juice, 1/4 lb. grated cheese, 1 pkg. broad noodles
ReferenceRecipe: Brown meat, pepper, onion and garlic in hot shortening or oil. Add tomato paste and other vegetables and let simmer about 30 minutes.
GeneratedRecipe: brown ground beef, onion, green pepper and garlic. drain. add tomato juice, tomato paste, corn, tomato paste and salt and pepper. simmer 30 minutes. cook noodles until tender. add creamed corn, cheese and noodles. put in serving dish. sprinkle with grated cheese.

Ingredients: 8 oz. Cool Whip, 12 oz. cottage cheese (small curd), small box strawberry jello, 15 oz. fruit cocktail, drained, cut up banana
ReferenceRecipe: Do not add water. Mix jello, cottage cheese and Cool Whip, then add fruit cocktail and banana. Mix well and chill.
GeneratedRecipe: mix cottage cheese and jello together. add fruit cocktail and cool whip. mix well. chill and serve.

Ingredients: 1 stick butter, 1 small bunch green onions, chopped, 1/2 c. finely chopped parsley, 2 Tbsp. flour, 1 pt. breakfast cream, 1/2 lb. grated Swiss cheese, 1 Tbsp. sherry wine or Zinfandel wine, red pepper to taste, salt to taste, 1 lb. white crabmeat, few drops of Tabasco
ReferenceRecipe: Melt butter in heavy pot and saute onions and parsley. Blend in flour, cream and cheese until cheese is melted. Add other ingredients and gently fold in crabmeat. This may be served in a chafing dish with Melba toast or in pastry shells.
GeneratedRecipe: melt butter in saucepan. add flour and stir until smooth. add onions, parsley, wine, salt, pepper and tabasco. cook over low heat, stirring constantly, until mixture thickens. add crabmeat and simmer for 5 minutes, stirring occasionally. add swiss cheese and sherry. stir until cheese is melted. serve immediately.

Ingredients: 1 (10 oz.) jar pepperoncini (salad peppers), drained and stemmed, 8 oz. cream cheese, 1/4 c. grated Parmesan cheese, 1/2 c. sour cream
ReferenceRecipe: Combine all ingredients in food processor. Serve with crackers. Good and zingy.
GeneratedRecipe: beat cream cheese until smooth. stir in sour cream and parmesan cheese. add peppers and mix well. serve with chips.

Ingredients: 4 c. hot tap water, 1/4 c. Ivory liquid
ReferenceRecipe: Mix gently and let stand of 1 hour before using. (I sometimes add food coloring for fun.)
GeneratedRecipe: mix ingredients in a blender with a rubber spatula. add enough water to fill a cup to the top of hot water. add more hot water, if needed.

Ingredients: 1 pkg. boxed scalloped potatoes, 1 (7 to 8 oz.) can minced clams, drained, 1 Tbsp. shredded green onion, 2 1/2 c. milk, 1 Tbsp. butter, 1 Tbsp. freeze dried green pepper
ReferenceRecipe: In large saucepan, mix potatoes slices, sauce mix, water and milk called for on package, clam liquor, green onion and green pepper. Heat to boil, stirring occasionally. Reduce heat, cover and simmer for 25 minutes or until potatoes are tender. Stir in clams, milk and butter. Heat through.
GeneratedRecipe: cook potatoes in boiling water until tender. drain and set aside. saute onion and green pepper in butter until tender, but not brown. stir in milk and clams. heat to boiling. reduce heat and simmer, stirring occasionally, until potatoes are tender.

Ingredients: 1 (12 oz.) can frozen orange juice, 1 (12 oz.) can frozen lemonade, 1 (46 oz.) can unsweetened pineapple juice, 1 qt. ginger ale
ReferenceRecipe: Dilute	frozen	juice as directed on can. Add pineapple juice and mix. At serving time, add ginger ale. Yields 40 servings.
GeneratedRecipe: mix all ingredients except ginger ale. chill. add ginger ale just before serving. makes 1 gallon.

Ingredients: 1/2 c. chopped celery, 1/4 c. chopped green pepper, 1/4 c. chopped onion, 2 Tbsp. butter, 2 c. cornbread stuffing mix, 1 c. chopped cooked shrimp, 1/4 c. mayonnaise or salad dressing, 1 Tbsp. snapped parsley, dash of cayenne pepper, 2 Tbsp. melted butter
ReferenceRecipe: Cook celery, green pepper and onion in butter until tender. Prepare stuffing mix. Stir in vegetables, shrimp, mayo, parsley and cayenne.
GeneratedRecipe: combine stuffing, celery, green pepper, onion and salad dressing. add shrimp and butter. mix well. add shrimp, parsley and mix well. form into a ball. roll in stuffing.

Ingredients: 2 c. sugar, 1 c. hot water, 2 tsp. maple extract, 1 tsp. vanilla
ReferenceRecipe: Melt sugar in hot water. Bring to boil and remove from heat. Stir in vanilla and maple flavoring.
GeneratedRecipe: in a medium size saucepan, combine hot water and sugar. bring to a boil. boil for 5 minutes, stirring constantly. add maple extract. serve over ice cream.

Ingredients: 3 to 4 lb. venison roast, 3 c. diced potatoes, 2 c. sliced carrots, 1 medium onion, sliced, 1 pkg. Schilling brand pot roast seasons with roasting bag, 1 c. water (additional, not optional)
ReferenceRecipe: Place trimmed and boned roast inside roasting bag; add seasonings, potatoes, carrots and onion. Add water per package directions, then add additional water. (Venison has no marbled fat, so will cook drier.) Seal roasting bag closed.
GeneratedRecipe: place meat in a large kettle. add onion and water. cook until tender. add carrots. cover and cook until potatoes are tender. add carrots and cook 20 minutes more. add carrots ( if necessary ) and carrots. cook 20 minutes longer. add potatoes. cook until done. season to taste. serve with mashed potatoes and sour cream.

Ingredients: 6 oz. pkg. blackberry jello, 2 c. boiling water, 1 can blueberries, 1 can crushed pineapple, 8 oz. sour cream, 8 oz. cream cheese, 2/3 c. sugar, 1 tsp. vanilla, chopped nuts (optional)
ReferenceRecipe: Dissolve jello in 2 cups boiling water. Drain blueberries and pineapple. Save juices. Combine the two juices and measure 1/2 cup to add to the jello mixture. Refrigerate jello and let set partially, then add the drained blueberries and pineapple. Let set until firm. Then combine sour cream, cream cheese, sugar and vanilla. Whip together. Spread on top of jello. Sprinkle with nuts, if desired.
GeneratedRecipe: dissolve jello in hot water. add blueberries and pineapple. pour half of mixture in 9 x 13-inch pan. refrigerate until set. whip together sour cream, cream cheese, sugar, vanilla and vanilla. spread on top of jello mixture. sprinkle with nuts and chopped nuts. chill until ready to serve.

Ingredients: 1 small onion, diced, 1 lb. ground beef, 1 pkg. French's Chili-O seasoning, 16 oz. can stewed tomatoes, 2 (14 oz.) cans pinto beans, 1/2 c. water
ReferenceRecipe: Brown beef in skillet with onion; drain. Stir in remaining ingredients. Bring to a boil and simmer 10 minutes, stirring occasionally.
GeneratedRecipe: brown ground beef and onion. add stewed tomatoes, water, beans and seasoning and cook about 1 hour.

Ingredients: 1 1/2 lb. fish fillets (cod, haddock, sole, flounder), 1/2 c. milk, 1/2 c. wheat germ, 2 shallots, chopped, 1 1/2 Tbsp. cold pressed oil, 2 1/2 Tbsp. butter, 3 Tbsp. parsley, minced, 1 lemon, cut into wedges
ReferenceRecipe: Dip fish in milk, then in wheat germ. Saute shallots in oil and butter in a skillet for 2 minutes, then add the fish. Cook briefly, 3 minutes on one side and 2 on the other. Do	not cook until the fish is dry and comes apart. When serving, toss minced parsley over. Add lemon wedges on the side.	Serves 4.
GeneratedRecipe: place fillets in bowl. sprinkle with germ. cover with milk. marinate for 1 hour. drain. heat oil in large skillet. add haddock and stir-fry 2 minutes. turn fish and cook 2 minutes. remove fish. saute shallots in 1 tablespoon butter and parsley. saute shallots until soft. add milk, parsley and parsley. mix well. add fish and wheat germ. sprinkle with parsley.

Ingredients: 1/2 c. real butter, 3/4 c. sugar, 3 sq. unsweetened chocolate, melted and cooled, 1 tsp. vanilla, 2 eggs, 1 chocolate wafer crust, graham cracker crust or regular crust, whipped cream
ReferenceRecipe: In mixing bowl, cream the butter; gradually add sugar. Cream until light and fluffy. Blend in unsweetened chocolate and vanilla. Add eggs, one at a time, beating 3 minutes after each addition (medium speed). Turn filling into chocolate wafer crust, graham cracker crust or regular crust. Chill several hours. Top with whipped cream.
GeneratedRecipe: cream butter and sugar until light and fluffy. add eggs, one at a time, beating well after each addition. add chocolate and vanilla. fold in whipped cream. pour into graham cracker crust and chill.

Ingredients: 1 lb. hamburger meat (80% to 90% lean), 2 cans Ranch Style beans, 1/2 c. chopped onion, 2 Tbsp. chili powder, 1 tsp. garlic powder
ReferenceRecipe: Brown meat and drain. Mix beans, meat, onion, garlic and chili powder. Cook in crock-pot. Simmer for about 30 minutes (low).
GeneratedRecipe: brown hamburger meat and onion; drain. add chili powder, garlic powder and ranch style beans. simmer for 30 minutes.

Ingredients: 1 c. raisins, 1 c. pitted dates, 1 c. pitted prunes, 1 c. dried apricots, 1 c. nuts
ReferenceRecipe: Grind in food processor. Mix well and roll in powdered sugar or chopped nuts. Or mix with 1 tablespoon orange juice, or 1/4 cup honey, 3 tablespoons butter and 1/2 teaspoon vanilla (mixed and barely warmed). Then roll in nuts.
GeneratedRecipe: grind apricots and prunes. add remaining ingredients. mix and store in a tightly covered container.

Ingredients: 2 large or 3 medium potatoes, cubed, 2 c. water, 1/2 c. butter, 1/2 c. margarine, 1/2 c. chopped celery, 1/4 c. chopped onions, 1 c. flour, 4 tsp. granular chicken bouillon or 4 crushed chicken bouillon cubes, 6 c. cold milk, 1/2 lb. shredded or small cubed Cheddar cheese, 1 c. cubed ham (if desired)
ReferenceRecipe: Cook potatoes until tender in water, but do not overcook. Saute onions and celery in melted butter and margarine. Add flour and chicken bouillon and stir to blend. Add milk and stir until thick and smooth. Add cooked potato cubes and their cooking liquid. Add and stir in Cheddar cheese until it melts. If desired, add ham. Season with white pepper.
GeneratedRecipe: in 1 1/2-quart dutch oven over medium heat, in hot margarine, cook celery and onions until tender. stir in flour. add cold water ( bouillon, ham, bouillon cubes, and 1/2 cup water. ) and crushed ham. heat to boiling; cover and simmer 2 hours or until vegetables have almost tender. add remaining milk; stir in cheese. cook until cheese is bubbly. serve with crackers.

Ingredients: 2 medium cucumbers, peeled and diced, 1 1/4 lb. fresh tomatoes (about 4), peeled and diced, 1 small can diced green chilies, salt, 1 Tbsp. tomato puree, 1 large onion, chopped, 2 small red and green sweet peppers, diced, 1/2 c. wine vinegar, 4 c. cold water, 2 garlic cloves, minced, 2 c. bread crumbs, 4 Tbsp. olive oil

GeneratedRecipe: cut up lettuce, onions and almonds. mix dressing with the oil, vinegar, sesame seed and parmesan cheese. pour over first mixture and toss well before serving.

Ingredients: 2 medium white onions, chopped, 1 green bell pepper, chopped, 2 stalks celery, chopped, 2 cloves garlic, chopped, 1/2 c. butter, 2 c. crayfish tails, 4 Tbsp. flour, 2 cans chicken broth, 1/4 tsp. cayenne pepper, hot rice
ReferenceRecipe: Add crayfish tails to mixture and saute 1 minute. Then add flour. Mix well and add chicken broth and cayenne pepper. Simmer 15 minutes. Serve over hot rice.

GeneratedRecipe: thaw rolls; mix pudding with half and half and half and brown sugar. roll dough out 1/2 of bread, then sprinkle rest of butter and brown sugar mixture over dough. roll dough into ball and lay remaining ingredients in pan.

ReferenceRecipe: Chop eggs. Mix cheese and eggs in a bowl. Combine sour cream, mustard, horseradish, salt, pepper and cumin. Fold in cheese and egg mixture. Refrigerate 1 hour. Serve on a bed of lettuce. Serves 4.

GeneratedRecipe: combine flour, salt and pepper. dredge meat in flour mixture. brown in shortening. add onion and garlic. cook until tender. add tomato sauce, vinegar, water, mustard and horseradish. cover and simmer 1 1/2 hours or until meat is tender. serve over rice.

Ingredients: 4 tsp. fat, 1 c. onions, 1/2 green pepper, 1 c. celery, 1 small clove garlic, 2 c. canned tomatoes, 1 to 2 Tbsp. chili powder, 2 Tbsp. water, 1 lb. ground beef, 1 tsp. salt, 2 tsp. sugar, 2 c. red kidney beans
ReferenceRecipe: Melt fat. Add onions, pepper, celery and garlic. Cook until partly tender. Add beef and cook until light brown. Add tomatoes, chili powder and 2 tablespoons water. Add salt and sugar. Bring to boil, then reduce to low heat and simmer for 1 hour. Add beans and heat well.
GeneratedRecipe: saute onions and celery in fat. add ground beef, seasonings and water. bring to a boil, then simmer for 1 hour. add beans and kidney beans. cook 15 minutes longer. may top with grated cheddar cheese before serving. serves 6 to 8.

GeneratedRecipe: peel and core apples. cut into 1/2-inch slices. in a skillet, combine sugar, cinnamon and water. cover and cook over medium heat until apples are tender, about 20 minutes. stir occasionally.

Ingredients: 1 lb. ground beef, 1 lb. Italian sausage (ground), 1 lb. sliced mushrooms or 1 large can of mushrooms, 1 large onion, diced, 1 large green pepper, diced, 1 large can crushed tomatoes, 1 small can tomato paste, Italian seasoning, salt and pepper, garlic
ReferenceRecipe: Brown ground beef, onion, mushrooms, Italian sausage and green pepper. Drain fat. Add tomato paste and Italian seasoning; stir until mixed well. In large pot or crock-pot, add tomato sauce, crushed tomatoes, meat mixture and seasoning to taste. Cook slow for 3 to 6 hours.
GeneratedRecipe: brown ground beef and sausage. drain off fat. add onion and green pepper. add tomatoes, tomato paste, italian seasoning and mushrooms, tomato paste. let cook about 20 minutes. add garlic salt and italian seasoning. simmer for about 30 minutes. serve over rice.

Ingredients: 1 c. sugar, 1 c. Karo syrup, 6 c. cornflakes, 1 1/2 c. peanut butter
ReferenceRecipe: Combine sugar and syrup. Let it come to a fast boil; quickly add peanut butter, then take off and let peanut butter melt. When melted, add cornflakes. Mix well. Drop onto a pan to cool.
GeneratedRecipe: bring to boil the sugar and karo syrup. add peanut butter and cornflakes. stir until well coated. drop by spoonfuls on wax paper. let cool.

ReferenceRecipe: In a 6 to 8-quart kettle or Dutch oven, mix cranberries, sugar, water, orange peel and orange juice; bring to a boil. GeneratedRecipe: combine cranberries, water and sugar in a large saucepan. bring to a boil over medium heat. reduce heat and simmer, uncovered, for 10 minutes or until cranberries are tender. remove from heat. stir in orange peel and orange peel. cool slightly. add orange juice and almonds. refrigerate until ready to serve.

Ingredients: 1 c. milk, 3 Tbsp. flour, 1 stick soft butter, 1/2 c. Crisco shortening, 1 c. sugar

ReferenceRecipe: Fry meat and drain grease. Chop cheese into meat mixture and melt. Add other ingredients; mix well. Spread on thin bread cut into 1/4-inch pieces. GeneratedRecipe: brown ground meat and ground beef together. when the cheese melts, add oregano and garlic powder. melt cheese together and add to meat mixture and stir until smooth. serve warm with crackers or chips.

ReferenceRecipe: Mix all ingredients and roll out thin. Let dry about 20 minutes. Cut into strips and drop into chicken broth and cook. When done, cut up one hard-boiled egg into dumplings.
GeneratedRecipe: sift flour and salt together. cut in shortening until mixture resembles coarse crumbs. add egg and water. mix well. roll out on floured board and cut into squares.

Ingredients: 1 (8 oz.) pkg. medium egg noodles, 8 oz. sour cream, 8 oz. cottage cheese, 3 eggs, beaten, 1 stick margarine, melted, 1/3 c. sugar, 1/2 c. milk, 1/2 c. raisins, bread crumbs (about 1/3 c.)
ReferenceRecipe: Spinach, chicken or mushrooms can be substituted for some or all of the vegetables and meat in this recipe.
GeneratedRecipe: cook noodles according to package directions. drain and rinse with cold water. combine cottage cheese, sour cream, sugar, egg and margarine. mix well.

ReferenceRecipe: Rinse mushrooms, remove stems and chop stems into fine pieces. Leave mushrooms caps full; saute lightly in butter. Remove from pan. Saute chopped stems for about 10 minutes. GeneratedRecipe: remove stems from mushrooms. wash and dry with paper towels. melt butter in a large skillet. add mushrooms and saute until tender, about 5 minutes. stir in bread crumbs, parsley, oregano, salt, pepper and powdered sugar.

Ingredients: 1 Tbsp. palm oil, 1 Tbsp. olive oil, 1 onion, chopped, 1 garlic clove, crushed, 2 tomatoes, chopped, 2 tsp. coriander, 1 tsp. chopped parsley, 1/4 tsp. red pepper sauce, 3 c. uncooked, shelled shrimp, 2 c. coconut milk
ReferenceRecipe: Cook onion and garlic in oil until translucent. Add tomatoes, coriander, hot pepper sauce and shrimp. Simmer ingredients until shrimp turns pink. Pour in coconut milk. Serve with rice.

GeneratedRecipe: mix powdered sugar, butter, milk and coconut. roll into small balls. melt chocolate morsels and paraffin wax in double boiler. dip balls into chocolate mixture and place on wax paper to cool.

GeneratedRecipe: beat eggs. add sugar and beat well. add chocolate chips. beat until well mixed. fold in heavy cream. pour into graham cracker crust. freeze until firm. makes 2 large pie shells.

Ingredients: 1 'Nilla pie crust, 2 bananas, 1 small box sugar-free banana pudding (instant), 1 small container Cool Whip lite

GeneratedRecipe: combine sugar and cornstarch in a medium bowl. add corn oil or oil and egg and beat until smooth. remove from stove and set aside. in a bowl, combine flour and sugar. stir in egg and corn glaze and beat until smooth. fold in strawberry glaze and blueberries.

ReferenceRecipe: Mix first 4 ingredients. Add egg and flavoring to ice water, then mix all ingredients together and roll out.
