Ingredients: 1 lb. ground ham, 1/2 lb. ground pork, 1/2 lb. ground beef, 1 c. cracker crumbs, 2 tsp. chopped onions, 2 tsp. celery or celery salt, 1/4 tsp. pepper, 1/2 tsp. salt, 2 eggs, beaten, 1 c. milk
ReferenceRecipe: Blend ham, beef and pork. Add all other ingredients. Form meat balls and place in baking pan.
GeneratedRecipe: mix all ingredients except the meat and form into small balls. brown in hot oil. drain off excess fat. pour off fat. add 1 tablespoon flour to make a gravy and 1 cup milk. pour over meatballs in crock-pot. cover and cook on low for 6 to 8 hours.

Ingredients: 1 c. sugar, 1/4 tsp. salt, 1/4 tsp. cream of tartar, 5 Tbsp. cold water, 2 egg whites, 1 tsp. vanilla
ReferenceRecipe: Mix in saucepan, sugar, salt, cream of tartar and water. Stir. Bring to a full boil. Place two egg whites in small mixer bowl. Do not beat until syrup is cooked. Pour syrup slowly over the egg whites, while beating at high speed, until all syrup has been added. Reduce speed to medium. Add vanilla; beat until mixture is of spreading consistency. Ice cake. May sprinkle on coconut, if desired.
GeneratedRecipe: mix sugar, cream of tartar and egg yolks in top of double boiler. cook over boiling water until it stands in peaks. add vanilla, vanilla and beat for 7 minutes.

Ingredients: 8 oz. cream cheese, 1/2 c. margarine, 1 c. powdered sugar, 1 large container Cool Whip, 2 (3 1/2 oz.) pkg. instant pudding, 3 c. milk, 1 tsp. vanilla, 1 (1 1/2 lb.) pkg. Oreos
ReferenceRecipe: Spread 1/2 crushed cookies in a 9 x 13-inch pan. Mix the cream cheese and butter until smooth. Mix in powdered sugar. Fold in Cool Whip.
GeneratedRecipe: crush oreos into a blender or food processor. blend cream cheese, margarine and powdered sugar. combine pudding mix, milk and vanilla. fold in cool whip. blend both mixtures together. layer oreos and pudding mixture in a large bowl until smooth. add oreos and mix. chill until ready to serve.

Ingredients: 1 can cream of mushroom soup, 1 can creamy onion soup, 1 can cream of celery soup, 3 or 4 lb. chuck roast beef
ReferenceRecipe: Place roast with 1 tablespoon water in the crock-pot. Cook on low for 4 hours. Add soups. Do not add water. Continue cooking on low for 6 more hours. Meat should be tender. Serves 6.
GeneratedRecipe: brown roast in skillet. mix soups, cream of mushroom soup and onion soup. put in crock-pot. cook on low 7 to 8 hours. stir occasionally. serve over rice.

Ingredients: 2 mangos, 2 cups milk, 5 Tbsp. sugar, 7 (or more) cubes of ice
ReferenceRecipe: First, slice mangos in cubes and place in a blender. Then, add 2 cups of milk and add sugar. Lastly, put in 7 (or more) cubes of ice and blend well. Pour in glass and enjoy!
GeneratedRecipe: peel and chop the mangos. add the sugar and milk to make a smooth paste and creamy paste. add ice cubes and blend until smooth.

Ingredients: 4 to 5 lb. skinned fryer chicken parts, 1 tsp. m.s.g., 5 cloves minced garlic, 1 onion, chopped, 1/2 chopped green bell pepper, 2 (15 oz.) cans tomato sauce, 4 bay leaves, 1 tsp. cumin seed, 1 1/2 tsp. dried leaf oregano, 1 c. raisins, 1 c. stuffed green olives, 1 tsp. cider vinegar
ReferenceRecipe: Place chicken parts in a large deep skillet. Add m.s.g., garlic, onion, green pepper, tomato sauce, bay leaves, cumin, oregano, raisins, olives and vinegar. Cover and bring to a boil. Turn heat down and simmer 1 hour, turning chicken occasionally. Remove chicken to a platter and serve the sauce over rice or noodles.
GeneratedRecipe: rinse chicken and pat dry. sprinkle lightly with bay leaf; set aside. in a heavy 4-quart saucepan, saute chicken on both sides in butter. add bell pepper, onion and next 5 ingredients; saute until tender, about 20 minutes. add chicken and olives. cover. simmer 45 minutes until chicken is tender. add green pepper and raisins. add to tomato; reduce heat and simmer for 10 minutes. remove chicken; cool and strain marinade. serve chicken with rice or pasta.

Ingredients: 1 (8 oz.) cream cheese, softened, 1/2 c. mayo, 4 tsp. Worcestershire sauce, 2 tsp. vinegar, 1/2 tsp. garlic powder, 2 or 3 pkg. dried beef
ReferenceRecipe: Mix first 5 ingredients well, then add dried beef and mix. Refrigerate. Serve with crackers.
GeneratedRecipe: soften cream cheese and mix with mayo, vinegar, worcestershire sauce and worcestershire sauce. chop beef and add to cream cheese. add to the beef. mix well.

Ingredients: 1 medium zucchini, 1 Cup instant potato flakes, 1/3 Cup grated cheese, 1/2 tsp. celery seed, 1/4 tsp. garlic salt or powder, 2 eggs beaten, 1/4 Cup melted butter
ReferenceRecipe: Combine potato flakes, cheese, celery seed, garlic salt and butter. Dip the zucchini in the eggs and then into the potato mixture. Place on ungreased cookie sheet and bake at 400 degree for 20 minutes.
GeneratedRecipe: peel zucchini and shred. squeeze out excess liquid. squeeze out zucchini, leaving 1/4 cup water. add eggs, garlic powder, salt, celery salt and cheese. beat until fluffy. stir in grated cheese.

Ingredients: 1 c. real mayonnaise, 2 tsp. grated onion, 1/2 tsp. dried dill weed, 1 tsp. salt, 1 c. sour cream, 1 tsp. dry mustard, 2 tsp. lemon juice
ReferenceRecipe: Combine all ingredients and chill. Can be served with chips, crackers or your favorite raw vegetables. Yield: 2 cups.
GeneratedRecipe: mix all ingredients together and chill. serve with raw vegetables or chips. makes 1 1/2 cups. good with vegetables.

Ingredients: 1 lb. package lil' smokies, 1 can (7-oz.) biscuits, 8 oz. mustard, vegetable spray
ReferenceRecipe: Preheat oven to 375 degrees. Drain liquid from smokies. Roll out biscuits one at a time. Cut each into 5 strips. Wrap each strip around each smokie. Spray cookie sheet with vegetable spray and place wrapped smokies on it. Bake for 18 minutes or until golden brown. Serve with mustard. Serve immediately or can be rewarmed in microwave for 3 minutes on medium.
GeneratedRecipe: cook the ' lil and drain the spray. lay the biscuits on a greased baking sheet and bake until done. remove the smokies from the oven and drain the smokies. place the lil the 7-oz in a single layer. sprinkle the top with mustard and cook another 5 min.

Ingredients: 3 pkg. egg roll wrappers, 1 pkg. carrots, 1 large head cabbage, 1 bunch green onions, 1 bunch celery, salt and pepper, 1 large yellow onion, 1 bell pepper, 1 lb. ground pork, diced shrimp and chicken
ReferenceRecipe: Brown ground pork; season with salt and chopped garlic. Boil chicken; take off bone and cut in small pieces. Boil shrimp; dice and set aside. Heat oil in wok or frying pan. Stir and fry 3 cups vegetables at a time; season and drain. You will need a very large bowl for mixture. Should be cool enough to handle, or you can make it ahead of time and refrigerate. Place handful in corner of wrapper and roll over. Pull sides together in a triangle; moisten corners and roll again. Deep fry in hot oil to a golden brown.
GeneratedRecipe: brown ground pork, salt and pepper; drain. cook chicken, cabbage, celery, onion, bell pepper and celery until tender. drain. add chopped cabbage, cabbage and shrimp. cook until tender. scramble egg roll wrapper and fill with chicken mixture. roll out and drop wrappers in boiling chicken broth. cook until done.

Ingredients: 2 egg whites, 1/4 tsp. salt, 3/4 c. sugar, 1/2 tsp. vanilla, 1/2 c. chocolate chips, 2 Tbsp. crushed peppermint stick
ReferenceRecipe: Beat egg whites and salt until stiff. Add gradually sugar at low speed of mixer. Continue to beat 5 more minutes. Fold in vanilla, chips and candy.
GeneratedRecipe: beat egg whites until stiff peaks form. add sugar, salt and vanilla. beat until stiff. fold in chocolate chips.

Ingredients: 8 Twinkies, cut lengthwise, cream side up, 1 small box French vanilla instant pudding, 1 medium can crushed pineapple, drained, 3 to 4 bananas, 12 oz. Cool Whip, chopped pecans, maraschino cherries (optional)
ReferenceRecipe: Put Twinkies in bottom of 9 x 13-inch baking dish. Mix pudding as directed on package. Layer pudding over Twinkies. Drain pineapple good, layer over pudding. Layer sliced bananas next. Cover all with Cool Whip. May top with chopped nuts and cherries. Serve chilled.
GeneratedRecipe: cut twinkies lengthwise in half and place in bottom of dish. pour drained pineapple over twinkies. mix pudding and cream cheese together. spread on top of pineapple. put sliced bananas on top of pudding. spread cool whip over all. sprinkle with pecans or cherries. chill.

Ingredients: 1 1/2 lb. fresh green beans, trimmed, 2 1/2 c. water, 3 Tbsp. olive oil, 2 tsp. minced garlic, 1 Tbsp. dried oregano leaves, 1/2 tsp. salt, 1/4 tsp. ground black pepper
ReferenceRecipe: Bring water to boil. Add beans and cover. Cook until tender. Mix remainder of ingredients in small bowl. Pour over hot beans and toss to coat. Serves 8.
GeneratedRecipe: cook beans in boiling water for 10 minutes or until tender. drain. in a large skillet, heat oil over medium heat. add beans, garlic, oregano, salt and pepper. cook, stirring occasionally, until beans are tender, about 5 minutes. makes 4 servings.

Ingredients: 1 gal. cucumbers, sliced, 8 small onions, sliced, 2 green sweet peppers, sliced, 1/2 c. salt, 5 c. sugar, 5 c. vinegar, 1 1/2 tsp. turmeric, 1 tsp. celery seed, 1 1/2 tsp. ground cloves, 2 Tbsp. mustard seed
ReferenceRecipe: Combine cucumbers, onions, peppers and salt. Soak 3 hours in ice water, then drain. Add sugar, vinegar, turmeric, celery seed, cloves and mustard seed. Boil until pickles change color. Can in jars.
GeneratedRecipe: mix together the cucumbers, onions and peppers and sprinkle with salt and let stand 1 hour. drain. bring to a boil the sugar, vinegar, cloves, turmeric, celery seed and spices. pour over cucumbers. bring to a boil and can.

Ingredients: 3 to 4 stalks celery, chopped, 1/2 onion, chopped, 1 can sliced chestnuts, drained, 2 c. chicken, cooked and cubed or crab, 1 small pkg. slivered almonds, 1 c. mayonnaise (not Miracle Whip), 1 can chow mein noodles
ReferenceRecipe: Mix first 5 ingredients. Thin the mayonnaise with milk and mix in. Refrigerate until ready to serve. Then fold in chow mein noodles and serve on lettuce leaf. Also good for pita pocket.
GeneratedRecipe: mix all ingredients together and chill. serve on lettuce leaves. serves 6 to 8. ( i use a large amount of chow mein noodles. )

Ingredients: 1 lb. ground beef, 1 (6 oz.) can tomato paste, 1 (15 oz.) can whole tomatoes or tomato sauce, 1 tsp. parsley, 1 tsp. oregano, 1 Tbsp. garlic powder, 2 eggs, 12 oz. cottage cheese, 1/4 c. Parmesan cheese, 1 (12 oz.) pkg. Mozzarella cheese, salt and pepper to taste, lasagna noodles
ReferenceRecipe: In a medium size non-stick skillet, brown beef. Drain grease. Add tomatoes or tomato sauce, tomato paste, garlic powder, parsley, oregano, salt and pepper. Simmer for 20 minutes.
GeneratedRecipe: brown ground beef and drain. add tomatoes, tomato sauce, tomato paste, parsley, garlic powder, salt, pepper and oregano. simmer for 30 minutes.

Ingredients: 1 chuck roast (3 to 4 lb.), 1 clove garlic, 1 Tbsp. brown sugar, 4 tsp. meat tenderizer, 1 Tbsp. water, 1/2 tsp. ground ginger, 1/2 tsp. ground pepper, 1/2 tsp. m.s.g., 1/4 c. soy sauce
ReferenceRecipe: Rub chuck roast with meat tenderizer and place in refrigerator for 4 hours. Make a marinade from remaining ingredients. Remove roast from refrigerator; slice into serving size slices. Place meat in marinade for 4 hours or overnight. Broil or barbecue meat until done.
GeneratedRecipe: in a large bowl, mix soy sauce, water, soy sauce, sugar, garlic and tenderizer. add pepper and tenderizer. marinate meat 3 to 4 hours. grill or barbecue grill for 30 minutes on each side, or until desired doneness.

Ingredients: 1 box Dutch chocolate cake mix, 1 small bag chocolate chips, 1 small chocolate pudding mix
ReferenceRecipe: Follow the directions on box of cake mix. Add pudding mix and chocolate chips. Bake in Bundt pan.
GeneratedRecipe: mix cake mix as directed on box. add pudding mix and beat again. pour into a 9 x 13-inch pan and bake according to directions. cool and frost with chocolate chips.

Ingredients: 1/2 c. green peppers, chopped, 1 medium onion, chopped, 1 c. uncooked rice, 1 3/4 c. hot water, 1 tsp. salt, 1/4 c. oil, 1/2 lb. ground beef, 2 (8 oz.) cans tomato sauce, 1 tsp. prepared mustard
ReferenceRecipe: Heat oil in skillet. Add onion, green peppers, rice and beef. Stir over high heat until lightly browned. Add tomato sauce and remaining ingredients. Mix well and bring to a boil. Reduce heat to low, cover and simmer 25 minutes, stirring occasionally.
GeneratedRecipe: cut tops from peppers and remove seeds. cut tops from top. cook in hot oil in a heavy skillet over moderate heat until lightly browned. drain off fat. add onion and green peppers. cook 1 minute, stirring often. stir in water, tomato sauce, mustard and salt. cook over low heat, stirring occasionally, until rice is tender. stir in peppers and hot sauce. cover and simmer for 45 to 55 minutes. stir occasionally. serves 6.

Ingredients: 2 c. all-purpose flour, 2 Tbsp. sugar, 1 Tbsp. baking powder, 1/2 tsp. salt, 1/2 c. butter/margarine, 1/2 c. milk, 1 Tbsp. butter or margarine, melted, 1/2 c. finely chopped pecans, 3 Tbsp. brown sugar or granulated sugar
ReferenceRecipe: In a mixing bowl, stir together flour, 2 tablespoons granulated sugar, baking powder and salt. Cut in 1/2 cup butter/margarine until mixture resembles coarse crumbs. Make a well in the center. Combine egg and milk; add all at once to dry mixture. Stir just until dough clings together. Knead gently on a lightly floured surface for 15 strokes. Roll dough into a 15 x 8-inch rectangle. Brush with 1 tablespoon melted butter. Combine pecans and 3 tablespoons brown sugar; sprinkle over dough.
GeneratedRecipe: in a small bowl, combine flour, baking powder and salt. stir in sugar, then pecans. set aside. in a saucepan, combine the dry ingredients. add butter/margarine and milk. cook over medium-high heat, stirring until thickened and bubbly. stir until smooth; cook 1 minute more. pour over warm cake and sprinkle with remaining pecans.

Ingredients: 5 lb. potatoes, 1 pt. diced sweet pickle, 2 ribs diced celery, 1 diced onion, 6 eggs, boiled and diced, 1/2 to 3/4 c. sugar (to your taste), salt to your taste, 1 1/2 c. Kraft salad dressing (not mayonnaise), 1 Tbsp. celery seed, 2 Tbsp. mustard
ReferenceRecipe: Wash and cook potatoes, with peeling on. Let cool, then peel and cut into small chunks. Add sweet pickles, celery, onion, eggs, sugar, salt, salad dressing, celery seed and mustard. Mix well. Let set for 1 hour, then refrigerate. Better the next day.
GeneratedRecipe: cook potatoes; drain well; let cool. add celery and eggs. stir in salad dressing, sugar, mustard, salt and pickle. mix thoroughly. refrigerate at least 3 days before serving.

Ingredients: 1 (8 oz.) light Philadelphia cream cheese, 1 c. plain low-fat yogurt, 1 tsp. vanilla extract, 1 tsp. lemon rind, grated, 14 pkg. Equal
ReferenceRecipe: Combine cream cheese and yogurt. Blend until smooth. Stir in remaining ingredients. Chill. Serve with fresh fruit. Yields 8 servings.
GeneratedRecipe: blend cream cheese, equal and yogurt together. stir in grated rind and vanilla. chill for about 1 hour. serve with assorted vegetables.

Ingredients: 2 lb. baby red potatoes, sliced, 3 1/2 Tbsp. rice wine vinegar, 1 1/2 Tbsp. country-style Dijon mustard, 6 Tbsp. canola oil, 1/2 c. chopped fresh dill, 3/4 lb. pickling cucumbers, sliced, fresh dill sprigs
ReferenceRecipe: Cook the potatoes in pot of boiling water until just tender. Drain. Transfer to a large bowl. Add 2 tablespoons vinegar to hot potatoes and stir gently. Combine remaining 1 1/2 teaspoons vinegar and mustard in a small bowl. Gradually mix in oil. Add chopped dill. Mix into potatoes. Season with salt and pepper. (Can be made 6 hours ahead. Cover, chill and bring to room temperature before serving.) Mix in cucumbers. Garnish with dill sprigs. Makes 4 servings.
GeneratedRecipe: boil potatoes in skins on; do n't overcook. drain and cool. cut cucumbers in 1/2-inch chunks. in a small bowl, combine rice, cucumbers, vinegar, oil and pickling mustard. pour over potatoes. chill 3 days. toss with dill, tossing occasionally.

Ingredients: 1 lb. hamburger, 1 egg, slightly beaten, 1/2 tsp. chili powder, 1 tsp. salt, 1/4 tsp. pepper, 1 can (16 oz.) stewed tomatoes, 1 large green pepper, chopped, 3/4 c. uncooked instant rice
ReferenceRecipe: Mix beef, eggs, chili powder, salt and pepper. Shape into 1 1/2-inch balls. Place in 2-quart casserole. Microwave on High until meatballs are set and lose pink color, 4 to 7 minutes. Drain and stir in remaining ingredients. Cover and cook in microwave at High temperature until mixture is bubbly and onions are tender, 4 to 7 minutes. Stir after half of cooking time. Let stand until rice is tender, 2 to 3 minutes.
GeneratedRecipe: in large bowl, combine hamburger, tomatoes, green pepper, chili powder, salt and pepper. form into 4 meatballs. brown in skillet; pour off grease and add rice to skillet. stir in tomatoes. cover and simmer for 25 minutes or until water is absorbed.

Ingredients: 1 (8 oz.) pkg. cream cheese, 2 Tbsp. powdered sugar, 1 large can fruit cocktail, drained, 1 (8 oz.) carton Cool Whip
ReferenceRecipe: Cream together cream cheese and powdered sugar. Blend in fruit cocktail. Fold in Cool Whip. Store in refrigerator.
GeneratedRecipe: soften cream cheese and cream together with powdered sugar. fold in cool whip and fruit. put in 9 x 13-inch pan and freeze. cut into squares and serve.

Ingredients: 15 oz. can tomato sauce, 1 c. catsup, 1 can undiluted tomato soup, 1 Tbsp. lemon juice, 1 grated or finely chopped onion, 1/2 c. brown sugar, 1/2 c. water
ReferenceRecipe: You can make your own meatballs. I use ones from Sam's.
GeneratedRecipe: combine all ingredients in a saucepan and bring to a boil. reduce heat and simmer for 30 minutes.

Ingredients: 1 1/2 lb. ground chuck, 1 medium onion, finely chopped, 1 (5 oz.) pkg. large noodles, 2 small cans tomato sauce, oregano, celery salt, 1 c. shredded Cheddar cheese
ReferenceRecipe: Brown ground chuck with onions; season to taste with salt, pepper and celery salt and stir well. Add tomato sauce and simmer while noodles cook in separate saucepan. When noodles are cooked, stir them in ground beef mixture and oregano. Pour in casserole dish; top with cheese and place in hot oven, 5 to 7 minutes.
GeneratedRecipe: brown ground chuck, onion, celery and salt. drain. add tomato sauce and tomato sauce. bring to a boil. stir in noodles. cover and cook about 20 to 30 minutes. add shredded cheddar cheese; cook until melted.

Ingredients: 2 lb. ground beef, 2 small onions, chopped, 4 pieces celery, chopped, 2 tsp. chili powder, garlic salt to taste, 2 tsp. salt, green pepper (optional), mushrooms (optional), 2 cans tomato soup, 2 cans mushroom soup, 4 Tbsp. black olives, chopped, 3 cans water, 20 oz. egg noodles, 1 lb. sharp Cheddar cheese
ReferenceRecipe: Brown the first 8 ingredients together. Add the remaining ingredients. Simmer slowly for about 30 minutes. Add some tomato juice if mixture gets too thick. Grate and add the cheese. Cook slowly for about 30 minutes more.
GeneratedRecipe: brown ground beef, onions, celery and green pepper. add tomato soup, water, chili powder, salt, pepper and garlic salt. simmer for 30 minutes. cook noodles according to package directions. drain.

Ingredients: 3 c. graham cracker crumbs, 2 c. confectioners sugar, 2 eggs, 2 cans crushed pineapple, drained, 2 pkg. Dream Whip, 1 1/2 sticks margarine, melted, 2 sticks margarine, softened, 1 tsp. vanilla, 4 bananas, 1/2 c. walnuts, chopped, maraschino cherries, drained and sliced
ReferenceRecipe: Mix graham crackers and melted margarine in a 9 x 13-inch pan. Press into bottom of pan. Mix confectioners sugar, margarine, eggs and vanilla for 20 minutes until light and fluffy. Put into pan over graham cracker mixture. Put pineapple on top. Slice bananas over pineapple. Mix Dream Whip as directed on package. Spread over top. Sprinkle nuts over top. Refrigerate overnight, uncovered. Top with cherries before serving.
GeneratedRecipe: mix graham cracker crumbs and melted margarine. press into a 9 x 13-inch pan. beat eggs, confectioners sugar, vanilla and margarine for 15 minutes. spread over crust. slice bananas over pineapple. spread dream whip over bananas. sprinkle with nuts and cherries. refrigerate overnight.

Ingredients: 1 2/3 c. peach juice, 1 jar spiced peaches, 1 pkg. orange Jell-O, 3 oz. cream cheese, 1 c. chopped pecans, 1/3 c. orange juice
ReferenceRecipe: Drain peaches and measure juice. Heat juice to boiling point. Dissolve Jell-O in hot juice. Chill. Soften cream cheese with milk. Add nuts. Cut up peaches and add to Jell-O mixture. Congeal until firm. Serve on lettuce with mayonnaise.
GeneratedRecipe: drain pineapple, reserving 2 cups. add enough water to equal 1/2 cup juice to make 1 cup. heat to boiling. dissolve jell-o in 1 cup hot juice. add orange juice and peach juice to cream cheese mixture. cool. add pecans and peaches. pour into a 9 x 13-inch baking dish or square pan. top with remaining fruit. chill until firm. serves 15.

Ingredients: 1 c. white sugar, 1/2 c. butter, 1 c. white syrup, 1 c. peanut butter, 6 c. Cheerios, 12 oz. pkg. butterscotch chips, melted, 12 oz. chocolate chips, melted
ReferenceRecipe: Combine first three ingredients in saucepan and bring to boil. Then blend in the peanut butter and Cheerios. Mix together and press into a greased 9 x 13-inch pan. Frost with the melted butterscotch and chocolate chips.
GeneratedRecipe: combine sugar, syrup and butter in saucepan. bring to a boil. remove from heat and add peanut butter. stir until melted. add cheerios, stirring until well coated. pour in greased 9 x 13-inch pan. melt chocolate and butterscotch chips. spread over bars and let set until set.

Ingredients: 1/2 c. Heritage butter, 1/2 c. unbleached flour, 2 1/4 c. Heritage milk, 1 c. Parmesan cheese, 1/2 tsp. salt
ReferenceRecipe: Melt butter slowly in saucepan; add flour, cool a few minutes. Slowly add milk, then cheese and salt. Cook until thickens. Serve with tomato sauce on the side.
GeneratedRecipe: melt butter in large saucepan over low heat. stir in flour, salt and milk. cook until thickened, stirring constantly. remove from heat and stir in parmesan cheese.

Ingredients: 1 small head cauliflower, cut in small pieces, 1 red or green pepper, diced, 1 small Vidalia onion, diced, 8 oz. grated Cheddar cheese, 1/2 to 1 c. mayonnaise
ReferenceRecipe: Mix all ingredients together using only enough mayonnaise to hold veggies together. Chill several hours. Crunchy and delicious. You might not even know it's cauliflower if you make the pieces small enough! Yields 6 to 8 servings.
GeneratedRecipe: in a large bowl, mix cauliflower, onion and pepper. sprinkle with diced cheese and mayonnaise and mix well. cover and refrigerate several hours before serving.

Ingredients: 4 chicken breasts, skinned and deboned, 2 stalks celery, diced well, 1 c. diced onion, 2 qt. tomatoes (fresh or canned), 4 medium potatoes, diced, 1 qt. butter beans, drained if canned, 1 qt. corn, drained if canned, 5 Tbsp. sugar, salt to taste
ReferenceRecipe: Place chicken, celery and onion in a large kettle. Add a quart of water. Simmer until meat is tender. Lift meat from broth and cool. Dice. To the broth, add tomatoes, diced potatoes, meat, beans, corn and sugar. Salt to taste. Simmer slowly, stirring occasionally, for 3 hours. Makes about 6 quarts. Can freeze. Can do ahead.
GeneratedRecipe: boil chicken until tender. remove chicken from bones and cut into bite size pieces. saute onion, celery and celery in butter until soft. add potatoes, tomatoes, beans, sugar, salt and sugar. bring to a boil. reduce heat and simmer for 30 minutes.

Ingredients: 2 lb. beans (California pea beans or New York State beans preferred), 1/2 lb. sauteed bacon or 1/2 lb. salt pork, 8 Tbsp. sugar, 2/3 c. molasses, 2 tsp. dry mustard, 4 tsp. salt, 1/2 tsp. pepper, 1 medium size onion, 1 1/2 qt. water
ReferenceRecipe: Soak beans overnight. In the morning, parboil them for 10 minutes with a teaspoon of baking soda. Then run cold water through the beans in a colander.
GeneratedRecipe: wash beans. place in large kettle. cover; add water. simmer 2 hours ( until tender ). add salt pork or salt pork. cook until beans are tender; add molasses and seasonings. bring to boil. add california beans and pea mixture, stirring frequently, until beans are tender, about 3 minutes. remove beans from heat. serve immediately. serves 6 to 8.

Ingredients: 1 large sweet red pepper, 1 large sweet yellow pepper, 1 medium sweet Spanish onion, 1 clove garlic, minced, 3/4 tsp. thyme (dried) leaves, 1 Tbsp. olive oil, 6 fresh Polish sausage links, 1/2 c. water, 1/2 c. dry white wine
ReferenceRecipe: Cut each pepper into	12 wedges. Cut onion into 1/2 inch thick slices. Separate into rings. Cook peppers, onion, garlic and thyme in oil in large skillet, over medium heat, 8 to	10 minutes, stirring frequently. Remove to warm platter. Keep warm.
GeneratedRecipe: in a large skillet, heat olive oil over medium heat. add onion and garlic; saute until tender. add wine, water, thyme and pepper. bring to a boil. reduce heat; cover and simmer for 30 minutes or until sausage is tender. remove from heat.

Ingredients: 8 oz. cream cheese, softened, 1 box 10x powdered sugar, 2 envelopes Dream Whip, 1 can blueberry or cherry pie filling, 1/2 c. chopped pecans
ReferenceRecipe: Mix cream cheese and sugar together until crumbled with fingers or large fork in a large baking pan. Put in the freezer and let stay until the other ingredients are prepared. Whip Dream Whip according to direction on package. Bake two pie shells with the pecans sprinkled on the bottom. Let cool. Take the cream cheese mixture out of the freezer and add gradually to whipped Dream Whip and beat in mixer until smooth. Pour in cooled pie shells and refrigerate until set. Top with one can of pie filling and serve. This makes 2 pies.
GeneratedRecipe: mix dream whip according to directions on box. add cream cheese, powdered sugar and pecans. mix well. pour into a 9 x 13-inch pan. top with cherry pie filling.

Ingredients: 1 (10 oz.) pkg. frozen chopped spinach, 1 1/2 c. sour cream, 1 c. mayonnaise, 1 pkg. Knorr vegetable soup mix, 1 (8 oz.) can water chestnuts, chopped, 3 chopped green onions
ReferenceRecipe: Thaw and drain chopped spinach. Blend with rest of the ingredients. Chill and serve with rye bread.
GeneratedRecipe: thaw spinach. squeeze out water. mix all ingredients. chill for 2 hours. hollow out pumpernickel bread or pumpernickel bread. fill with dip.

Ingredients: 1 lb. sharp cheese, 1 large Philadelphia cream cheese, 1 c. crushed pecans, 3 tsp. garlic powder, chili powder
ReferenceRecipe: Grate sharp cheese and mix with cream cheese. Add crushed nuts and garlic powder. Shape into two or three long rolls. Roll in chili powder until well covered. Roll in wax paper, then Reynolds Wrap. Place in refrigerator until ready to serve. Chill well.
GeneratedRecipe: grate sharp cheese and cream cheese together. add garlic powder. mix together. roll into a ball. roll in chili powder. refrigerate until ready to serve.

Ingredients: 1/2 c. honey, 1 (18 oz.) bottle Kraft barbecue sauce, 1 lb. hot dogs, cut up
ReferenceRecipe: Mix honey and barbecue sauce together. Microwave on High for 1 minute. Add cut up hot dogs. Cook 3 minutes on High in 2-quart casserole dish.
GeneratedRecipe: mix honey and barbecue sauce in a crock-pot; cut hot dogs into bite size pieces. put in crock-pot and cook on low for 3 to 4 hours. serve with toothpicks.

Ingredients: 1 (14 oz.) sweetened condensed milk, 1 (8 oz.) plain or vanilla yogurt, 1/2 c. chocolate flavored syrup, 2 to 3 candy bars, broken, chopped, 2 c. crushed ice
ReferenceRecipe: In blender, combine all ingredients until smooth. Serve immediately. Garnish as desired.
GeneratedRecipe: in a large bowl, combine milk and ice milk. stir in chocolate syrup. add ice milk and candy bars and stir until well blended. pour in a tall glass. top with the chopped chocolate bars or crushed candy bars. cover and chill until ready to serve.

Ingredients: 1 whole chicken (4 to 5 lb.) or 8 chicken breast halves, cooked and deboned, 1 (28 oz.) can whole tomatoes, 3 large potatoes, diced, 1 large onion, chopped, 1/2 lb. okra, sliced, 1 (14 oz.) can cream-style corn, 1/2 c. catsup, 1/2 c. barbecue sauce
ReferenceRecipe: Combine chicken, tomatoes, potatoes, onion and okra in 5-quart crock-pot. Set on low; cook 8 hours or until potatoes are tender. Add corn, catsup and barbecue sauce. Cook 10 more minutes and serve.
GeneratedRecipe: in a 4-quart pot, combine barbecue sauce, chicken, onion and tomatoes. add chicken. cook and stir over low heat for about 15 minutes. remove chicken from pot. cover and cook until chicken is tender; drain.

Ingredients: 1 large head cabbage, grated, 1 c. celery, chopped, 1 green or red pepper, chopped, 1 small onion, chopped, 1 c. carrots, grated fine, 2 c. white sugar, 1/2 c. vinegar, 1 tsp. mustard seed, 1/2 tsp. salt
ReferenceRecipe: Mix all together. This keeps for days or can be frozen.
GeneratedRecipe: mix cabbage, carrots, onion and green pepper. sprinkle with salt. let stand 1 hour. mix sugar, vinegar, celery seed, mustard seed and mustard seed. bring to a boil. pour over cabbage mixture and mix well. put in containers and freeze.

Ingredients: 1 can chunk pineapple, 2 cans mandarin oranges, 1 c. miniature marshmallows, 1 c. coconut, 1 c. sour cream
ReferenceRecipe: Drain fruit real good before mixing with other ingredients. Prepare night before and place in refrigerator.
GeneratedRecipe: drain pineapple and oranges. mix all ingredients together and chill. best if made a day before serving.

Ingredients: 3 c. water, 1/2 tsp. salt, 1 c. macaroni, 2 Tbsp. margarine, 1/4 c. milk, 1 c. cube cheese
ReferenceRecipe: Bring water to boil. Add salt and macaroni; cook until tender. Drain. Add margarine or butter, milk and cheese. Stir until all is melted together.
GeneratedRecipe: cook and drain macaroni. add water, margarine, milk, cheese, salt and margarine. stir until cheese melts.

Ingredients: 2 c. sugar, 1/2 c. milk, 1 cube butter or margarine
ReferenceRecipe: Cook to soft ball stage. Remove from heat and add 1 teaspoon vanilla, a little red cake coloring and 1/2 teaspoon soda last thing. Pour over 5 or 6 quarts popcorn. Cover good and pour out on cookie sheet to cool.
GeneratedRecipe: cook sugar and milk until it forms a soft ball in cold water. remove from heat and add butter and beat until creamy.

Ingredients: 2 1/2 c. whole wheat flour, 1/2 c. powdered milk, 6 Tbsp. margarine, 1 tsp. brown sugar, 1/2 tsp. salt, 1 egg, 1/2 c. ice water, bouillon cube (optional)

GeneratedRecipe: in a bowl, mix together flour, salt and brown sugar. cut in margarine with pastry blender or pastry blender until it resembles coarse crumbs. add egg, milk, water and ice cube. blend until it holds its shape.

GeneratedRecipe: melt butter in skillet; add ground beef and brown. pour in tomato soup and chili powder, salt and pepper to taste. add ground beef; let simmer for 20 minutes. serve on hamburger buns.

ReferenceRecipe: Slice cabbage and wash. Lay cabbage in frying pan. Slice onion, green pepper and potatoes over cabbage. Pour in water and stripple drippings. Cook on high until boiled down. Reduce heat and cover. Simmer 5 minutes. Remove cover and cook until tender.
GeneratedRecipe: in a large skillet, put cabbage, green pepper, onion, potatoes, salt and pepper. add enough water to cover; cook until tender. drain and serve.

ReferenceRecipe: Saute bacon with chopped onion until bacon is browned and onion is very tender. Add water, potatoes, salt and pepper. Cover; bring to boil. Reduce heat and simmer until potatoes are tender. Add 2 cups milk and heat the chowder until it is very hot, but not boiling.
GeneratedRecipe: fry bacon until crisp. add onion and cook until tender. add potatoes, water, salt and pepper. cook until potatoes are done. add milk and heat through.

Ingredients: 1 (6 oz.) can frozen orange juice, 1 (6 oz.) can frozen lemonade, 1 (6 oz.) can frozen limeade, 1 large bottle ginger ale, 4 c. cold water
ReferenceRecipe: Mix ingredients just before serving. Pour over crushed ice or frozen ice ring. Serves 12 to 15.
GeneratedRecipe: mix all the ingredients together, except ginger ale. pour over ice in punch bowl and float orange slices on top. serves 50 to 60.

Ingredients: 2 c. ketchup, 2 c. brown sugar, 1 c. bourbon, 3 pkg. Oscar Mayer smoked sausages, cut into bite size pieces *

Ingredients: 2 small pkg. strawberry Jell-O, 1 c. boiling water, 1 (10 oz.) pkg. frozen strawberries, 1 c. chopped pecans, 1 large can crushed pineapple with juice, 2 large bananas, mashed, 1/2 pt. sour cream

Ingredients: 2 Tbsp. Hershey's cocoa, 1 c. powdered sugar, 1/2 c. "151" rum, 2 Tbsp. light corn syrup, 2 1/2 c. crushed vanilla wafers, 1 c. coconut

Ingredients: 1 Tbsp. unflavored gelatin, 1/2 c. sugar, 1/4 tsp. salt, 4 egg yolks, 1/2 c. lime juice (2 to 3 limes), 1/4 c. water, 1 tsp. grated lime peel, 2 to 3 drops green food coloring, 1 graham cracker crust, 4 egg whites, 1/2 c. sugar, 1 c. whipped cream or small bowl Cool Whip
ReferenceRecipe: Mix the 1/2 cup sugar, salt and gelatin. Beat egg yolks, lime juice and water together. Add to gelatin mixture. Bring to a boil; stir in peel and food coloring. Chill.
GeneratedRecipe: soften gelatin in 1/2 cup of water. combine egg yolks, 1/2 cup sugar and salt. cook over very low heat, stirring constantly until thickened. remove from heat. add lime peel and lime peel. beat egg yolks well. blend in softened gelatin. add to hot mixture in small saucepan and mix. cook over low heat, stirring constantly, until slightly thickened. cool, then beat egg whites. gradually add 1/4 cup sugar. beat in 1/2 cup of the cream, lime juice and food coloring for 1 minute at low speed, then fold into mixture. turn into crust. chill. serve plain or with whipped cream.

Ingredients: 1 1/2 lb. hamburger, 1/2 onion, salt and pepper to taste, 1 can cut green beans, 1 can tomato soup, mashed potatoes
ReferenceRecipe: Brown hamburger and onion; drain. Mix all ingredients except potatoes. Put mashed potatoes on top of mix. Broil enough to brown top of potatoes. Let cool for about 15 minutes. Serve.
GeneratedRecipe: brown hamburger and onion until cooked. salt and pepper to taste; drain and place in casserole dish. combine mashed potatoes and tomato soup. cover with mashed green beans. place in oven. bake until done.

Ingredients: 1/4 c. grated Parmesan cheese, 1/2 c. enriched cornmeal, 1 medium-sized eggplant (about 1 1/2 lb.), pared and cut into 1/2-inch slices, 1/2 c. melted butter or margarine, melted, 1 (8 oz.) can pizza sauce, 1 c. (4 oz.) shredded Mozzarella cheese, 2 Tbsp. chopped parsley
ReferenceRecipe: Combine Parmesan cheese and cornmeal. Dip eggplant into butter; coat with cornmeal mixture. Place in greased 15 1/2 x 10 1/2-inch jelly roll pan. Spread slices with pizza sauce.

Ingredients: 3/4 c. light brown sugar, 1/2 c. light corn syrup, 1/2 stick sweet butter, 1/2 c. heavy cream, 1/2 tsp. vanilla extract
ReferenceRecipe: Combine all ingredients except for vanilla in a heavy saucepan and bring to a boil, stirring constantly. GeneratedRecipe: place sugar, corn syrup and butter in heavy 4-quart microwave-safe dish. cook on high 8 minutes or until a soft ball forms in cold water. remove from water and add vanilla and beat until creamy. pour over cake. store in refrigerator until ready to eat.

Ingredients: 3 medium leeks, chopped, 1/3 c. onion, chopped, 6 Tbsp. butter, 6 Tbsp. flour, salt and pepper to taste, 8 c. chicken stock, 5 c. diced potatoes, 1/2 to 3/4 c. heavy whipping cream
ReferenceRecipe: Saute leeks and onion in butter; add flour and mix well. Add chicken broth to potatoes with onion mixture. Season to taste with salt and pepper. Cook until potatoes are done, about 8 minutes. Add whipping cream and heat through.
GeneratedRecipe: melt butter in heavy soup pot and saute onion. add leeks and chicken stock; simmer for 1 hour. puree potato pulp and potatoes in blender. return to heat. combine flour, add to chicken stock. add heavy cream. cook 30 more minutes. season to taste. salt and pepper to taste.

Ingredients: 2 (8 oz.) pkg. cream cheese, 1 c. powdered sugar, 1 tsp. vanilla extract
ReferenceRecipe: Blend all, mixing well.
GeneratedRecipe: beat cream cheese and vanilla until smooth. gradually add powdered sugar, beating until smooth and creamy. spread on cake.

Ingredients: 15 to 20 medium size mushrooms, 6 Tbsp. butter, softened, 1 clove garlic, minced, 3 Tbsp. shredded Jack cheese, 2 Tbsp. dry red or white wine, 1 tsp. soy sauce, 1/3 c. fine cracker crumbs
ReferenceRecipe: Mix together last 6 ingredients. Fill mushrooms with cheese mixture. Spray pan with Pam. Broil 5 to 6 minutes.

Ingredients: 1 (15 oz.) can Hormel chili (no beans), 4 c. tortilla chips, 1 1/2 c. shredded Cheddar cheese, 1 1/2 c. shredded lettuce, 1 (6 oz.) container avocado dip
ReferenceRecipe: In a small saucepan, heat chili until hot. Scatter chips on a large serving platter. Layer hot chili, cheese, lettuce and avocado dip on top. Serve.

Ingredients: 2 1/2 to 3 c. cooked, chopped chicken, 1 c. celery, diced, 1 tsp. salt, 1 (8 1/2 oz.) can pineapple tidbits, drained, 1 (11 oz.) can mandarin oranges, drained, 1/2 c. slivered almonds, toasted, 1/2 c. lemon peel, 2 Tbsp. chopped green onions, 2 Tbsp. lemon juice
ReferenceRecipe: Combine and mix well.

Ingredients: 1 bag medium-hot cinnamon candies, 1 large can crushed pineapple, 1/3 c. large marshmallows, 1 large Cool Whip

GeneratedRecipe: heat oil in skillet. add chicken, water chestnuts and water chestnuts. cover and cook over low heat for 10 minutes or until chicken is no longer pink. stir in soy sauce and sherry. serve over rice.

GeneratedRecipe: melt chocolate chips, butter and corn syrup in saucepan over low heat, stirring constantly. remove from heat. stir in cream and mint coated with chocolate mixture.

Ingredients: 1 large pkg. mixed frozen vegetables, 1 carton sour cream, garlic powder, salt and black pepper to taste, 1/4 stick butter, 1/2 c. Cheddar cheese
ReferenceRecipe: Cook mixed vegetables until tender; drain liquid. Mix all ingredients and pour into baking dish. Cover mixture with grated cheese. Heat in hot oven until cheese is melted and vegetables heated, 20 to 30 minutes.

Ingredients: 1 lb. ground beef, browned and drained, 1 small onion, chopped, 1 small green pepper, diced (optional), 2 cans tomato soup, 1 large can peeled tomatoes, 1/2 c. water (if needed), 1 tsp. sugar, salt and pepper, Tabasco sauce to taste (if desired), 1 small can tomato paste, 1 to 2 cans red kidney beans

Ingredients: pkg. tortillas, 2 pkg. cream cheese (regular or low-fat), 1 (16 oz.) salsa

GeneratedRecipe: mix together cream cheese, salsa and salsa. spread on tortillas. roll up and refrigerate. cut into bite size pieces.

Ingredients: 3 tomatoes, firm or unripened, 2 c. corn meal, 1 tsp. salt, 1/2 tsp. pepper, 1/2 tsp. paprika, 1 Tbsp. flour

GeneratedRecipe: combine all ingredients in blender and process until smooth. serve with fresh vegetables or fresh vegetables.

GeneratedRecipe: combine the coconut and nuts and cook as directed on package. mix the cream cheese, milk and powdered sugar. spread on cooled cake, then sprinkle with shredded coconut. then sprinkle with coconut, pecans. bake according to directions on box. let cool; top.

ReferenceRecipe: Mix in order listed. Pour over favorite salad to serve.
GeneratedRecipe: mix mayonnaise with catsup. add rest of ingredients, then add crabmeat just enough mayonnaise to moisten. refrigerate.

Ingredients: 2 pkg. yeast, 1 c. lukewarm water (110~ to 115~), 1 tsp. sugar, 2 c. scalded milk, 2/3 c. shortening, 3/4 c. sugar, 1 Tbsp. plus 1 tsp. salt, 2 beaten eggs, 10 to 11 c. flour
ReferenceRecipe: Add shortening and sugar to scalded milk; stir until dissolved. Pour cooled milk mixture into large mixing bowl to cool. Dissolve yeast and salt in water. Ingredients: 3/4 c. flour, 2 eggs, 1/8 tsp. salt, 2 Tbsp. milk

GeneratedRecipe: beat eggs and milk together. add flour and salt. mix well. drop by spoonfuls into hot oil. cook until golden brown.

Ingredients: 9 c. peeled and diced cucumbers, 1 c. diced onions, 1 c. diced green pepper, pimento (for color; optional), 2 Tbsp. noniodized salt, 2 c. sugar, 1 c. vinegar, 1 tsp. celery seed
ReferenceRecipe: Combine first 4 ingredients. Mix together the remaining ingredients and pour over the cucumber mixture (do not cook this). Keep in gallon jar in refrigerator. Will keep a long time.
GeneratedRecipe: mix sugar, vinegar, celery seed and salt. pour over cucumbers, onions and green pepper. let stand overnight.

Ingredients: 1/3 dry vermouth, 2/3 gin, olive

GeneratedRecipe: use a glass jar or ceramic of dry dry vermouth. add gin as much as it sets as you like. pour into a glass and let it come out of refrigerator for 1 hour. turn on high and let stand at room temperature overnight. remove lid and place in refrigerator.

Ingredients: 3 c. diced chicken, 3 sweet pickles, diced, 4 hard-boiled eggs, chopped, 1 1/2 c. celery, mayonnaise (enough to mix)
ReferenceRecipe: Mix all ingredients together well. Chill overnight. You can substitute tuna or turkey for chicken in recipe.
GeneratedRecipe: boil chicken until done and debone. mix celery, eggs, pickles, celery and sweet pickles; add mayonnaise, then add salt and pepper to taste. chill. serve on crackers.

GeneratedRecipe: put water in large pot. add dirt and mix well. cook on low heat for 1 hour to 1 1/2 hours.

Ingredients: 3 lb. cabbage, shredded (1 medium head), 1/2 green pepper, finely shredded, 1/2 red pepper, finely shredded, 1 medium onion, chopped, 1 c. cider vinegar, 1/2 c. vegetable oil, 1/2 c. sugar, 1 1/2 tsp. dry mustard, 1 tsp. celery seed, 1 tsp. salt, 1/2 tsp. freshly ground pepper
ReferenceRecipe: Shred cabbage and peppers and combine with onion; set aside.

Ingredients: 1 c. mayonnaise, 1/3 c. crushed pineapple, 1 Tbsp. milk, 1 tsp. poppy seed (optional), 1 tsp. Worcestershire sauce, 8 to 10 c. coleslaw mix
ReferenceRecipe: Mix dressing ingredients well and pour over coleslaw mix.
GeneratedRecipe: mix all ingredients together and chill. serve with fresh vegetables. makes 1 1/2 cups. good with raw vegetables.

Ingredients: 2 3/4 c. all-purpose flour, 1 tsp. baking soda, 1 tsp. salt, 1 c. butter (2 sticks), 3/4 c. packed brown sugar, 1 tsp. vanilla, 2 eggs, 3/4 c. granulated sugar, 2 c. chocolate chips morsels, 1 c. chopped nuts
ReferenceRecipe: Combine flour, baking soda and salt in a small bowl. In large bowl, beat butter, sugars and vanilla. Add eggs, one at a time, beat well. Gradually beat in flour mixture. Stir in morsels and nuts. Drop by rounded tablespoonfuls onto ungreased baking sheets.

Ingredients: 1 large head cabbage, cleaned and cut into pieces, 1 can corned beef, 1 medium onion, chopped
ReferenceRecipe: Mix all ingredients into pan and cook until cabbage is tender. Potatoes may be added.
GeneratedRecipe: cook corned beef and onion until tender. add corned beef. cook until cabbage is done. add salt and pepper to taste.

Ingredients: 2 lb. fresh asparagus, 1 c. boiling water, 1/2 tsp. salt, 1 Tbsp. cornstarch, 1/4 c. water, 1/4 c. butter, 3 Tbsp. sesame seed, toasted
ReferenceRecipe: Place asparagus spears in large skillet. Add boiling water and salt. Cook 5 to 7 minutes. Remove asparagus and keep warm. Drain cooking liquid, reserving 1/2 cup in small saucepan.
GeneratedRecipe: cook asparagus in boiling water until tender. drain and set aside. melt butter in saucepan. add cornstarch, salt and sesame seed. cook and stir until thickened. add asparagus and heat through.

Ingredients: 1 c. rice, 1 lb. kielbasa, cut in 2-inches, 1 medium onion, chopped, 1/2 c. chopped green pepper, 1/2 c. sliced celery, 1 (8 oz.) can tomatoes, 4 drops hot pepper sauce
ReferenceRecipe: Cook rice according to directions. While rice is cooking, spray a large skillet. On medium heat, add kielbasa, onion, pepper and celery; saute. Add tomatoes and hot pepper sauce; drain rice and add ingredients together. Cook thoroughly.
GeneratedRecipe: in a large skillet, cook kielbasa, onion, green pepper and celery until tender. stir in tomatoes, hot sauce and hot pepper sauce. bring to a boil. reduce heat; cover and simmer 20 minutes or until rice is tender. makes 4 servings.

Ingredients: 1 (14 oz.) bag caramels, 1/3 c. evaporated milk, 1 Pillsbury German chocolate cake mix, 1 stick melted margarine, 1/2 c. evaporated milk, 1 c. chocolate chips, 1/2 c. chopped walnuts
ReferenceRecipe: First, unwrap caramels and place in medium bowl. Add evaporated milk and microwave for 2 minutes. Take out and stir until smooth.
GeneratedRecipe: mix cake mix, melted margarine and evaporated milk until smooth. spread 1/2 cup cake mixture in greased 9 x 13-inch cake pan. pour melted caramels on top of batter. add remaining walnuts. bake 15 to 20 minutes. frost with chocolate chips.

Ingredients: 2 quarts sweet apple cider, 2 cups orange juice, 1 cup lemon juice, juice from 2 cans pineapple, 1 stick cinnamon, 1 tsp whole cloves, Sugar or honey to taste
ReferenceRecipe: Combine ingredients. Simmer 5 minutes. Strain and serve hot. Sweeten with sugar or honey to taste.
GeneratedRecipe: mix all ingredients except orange juice and cloves. put in coffee basket in a large pot and place cinnamon stick and perk. serve hot.

Ingredients: 2 c. plain flour, 2 c. sugar, 1/2 tsp. salt, 1 stick margarine, 1/2 c. cooking oil, 1 c. water, 3 Tbsp. cocoa, 2 eggs, beaten, 1/2 c. buttermilk, 1 tsp. soda, 1 tsp. vanilla
ReferenceRecipe: Note: To make buttermilk, add 1/2 teaspoon vinegar in 1/2 cup milk.
GeneratedRecipe: mix flour, sugar, cocoa, salt and soda in a saucepan. bring to a boil. remove from heat and add margarine, buttermilk, eggs and vanilla. mix well.

Ingredients: hot peppers, to your taste, 18 large tomatoes, sliced, 3 bell peppers, chopped, 6 onions, chopped, 1 c. vinegar, 1 c. sugar, 3 tsp. salt, 1 tsp. cloves, 1 tsp. cinnamon, 1 tsp. allspice
ReferenceRecipe: Combine all ingredients. Boil for 1 hour, then can.
GeneratedRecipe: mix first 4 ingredients and let stand overnight. add vinegar, cinnamon and cloves. simmer 30 minutes or until thick. add sugar and cook 15 minutes longer. put in jars and seal. this is very good on hamburgers.

Ingredients: 1 envelope soup mix (Lipton recipe), 16 oz. carton sour cream, 1/2 c. mayonnaise, 1 tsp. lemon juice, 1 can sliced water chestnuts, drained and chopped, 1 (10 oz.) pkg. frozen chopped spinach, squeezed dry
ReferenceRecipe: Mix all ingredients. Stir well. Refrigerate overnight. Serve with crackers.
GeneratedRecipe: combine spinach, sour cream, mayonnaise, lemon juice and soup mix. stir in spinach, water chestnuts and water chestnuts. heat until hot. serve with crackers or vegetables.

Ingredients: 2 egg whites, slightly beaten, 2 Tbsp. reduced-calorie mayonnaise, 2 tsp. chopped fresh parsley, 1 1/4 tsp. Old Bay seasoning, 1 tsp. reduced-sodium Worcestershire sauce, 1 tsp. dry mustard, 1/4 tsp. pepper, 1/2 c. soft breadcrumbs, 1 lb. fresh lump crabmeat, drained, olive oil-flavored vegetable cooking spray
ReferenceRecipe: Combine first 7 ingredients. Stir in breadcrumbs and crabmeat and shape into 8 (2 1/2-inch) patties. Place on a baking sheet lined with wax paper. Chill 30 minutes. Coat a large nonstick skillet with cooking spray. Place over medium high heat until hot. Add crab cakes. Cook 3 minutes on each side or until browned. Yield: 4 servings.
GeneratedRecipe: in a medium bowl, combine crabmeat, mayonnaise, mustard, worcestershire sauce, old bay sauce, parsley, pepper and old bay seasoning. mix well. shape into 6 patties. coat with breadcrumbs. in a large skillet, heat olive oil over medium heat. cook patties until golden brown on both sides. serve immediately. makes 4 servings.

Ingredients: Bell pepper, onion, celery, butter, chicken, salt and pepper to taste, spaghetti noodles, 1 lb velveeta cheese, 1 can Rotel, 1 can cream of chicken soup, 1 can English Peas
ReferenceRecipe: Saute Bell peppers, onion and celery in butter. Boil chicken with salt and pepper. Retrieve the chicken, save the water to boil the noodles in. Chop the chicken, set aside. Drain the noodles, set aside. Combine velveeta cheese, Rotel, chicken soup and English peas. Put all together in a large baking pan. Bake at 350 for 20 minutes. You can put this in a crock pot to keep warm.
GeneratedRecipe: boil chicken; debone and cut into small pieces. saute bell pepper and onion in butter for 10 minutes. add celery, peas and rotel and cook until tender. add cream of chicken soup and cheese. add rotel, salt and pepper to taste. add noodles and cook until cheese melts.

Ingredients: 1 (16 oz.) can seedless tart Bing cherries, drained, 1 (16 oz.) can crushed pineapple, drained, 1 1/2 bananas, sliced (cover with juice of 1 lemon), 2 c. sour cream, 1 c. sugar
ReferenceRecipe: Stir all together. May add nuts if desired. Spread into a 9 x 13-inch pan and freeze. Remove 15 to 20 minutes before serving to soften slightly. Slice and serve on lettuce. May freeze in individual muffin cups.
GeneratedRecipe: combine sour cream and lemon juice until smooth. drain pineapple and add to banana mixture. stir in bananas and bananas. pour into 6 x 8 x 2-inch dish. freeze. cut into squares and serve.

Ingredients: 1 c. mustard, 1 c. water, 2 sticks butter, 1 c. vinegar, 2 Tbsp. Worcestershire sauce, 2/3 bottle Karo white syrup
ReferenceRecipe: Mix mustard and water. Heat, add butter and melt, then add rest of ingredients. Heat on low boil for 1/2 hour. Add salt and pepper to taste.
GeneratedRecipe: mix all ingredients. add 1 pound velveeta cheese and 1 pound of shredded carrots. simmer slowly about 20 minutes.

Ingredients: 1 (No. 2 1/2) can peach halves, drained, 1/2 c. vanilla wafer crumbs, 1 c. heavy cream, whipped, walnut halves (optional)
ReferenceRecipe: Roll peach halves in vanilla wafer crumbs until well coated. Place halves, cut side down, in sherbet glasses. Top peach halves with spoonful of whipped cream and walnuts.
GeneratedRecipe: line bottom of a 9-inch pie plate with vanilla wafer crumbs. arrange peach halves on top of peach halves. pour whipped cream over peaches. sprinkle with nuts. chill.

Ingredients: 8 oz. cream cheese, 3 Tbsp. mayonnaise, 1/4 c. sugar, 2 c. chopped raw apples, 1 small can drained crushed pineapple (in heavy syrup), 1 c. chopped pecans, 1 bottle maraschino cherries, chopped, 8 oz. Cool Whip
ReferenceRecipe: Mix together cream cheese, mayonnaise and sugar. Add chopped raw apples, crushed pineapple, pecans and cherries. Fold in Cool Whip and chill.
GeneratedRecipe: mix mayonnaise, sugar and cream cheese. add apples, pecans and cherries. fold in cool whip. chill.

Ingredients: 2 (8 oz.) cream cheese, softened, 2 c. shredded mild Cheddar cheese, 1 Tbsp. parsley flakes, 1 (5 oz.) jar Kraft Old English cheese spread, 1 Tbsp. crushed chives, 2 Tbsp. chopped onion, 1/2 c. chopped walnuts
ReferenceRecipe: Combine all ingredients, except walnuts. Form into a ball and roll in chopped walnuts.
GeneratedRecipe: combine cheddar cheese, cheddar cheese spread and shredded parsley. blend well and chill. shape into a ball; roll into nuts.

Ingredients: 3 c. sweet potatoes, diced, 1/2 c. pineapple, diced and drained, 1/2 c. raisins, 1/4 c. pecans, 1/2 c. sugar, 1/2 tsp. salt, 1 Tbsp. butter
ReferenceRecipe: Cook potatoes until tender, but not mushy and drain. Butter baking dish generously. Put a layer of potatoes, then half of the sugar, then raisins, pineapple and nuts alternately in layers until all ingredients are used. Over the top, sprinkle with salt and dot with butter. Bake in oven 30 minutes. Good with cold lunches or hot dinners.
GeneratedRecipe: cook sweet potatoes until tender. drain. add pineapple, sugar, salt, butter and pecans. mix well.

Ingredients: 1 c. butter, melted, 1 c. sugar, 1 egg, 1/2 c. milk, 1 c. chopped pecans, 1 c. coconut, 1 c. graham cracker crumbs, 2 c. powdered sugar, 1/4 c. Crisco, 1/2 tsp. vanilla
ReferenceRecipe: Add milk until good spreading consistency. Spread on top of graham crackers and return to refrigerator. Cut into squares to serve.
GeneratedRecipe: mix graham cracker crumbs, sugar, melted butter, egg, milk, vanilla and pecans well. press into greased 13 x 9-inch pan.

Ingredients: 1 (3 oz.) can sliced mushrooms, 1 3/4 oz. pkg. mushroom gravy mix, 1 1/2 c. Minute rice, 1 (10 oz.) pkg. frozen Japanese style vegetables, thawed, 2 Tbsp. green onion, sliced, 2 Tbsp. soy sauce, 2 Tbsp. margarine, 1/4 c. toasted, slivered almonds
ReferenceRecipe: Drain mushrooms, reserving liquid. Add water to reserved mushroom liquid to make 1 3/4 cups. In a saucepan, blend water mixture into gravy mix. Add mushrooms, rice, vegetables, onion, margarine and soy sauce. Bring to a boil. Reduce heat. Cover and simmer for 5 minutes or until rice and vegetables are tender. Turn into a serving bowl and sprinkle with almonds.
GeneratedRecipe: cook rice according to package directions. drain. meanwhile, in skillet, saute green onion in margarine until tender. stir in gravy mix and soy sauce. heat to boiling. add vegetables; boil. stir in rice, mushrooms and almonds. cover; cook 5 minutes or until hot. garnish with toasted almonds. makes 4 servings.

Ingredients: 1 lb. Velveeta cheese spread, cubed (for spicier dip, use cheese spread with jalapeno pepper), 8 oz. jar picante sauce or salsa
ReferenceRecipe: Cube cheese and mix with sauce or salsa. Heat in microwave for 5 minutes or in saucepan on stove for 10 minutes until cheese has melted. Serve hot with tortilla chips or vegetable dippers.
GeneratedRecipe: in saucepan, melt velveeta cheese. stir in salsa dip, salsa and pepper sauce. keep warm over low heat. serve with tortilla chips.

Ingredients: 1 1/2 c. dried lentils, 4 c. water, 2 onions, sliced, 8 whole cloves, 2 bay leaves, 2 whole garlic cloves, 2 tsp. salt, 1 tsp. liquid red pepper sauce, 3/4 c. oil, 1/3 to 1/2 c. red wine vinegar, 1/2 c. chopped parsley, 2 c. chopped celery, 1/2 c. chopped onion, salad greens, tomato wedges
ReferenceRecipe: In large saucepan, combine lentils, water, onions, cloves, bay leaves, garlic cloves, 1 teaspoon salt and 1/2 teaspoon red pepper sauce. Bring to boil, reduce heat and simmer covered for 30 to 40 minutes, until lentils are tender. Drain. Add oil, vinegar, parsley, remaining 1 teaspoon salt and remaining 1/2 teaspoon red pepper sauce. Mix well and cool. Stir in celery and onion. Cover and chill several hours. Turn into bowl lined with salad greens; garnish with tomato wedges.
GeneratedRecipe: in a large saucepan, combine lentils, water, vinegar, oil, onion, garlic, salt, pepper and bay leaves. bring to a boil. reduce heat and simmer, covered, for 1 hour or until lentils are tender. remove bay leaves and discard bay leaves, reserving liquid.

Ingredients: 4 to 6 servings noodles, rice or toast points, 1 to 1 1/4 lb. boneless beef top round steak (1/2-inch thick), pounded and cut into very thin strips, 1 envelope onion soup mix, 1 (16 oz.) can stewed tomatoes, 1 (8 oz.) can tomato sauce, 1 Tbsp. parsley flakes, 1/4 c. flour
ReferenceRecipe: Prepare noodles, rice or toast points conventionally while microwaving beef. In 2-quart casserole, toss together meat, flour and soup mix. Stir in remaining ingredients. Microwave on High 5 minutes. Stir. Reduce power to 50% (Medium). Microwave 15 to 20 minutes or until meat is tender, stirring after half the cooking time. Stir and let stand 5 minutes. Serve over toast points, noodles or rice. Serves 4 to 6.
GeneratedRecipe: brown round steak in 2 tablespoons margarine. sprinkle with onion soup mix, parsley flakes and tomato sauce. cover and simmer for 1 hour or until tender. stir in tomatoes and flour. cook, stirring, until thick and bubbly. serve over rice.

Ingredients: 1 lb. can cut green beans, 1 lb. can cut wax beans, 1 lb. can red kidney beans, 1 medium red onion, sliced and separated into rings, 1 tsp. salt, 1/2 tsp. freshly ground pepper, 1 c. granulated or brown sugar, packed, 1/2 c. wine vinegar, 1/2 c. olive oil
ReferenceRecipe: Drain beans well. Rinse kidney beans and drain again on paper towels. Combine beans, onion rings, salt, pepper and sugar in a deep bowl. Warm vinegar but do not boil. Stir in oil and pour over beans. Toss lightly, cover and refrigerate overnight. Drain and serve in a bowl, surround salad with crisp greens, cherry tomatoes or tomato wedges. Makes 6 to 8 servings.
GeneratedRecipe: drain beans thoroughly. place in serving bowl. add wax beans, onion rings and onion. in a small bowl, combine vinegar, salt, brown sugar, pepper and olive oil. stir well. pour over beans. cover and refrigerate several hours. drain beans and serve.

Ingredients: 1 box Twinkies, 1 can sweetened condensed milk, 1 large instant vanilla pudding mix, 1 (8 oz.) carton Cool Whip, 2 pkg. frozen strawberries, thawed
ReferenceRecipe: Cut Twinkies in half lengthways. Place in the bottom of the dish. Mix together the condensed milk, pudding mix, milk and Cool Whip. Pour this over the Twinkies. Pour thawed strawberries and juice on top of the filling. Refrigerate overnight or for a few hours before serving.
GeneratedRecipe: cut up the twinkies in half. place in a 9 x 13-inch pan. mix sweetened condensed milk, pudding and strawberries; spread on top of twinkies. mix cool whip and spread on top. top with strawberries and chill for 2 to 3 hours. cut into squares.

Ingredients: 1 c. macaroni, 2 eggs, 1/2 c. milk, 1/2 stick margarine, 1 1/2 c. sharp Cheddar cheese, cut in bite size pieces
ReferenceRecipe: Cook the macaroni; drain. Add eggs and stir to mix. Add cheese; stir to mix. Add milk and margarine; stir to mix.
GeneratedRecipe: cook the macaroni until done. drain in a baking dish. mix the margarine, milk, eggs, cheese and cheese. add the macaroni. stir until coated. bake in a slow oven for 25 minutes.

Ingredients: 4 c. cranberry juice, 2 c. apple juice, 6 oz. frozen lemonade, 1 c. water, 3 c. ginger ale, lemon and lime slices
ReferenceRecipe: In large container, combine cranberry, apple juice and lemonade concentrate. Add water. Chill until serving. Before serving, stir in ginger ale. Garnish with fruit.
GeneratedRecipe: combine cranberry juice, lemonade, apple juice, and lemon and cranberry juice in saucepan; bring to a gentle boil on medium heat, stirring occasionally. cool. just before serving, add ginger ale. serve immediately.

Ingredients: 1/2 c. olive oil, 6 cloves garlic, chopped, 1/2 c. onions, chopped, 1/2 c. green pepper, chopped, 1/2 lb. fresh mushrooms, chopped, 2 (6 1/2 oz.) cans minced clams (reserve 1/2 c. juice), 1/2 c. white wine, 1 tsp. basil, 1 tsp. thyme, 1/8 tsp. pepper, 8 oz. cooked linguine, fresh parsley
ReferenceRecipe: In olive oil saute until translucent the garlic, onions and pepper. Add mushrooms; cook 3 minutes. Drain and reserve juice from clams; add clam juice and wine to mixture in pan. Cook 10 minutes with cover off over medium-high heat or until mixture is reduced by half. Stir in clams, basil, thyme and pepper. Simmer 5 minutes. Pour over linguine in a large bowl and toss well. Sprinkle with lots of chopped parsley, 1/2 to 1 cup.
GeneratedRecipe: saute onions and green onions in olive oil in large skillet. add mushrooms, parsley, wine, basil, pepper, parsley, thyme and clams. cover and simmer for 30 minutes. add white pepper. simmer 5 minutes. toss with cooked linguine. serve hot. makes 4 servings.

Ingredients: 1 1/2 c. milk, 2 pkg. yeast, 6 Tbsp. shortening, 1 tsp. salt, 2 Tbsp. sugar, 4 c. flour
ReferenceRecipe: Heat, do not boil, milk, sugar and shortening until shortening is melted. Add yeast and flour and mix until smooth. Let rise about 30 minutes.
GeneratedRecipe: scald milk. add sugar, salt and shortening. cool to lukewarm. dissolve yeast in warm water. add to milk mixture. add flour and mix well. let rise until double in bulk.

Ingredients: 3 lb. ground pears, 5 lb. sugar, 1 large can and 1 small can crushed pineapple
ReferenceRecipe: Mix together. Bring to boil slowly on medium or medium-low heat. Boil for about 1 hour, stirring occasionally to make sure it doesn't scorch. Test for doneness by placing a spoonful on a saucer, placing in freezer, about 3 minutes. If it's like jelly, it's done. Put in hot jars and seal. Great on oatmeal muffins.
GeneratedRecipe: grind pears. add pineapple and cook until thick. add sugar and ground pears; boil 5 minutes. pour into clean jelly glasses and seal.

Ingredients: 1 Tbsp. oil, 1 c. long grain rice, 1/8 c. onion slices, 1 garlic clove, minced, 1/2 tsp. ground cumin, 1 tsp. salt, 1/4 tsp. pepper, 1/4 c. tomato sauce, 2 1/2 c. water, 1/4 c. diced carrots, peas or green peppers (optional)
ReferenceRecipe: Cook rice, oil, onion and garlic over medium heat in large skillet until rice is browned. Add remaining spices, tomato sauce, water and vegetables. Cook over medium heat 10 to 15 minutes until water is absorbed. Reduce to low and cover last 5 minutes for fluffy rice. Makes 6 to 8 servings.
GeneratedRecipe: heat oil; heat on medium high for 1 minute. add rice, onion and carrots; stir to dissolve. add cumin, salt, pepper, cumin and garlic. saute 1 minute. add water; stir gently. cover and cook for 15 minutes. add peas, carrots and cook 10 to 20 minutes. add water and tomato sauce. simmer. add green pepper. cover and cook 20 minutes. stir occasionally. remove cover. cook 10 minutes or until rice is tender. makes 4 servings.

Ingredients: 3 to 4 boneless, skinless chicken breasts, vegetable oil, 1 c. uncooked rice, 1 pkg. onion soup mix, 1 can cream of mushroom soup, 1 can cream of chicken soup, 1 small can mushrooms plus enough water to make 1 3/4 c.*
ReferenceRecipe: * Substitute low-salt when possible.
GeneratedRecipe: cut up chicken breasts. brown in oil until cooked. in large pan, put rice, onion soup, mushrooms and water. cover with foil. cook 1 hour. serve over rice.

Ingredients: 1 lb. ground beef, 1 large chopped onion, 1 (16 oz.) can tomato sauce, 1 (6 oz.) can tomato paste, 6 oz. water, 1 tsp. oregano
ReferenceRecipe: Brown hamburger with onion; drain. Add remaining ingredients to hamburger mixture. Stir well and simmer until spaghetti is done. Serve sauce over cooked spaghetti. Sprinkle Parmesan cheese on top. Serves 4 to 5.
GeneratedRecipe: cook onion in a small amount of oil. add beef. cook until crumbly, stirring well. add tomato sauce, tomato paste, water and oregano. stir, cover and simmer slowly about 1 hour or until flavors are blended. serve on buns.

Ingredients: 2 lbs. ground beef, 1 pkg. taco mix (mild or hot), 1 can kernel corn, 2 boxes cornbread mix, 1/3 cup water
ReferenceRecipe: Use a saucepan and brown ground beef; drain well. In same saucepan mix brown ground beef, taco mix, corn and 1/3 cup water. Mix together and simmer on medium heat. Follow direction on cornbread mix. Use a 9 x 9 pan or glass dish, pour a layer of cornbread mix and then a layer of beef mix. Last layer will be top off with cornbread mix. Bake on 350 degrees until brown and done. Let cool and serve.
GeneratedRecipe: brown ground beef and drain. add taco mix and water. bring to a boil. stir in cornbread mix and corn.

Ingredients: 1 can sliced peaches, 1 can crushed pineapple, 1 can Mandarin oranges, 1 can Eagle Brand milk, 1 large frozen Cool Whip, 1/4 c. lemon juice, 1 c. chopped pecans, 2 graham cracker crusts
ReferenceRecipe: Drain fruit well. Cut fruit into small pieces. Mix lemon juice and milk. Add all other ingredients. Pour into pie shells. Decorate top of pie with additional pecan halves and refrigerate overnight. Makes 2 pies.
GeneratedRecipe: mix lemon juice with eagle brand milk. add frozen fruits, cool whip and pecans. pour in pie crusts and chill.

Ingredients: 18 eggs, 1 c. plus 2 Tbsp. half and half, 3 Tbsp. butter or margarine, 1 (10 1/2 oz.) can cream of mushroom soup, 2 cans or jars (3 oz. each) sliced mushrooms, drained, 5 oz. (about 1 1/4 c.) shredded sharp Cheddar cheese, 3 to 4 slices bacon, fried crisp and crumbled
ReferenceRecipe: Beat eggs and half and half together. Scramble over medium heat in butter in large skillet. Put scrambled eggs in 3-quart shallow casserole, which has been sprayed with nonstick coating (Pam).
GeneratedRecipe: in medium bowl, beat eggs until fluffy. gradually stir in soup, half and half and half. cook over medium heat, stirring constantly, until butter melts. remove from heat; pour into a lightly greased 9 x 13-inch pyrex dish. cover with plastic wrap. microwave at high for 7 to 9 minutes or until eggs are set. stir in bacon and mushrooms. cover and microwave on high for 6 minutes or until eggs are set. sprinkle with cheese and bacon.

Ingredients: 4 (3 oz.) bars bittersweet chocolate (Lindt-Excellence recommended), 1 2/3 c. sour cream, at room temperature
ReferenceRecipe: In a double boiler set over hot water or in a microwave on High power, stirring every 10 seconds, melt the chocolate. Remove from the heat and add the sour cream. Stir with a rubber spatula until uniform in color. If the pan feels warm, transfer to a bowl.
GeneratedRecipe: crush lindt-excellence. melt chocolate bars and sour cream in double boiler. stir until smooth. chill in freezer 30 minutes, stirring occasionally. makes 2 dozen.

Ingredients: 1/3 c. red wine vinegar, 1/3 c. salad oil, 2 tsp. dried parsley flakes, 1 tsp. prepared mustard, 1 small onion in rings, 1 tsp. salt, 1 Tbsp. brown sugar, about 1 lb. mushrooms
ReferenceRecipe: Combine all ingredients except mushrooms and bring to a boil. Add about 1 pound mushrooms and simmer 5 to 6 minutes. Flavor improves if let set for a few hours. Is best when prepared with fresh mushrooms.
GeneratedRecipe: place mushrooms in large salad bowl. set aside. in medium bowl, combine vinegar, oil, brown sugar and salt; beat well. add onion. mix well. combine oil, mustard and onion rings. combine with mushrooms. pour sauce over mushrooms. cover and marinate for 12 hours or overnight. drain. yields 6 to 8 servings.

Ingredients: 7 Tbsp. oleo, 3 Tbsp. chopped parsley, 1/4 tsp. salt, 1/2 tsp. dry mustard, 2 tsp. garlic, crushed, 2 Tbsp. lemon juice, 1/2 c. dry white wine, 2 lb. large shrimp, shelled and deveined
ReferenceRecipe: Melt butter in 9 x 13-inch baking dish. Add remaining ingredients except shrimp. Mix well. Add shrimp and toss in mixture until coated. Broil approximately 4 to 5 minutes or until done and lightly brown. Serve over rice.
GeneratedRecipe: melt oleo in large skillet over medium heat. add shrimp and cook, stirring frequently, until shrimp turn pink, about 5 minutes. add wine, lemon juice, garlic salt, mustard and parsley. cover and simmer 5 minutes or until shrimp are tender. serve over rice. makes 4 servings.

Ingredients: 6 medium sweet potatoes, 1/4 c. butter, 1/2 c. honey, 1/2 c. orange juice
ReferenceRecipe: Boil potatoes until tender. Drain and remove skins. Cut in half lengthwise and arrange in a buttered baking dish. Season with salt.
GeneratedRecipe: peel and slice sweet potatoes. cook in boiling water until tender. drain and mash. add butter, honey and orange juice. mix well.

Ingredients: 1 large pkg. Oreo cookies, crushed, 1 stick margarine, melted, 3 1/2 c. milk, 2 large pkg. vanilla instant pudding mix, 1 (8 oz.) pkg. cream cheese, softened, 1 large carton Cool Whip
ReferenceRecipe: Mix cookies and melted margarine well (by hand) and press into a 13 x 9-inch pan to make a crust (save 3/4 cup crumbs to sprinkle on top). Blend remaining ingredients; spread on top of crust and sprinkle remaining 3/4 cup cookie crumbs on top. Keep refrigerated.
GeneratedRecipe: mix cookies and melted margarine. set aside. mix cream cheese, cool whip and 2 packages softened cream cheese with melted margarine. layer cookies, cookies and pudding in a large flowerpot, ending with crushed cookies. sprinkle a few drops of crushed cookies on top. store in refrigerator.

Ingredients: 10 oz. chopped spinach (frozen), 1 c. mayonnaise, 1 c. sour cream, 1 small onion, chopped, 8 oz. water chestnuts, drained and minced, 1 envelope Knorr vegetable soup mix, 1 loaf Hawaiian bread or sourdough
ReferenceRecipe: Thaw spinach. Press out all of the water. Add remaining ingredients to spinach and mix well. Refrigerate 2 hours before serving. Cut the top center portion out of the Hawaiian bread. Core loaf out. Spoon in the spinach dip before serving. Serve the dip with the cored out bread or crackers and fresh bite-size vegetables.
GeneratedRecipe: thaw and squeeze spinach, squeeze out excess water and squeeze. add sour cream, mayo, soup mix, chestnuts and onion. mix well. refrigerate about two hours. add a tablespoon of mixture. hollow out round bread round loaf ( rye and fill center of bread ) into bowl. fill with dip. dip pieces around the bread to dip.

Ingredients: 1 can Eagle Brand milk, 1/2 c. lemon juice, 2 eggs, separated
ReferenceRecipe: Blend together milk, egg yolks and lemon juice. Pour into an 8-inch pie pan lined with an unbaked crumb crust, then cover with meringue or whipped cream. Put in refrigerator until chilled.
GeneratedRecipe: beat egg whites until stiff. add eagle brand milk and lemon juice. fold in stiffly beaten egg whites. pour into graham cracker crust.

Ingredients: 6 c oatmeal, 1/2 c brown sugar, 3/4 c wheat germ, 1/2 c white shredded coconut, 1/2 c sesame seeds, 1 c nutmeats, 1/2 c vegetable oil, 1/2 c honey
ReferenceRecipe: Place oatmeal in mixing bowl. Add brown sugar. Add remaining ingredients and mix. Bake at 350 for 20 to 25 minutes, stirring often, crumble. Cover and keep in refrigerator.
GeneratedRecipe: mix all ingredients except nutmeats in a saucepan. mix well with wheat germ. bring to boil. reduce heat and cook for 1 minute. stir frequently to keep warm.

Ingredients: 2 2/3 c. sifted flour, 1 tsp. salt, 1 c. Crisco shortening, 6 Tbsp. water (ice cold)
ReferenceRecipe: Sift flour before measuring. Put ice cubes in cup of water before measuring. Spoon flour into measuring cup lightly. Level without shaking or packing down.
GeneratedRecipe: mix flour, salt and crisco. add cold water and mix. work in with a fork until smooth. roll on floured board until thin. cut in pie pan. makes 2 pie crusts.

Ingredients: 1 head cabbage, outer leaves removed, 2 carrots, 1 c. mayonnaise, scant 1/2 c. sugar, 1/4 c. vinegar
ReferenceRecipe: Grate cabbage and carrots. Mix vinegar and sugar and then combine with mayonnaise. Toss dressing with cabbage and carrots. Chill.
GeneratedRecipe: wash and shred cabbage, carrots and carrots and mix with sugar. add vinegar and mayonnaise; add to cabbage and stir. chill and serve.

Ingredients: 1 box Rice Chex, 1 stick margarine, 1 c. peanut butter, 1 pkg. Reese's peanut butter chips
ReferenceRecipe: Melt margarine, peanut butter and peanut butter chips over low heat. Pour over Rice Chex. Stir, then empty into a bag containing powdered sugar and shake until coated.
GeneratedRecipe: melt reese 's chips, peanut butter and margarine together in a pan. in a bowl, pour chips, mix well with a spoon in cereal. shake until coated.

Ingredients: 1 c. converted rice, cooked as per directions, 1 bay leaf, 1 slice lemon, 1/4 c. Italian dressing, salt and pepper, 1/2 c. chopped purple onion, 1/2 c. chopped green pepper, 1/4 c. chopped parsley, 1 small jar chopped pimento, 2 c. washed and torn spinach, 1/4 c. Italian salad dressing, bacon bits (optional)
ReferenceRecipe: Cook rice with bay leaf and lemon. When done, fluff rice and add Italian dressing, salt and pepper. Refrigerate.
GeneratedRecipe: mix all ingredients except lemon for pimento and bacon. pour salad dressing over all and toss. chill for at least 4 hours.

Ingredients: 1 cup boiling broth, 1/2 cup Crisco (melted), 1 tsp salt, 2 eggs beaten well
ReferenceRecipe: In large bowl mix boiling broth and Crisco and salt.
GeneratedRecipe: pour boiling water over broth and salt. stir until dissolved. add eggs and beat well. pour into hot broth. cook over low heat, stirring constantly, until eggs are done.

Ingredients: 1 lb. caramels, 2 Tbsp. frozen orange juice, 10 marshmallows, 1 tsp. vanilla, 1 (5 oz.) pkg. popcorn, popped
ReferenceRecipe: In a saucepan over hot water, melt caramels mixed with marshmallows and orange juice; cool, then add vanilla. Pour over popcorn and mix. Spoon onto aluminum foil and shape into 3-inch circles 1/2-inch thick. Nuts on top may be added.
GeneratedRecipe: melt caramels with orange juice and vanilla in a double boiler. pour over popped popcorn and mix well. form into balls. roll in pecans.

Ingredients: 1 bag Spy's apples, washed and cored, cinnamon, 1/2 c. sugar
ReferenceRecipe: Steam apples in a steamer pan until soft and mushy. Then run apples through a sieve and add sugar and cinnamon to taste. Reserve liquid and run through a cheesecloth and there you have apple juice.
GeneratedRecipe: peel and core apples. cut into small pieces. place in crock-pot. add sugar and cinnamon. cook on low for 6 to 8 hours.

Ingredients: 1 pkg. white cake mix, 1 (3 oz.) pkg. strawberry Jell-O, 3/4 c. oil, 1 c. chopped pecans, 4 eggs, 2 Tbsp. flour, 10 oz. frozen strawberries, 1/2 c. sugar
ReferenceRecipe: Grease Bundt pan. Combine ingredients. Beat with mixer 3 minutes. Bake 55 to 60 minutes. Ice when cool or serve with Cool Whip. It is moist and good.
GeneratedRecipe: prepare cake mix as directed on package. add oil, eggs, sugar and flour to the jell-o. mix until well blended. add pecans and strawberries to jell-o. mix well. bake in two a 13 x 9-inch cake pans as directed on box.

Ingredients: 1 (1 lb.) box graham crackers, 2 (3 oz.) boxes instant French vanilla pudding, 3 1/2 c. milk, 9 oz. container Cool Whip, 1 (15 oz.) ready to spread milk chocolate icing
