ReferenceRecipe: Make sauce by combining sugar, cornstarch and water. Cook until thick. Stir the strawberry jello into the hot sauce. Cool 1 hour. Fill the baked pie shell with fresh berries (slice them if they are large). Pour the sauce over the berries. Refrigerate.
GeneratedRecipe: cook water, sugar and cornstarch until thickened. add jello and let cool. add fresh strawberries. pour into pie shell. top with whipped topping.

Ingredients: 9 Tbsp. sugar, 1 Tbsp. cornstarch, 1/2 c. cold water, 5 egg whites, at room temperature, 3/4 tsp. vanilla, 1/2 tsp. cream of tartar
ReferenceRecipe: Combine 2 tablespoons sugar, cornstarch and cold water in saucepan. Stir until cornstarch dissolves. Cook mixture over medium heat, stirring constantly. Remove from heat when mixture is thick and clear. Cool.
GeneratedRecipe: combine sugar, cornstarch and water in saucepan. cook over medium heat, stirring constantly, until mixture comes to a boil. boil 1 minute. remove from heat. beat egg whites until stiff. add cream of tartar and vanilla.

Ingredients: 1 c. crushed pineapple, 2 pkg. lime or lemon jello, 1 lb. cottage cheese, 1 small jar chopped maraschino cherries, 1/2 c. chopped nuts (optional), 1/2 pt. cream, whipped stiff (fold in last)
ReferenceRecipe: Heat pineapple and dissolve jello in pineapple; let set until partly congealed. Add the rest of the ingredients. Chill and serve.
GeneratedRecipe: add water to jello to make 2 cups. boil 1 1/2 cups cold water. drain liquid from cherries and pineapple. add to jello. let set. add cottage cheese, nuts and cherries. chill until firm. fold in whipped cream and cherries.

Ingredients: 2 pkg. Jiffy cornbread mix, 1 can creamed corn
ReferenceRecipe: Mix and bake as directed. You may double the recipe for serving more people. Serves 8 people. Serves 16 if doubled.
GeneratedRecipe: mix the first 3 ingredients and add the corn. bake in a 9 x 13-inch greased pan.

Ingredients: 1 (3 oz.) pkg. strawberry jello, 2 Tbsp. cornstarch, 1 c. sugar, 2 c. water, strawberries, cooked pie shell
ReferenceRecipe: Mix the jello, cornstarch and sugar together. Add the water. Bring mixture to a boil. Let cool until partially set; mix. Pour over berries in cooked pie shell. Chill. Serve with whipped cream.
GeneratedRecipe: cook cornstarch, sugar, water and jello until thick. take off fire; add cooked strawberries. pour in pie shell. refrigerate until cold. top with whipped cream, if desired.

Ingredients: 1 c. sliced okra, 1 lb. ground beef, salt and pepper to taste, 1 small onion, chopped or 1 tsp. onion powder, 1 c. water, 1 c. uncooked rice
ReferenceRecipe: Cook okra in small amount of oil until done. Cook ground beef until slightly brown. Add okra, seasonings, onion and water. Simmer until 30 minutes before steaming. Add rice and enough water to steam rice. Cook until rice is tender.
GeneratedRecipe: brown ground beef and onion in skillet. add okra, salt, pepper and water. bring to boil. add okra and cook until rice are tender.

Ingredients: 1 bag egg noodles, 1 can mushroom soup, 1 large round steak, 1/2 c. milk, 1 (12 oz.) sour cream, 1 Tbsp. oil
ReferenceRecipe: Cut round steak into bite-size pieces. Fry in oil until done. Cook egg noodles; drain. Mix sour cream, mushroom soup and milk and heat thoroughly. Put meat in sauce; cook 5 minutes more. Pour over cooked noodles.
GeneratedRecipe: cut steak into bite size pieces. brown in oil in a large skillet. add soup and milk; heat to boiling. reduce heat and simmer until meat is tender. stir in sour cream. serve over noodles, egg noodles or noodles. makes 6 servings ( about 1/2 cup ).

Ingredients: 1 lg. can carnation milk, 2 c. sugar, 3 squares unsweetened chocolate, 1 tsp. vanilla
ReferenceRecipe: Bring to a boil all ingredients. Cook over medium heat for 5 minutes. Stirring until chocolate melts. Remove from heat; add vanilla. Beat with rotary beater until thick. Serve hot or cold. Great on ice cream.
GeneratedRecipe: melt chocolate squares with 3 tablespoons milk. combine chocolate squares, sugar, carnation milk, vanilla and carnation milk. mix together and cook over medium heat until it comes to a boil; let boil 1 minute. stir constantly. add 1 teaspoon vanilla.

Ingredients: 3 qt. freshly popped popcorn, 1/2 c. butter, 1 c. firmly packed brown sugar, 1/4 c. light corn syrup, 1/2 tsp. salt, 1/4 tsp. baking soda, 1/2 tsp. vanilla
ReferenceRecipe: Place popcorn in a lightly greased 4-quart casserole dish; set aside. Place butter in a 1 1/2-quart dish. Microwave on High for 1 minute or until melted. Stir in brown sugar, corn syrup and salt; cover and microwave on High for 4 minutes. Remove mixture from microwave; stir in soda and vanilla. Pour over popcorn; stir until all is coated. Cook popcorn mixture on High for 2 1/2 to 3 minutes, stirring well after each minute. Remove from oven; stir well. Spread in a lightly buttered 15 x 10 x 1-inch jellyroll pan; cool thoroughly. Break into pieces and store in an airtight container.
GeneratedRecipe: combine brown sugar, butter, light corn syrup and salt in a 2-quart microwave-safe bowl. microwave on high for 4 minutes; stir in baking soda, then add vanilla. pour hot syrup over corn. stir well and cook on high for 2 minutes. put popped corn in brown paper bag and microwave 2 minutes and shake well. microwave on high for 1 minute on high. spread out and cool. makes 2 1/2 quarts.

Ingredients: 2 lb. carrots, peeled, sliced and cooked until tender, 1 medium onion, sliced thin, 1 medium green pepper, sliced thin, 1 can tomato soup, 3/4 c. sugar, 1/2 c. vinegar, 1/4 c. Wesson oil, 1 tsp. Worcestershire sauce
ReferenceRecipe: Bring tomato soup, sugar, vinegar, oil and Worcestershire sauce to a boil. Pour over carrots (drained), onion and bell pepper. Marinate overnight in refrigerator.
GeneratedRecipe: cook carrots in salted water until just tender-crisp. drain. add onion and peppers. pour in tomato soup, sugar, vinegar, oil and worcestershire sauce. bring to a boil and simmer 10 to 15 minutes until hot. cool, pour carrots and onion mixture over and pepper. keeps for 2 weeks.

Ingredients: pan stock from roast pork, 1/2 c. condensed tomato soup, 1/4 c. flour, 2 c. water, salt and pepper
ReferenceRecipe: Leave 1/4 cup stock in pan. Blend flour and add water gradually, stirring constantly. Cook until thickened. Stir in tomato soup and season with salt and pepper.
GeneratedRecipe: combine flour and pepper. dredge pork in flour. brown roast in butter. remove from frying pan and brown the drippings. pour off fat. add stock and heat. add to soup gradually and bring to low boil. add water, stirring constantly, cook about 20 minutes more. if too thick, add more water. remove from heat and let cool and place in slow cooker for 8 to 10 hours or until meat is tender. remove and season to taste with salt and pepper. serve. serves 6 to 8.

Ingredients: 4 Tbsp. butter, 8 oz. sliced, fresh mushrooms, 1 medium onion, chopped, 1 (16 oz.) bag frozen cut broccoli, thawed, 1/4 tsp. garlic powder, 1 tsp. oregano, 1 lb. Hillshire Farm smoked sausage (bite-size pieces), 1/2 c. Parmesan cheese, 1 pkg. rotini pasta
ReferenceRecipe: Melt butter in a large skillet. Stir-fry mushrooms, onion and broccoli, sprinkled with garlic powder and oregano, until vegetables are cooked, yet still firm. (Do not overcook.)
GeneratedRecipe: cook pasta according to package directions. drain and set aside. in large skillet, saute onion and mushrooms in butter until tender. add broccoli, mushrooms, oregano, garlic powder, oregano and oregano. cook over medium heat, stirring occasionally, until sausage is heated through. serve over pasta.

Ingredients: 1 1/2 c. soft bread crumbs, 3/4 c. milk, 1 1/2 lb. ground beef, 1 tsp. salt
ReferenceRecipe: Mix together; shape into small balls.
GeneratedRecipe: combine bread crumbs, milk, salt, beef and milk in bowl; stir until thoroughly coated. cover and chill in refrigerator overnight.

Ingredients: 3 tsp. butter, 3 tart apples, peeled and sliced, 1/2 c. honey, 1/2 tsp. nutmeg, 1/2 tsp. cinnamon
ReferenceRecipe: In medium skillet over medium heat, melt the butter until foaming. Add apples, cook 2 minutes, tossing occasionally. Add honey and sprinkle spices over apples. Toss gently to combine. Cook until apples are tender, then serve while hot.
GeneratedRecipe: melt 1/2 cup butter in a frying pan. add apples. cook until tender, about 7 minutes on each side, turning often. combine honey, cinnamon and nutmeg. toss gently to coat the apples with cinnamon mixture. cook over medium heat for 2 more minutes.

Ingredients: 2 cups sugar, 1/2 cup 2 % milk, 1 Tbsp. butter, 1 tsp. vanilla, 1 cup peanut butter, 4 Tbsp. cocoa (optional), 1 cup nuts (optional)
ReferenceRecipe: Combine sugar and milk. Bring to a full boil. Boil 1 minute. Take off heat. Let stand 5 minutes. Add butter, peanut butter, and vanilla.
GeneratedRecipe: combine sugar, cocoa, milk and butter in a saucepan. bring to a boil over medium heat. boil for 1 minute. remove from heat. add peanut butter, vanilla and nuts. beat until thick. pour into buttered pan. cool and cut into squares.

Ingredients: 1/3 c. shortening, 1/2 c. honey or corn syrup, 2/3 c. peanut butter, 1 egg, 2 c. flour, 1 tsp. baking powder, 1/4 tsp. soda, 1/2 tsp. salt, 1/2 c. peanuts, chopped
ReferenceRecipe: Mix shortening, sugar, honey, peanut butter and egg thoroughly. Measure flour and blend dry ingredients. Stir into shortening mixture. Stir in nuts. Shape into a strip about 10 x 2 1/2 x 1 1/2-inch. Wrap in wax paper; store in the refrigerator for several hours. Bake as needed.
GeneratedRecipe: mix together flour, honey, baking powder, salt and baking soda in large mixing bowl. cut in shortening until mixture resembles coarse crumbs. add egg and honey. add peanuts and corn syrup and mix well. stir in peanuts.

Ingredients: 3 Tbsp. olive oil, 3 cloves garlic, 1 large Spanish onion, 4 large tomatoes, chopped, 2 bay leaves, 1/4 tsp. black pepper, 1 tsp. paprika, 1/4 c. white cooking wine, 1 1/2 lb. sliced red skin potatoes (uncooked), 2 lb. tuna steak, cut in 1-inch chunks
ReferenceRecipe: In a 12-inch pan, saute garlic in oil. Add onion and saute until translucent. Add tomatoes, bay leaves, black pepper and paprika. Let simmer 5 minutes. Add wine, potatoes and tuna. Cover and let simmer on low flame approximately 30 minutes. Serves 5.
GeneratedRecipe: in a large skillet, heat olive oil over medium heat. add onion and garlic; saute until tender. add tuna, wine, bay leaves, paprika, pepper and bay leaves. cover and cook over low heat for 20 minutes. add potatoes and tomatoes. cook until potatoes are tender, about 10 minutes.

Ingredients: 2 eggs, slightly beaten, 1/2 c. sugar, pinch of salt, 1/2 c. pineapple juice, 1/2 c. finely chopped celery, 1/2 c. crushed pineapple, drained, 1/2 c. walnuts, 2 unpeeled apples, chopped, 2 c. whipped topping
ReferenceRecipe: In saucepan, over medium heat, combine eggs, sugar, salt and juice. Cook, stirring, until thick. Cool. Add celery, pineapple, nuts and apples. Fold in whipped cream and freeze. Place in refrigerator for about two hours before serving. May be refrozen. This keeps several months in freezer.
GeneratedRecipe: mix eggs, sugar and salt in saucepan. let stand until slightly thickened. add pineapple, walnuts, celery and celery. fold in whipped topping.

Ingredients: 3 c. sifted self-rising flour, 1 Tbsp. paprika, 2 pkg. Lipton tomato soup mix, 2 pkg. Good Seasons salad mix, 1 tsp. salt
ReferenceRecipe: Coat chicken with mix. Bake on greased cookie sheet.
GeneratedRecipe: mix dry ingredients. cut in 2 or 3 knives until mixture resembles cornmeal. mix with fork. place 1 teaspoon at a time in each cup, mixing well. add 2 cups tomato sauce mix, mixing well after each cup of flour. use a fork to mix, stir until all water is moist. drop by tablespoonfuls into boiling chicken broth and cook until dumplings are done.

Ingredients: 1 (20 oz.) pkg. Oreo cookies, crushed, 1 (8 oz.) pkg. cream cheese, softened, 1/4 c. margarine, softened, 1 large Cool Whip (16 oz.), 2 (3 1/2 oz.) pkg. vanilla instant pudding, 3 c. milk
ReferenceRecipe: Bowl 1: Mix cream cheese, margarine and Cool Whip.
GeneratedRecipe: mix pudding and milk. add cool whip and cream cheese; mix well and set aside. in large bowl, mix pudding and cool whip. add cream cheese mixture and mix well. in a clean flower pot, layer cookies, ending with cookies. refrigerate overnight.

Ingredients: 2 c. graham cracker crumbs, 1/4 c. sugar, 1/4 c. margarine or butter, melted, 2 c. powdered sugar, 2/3 c. creamy peanut butter, 1 (8 oz.) pkg. cream cheese, softened, 1 c. milk, 1 (12 oz.) container frozen whipped topping, thawed, 3/4 c. Spanish peanuts
ReferenceRecipe: In small bowl, combine sugar, crumbs and margarine. Press into 13 x 9-inch baking dish. In small mixer bowl, beat powdered sugar, peanut butter and cream cheese at medium speed, scraping bowl often until smooth (1 to 2 minutes). At low speed, gradually beat in milk. Fold in whipped topping. Spread over crust. Sprinkle with peanuts. Freeze 3 hours or until serving time. Makes 18 servings.
GeneratedRecipe: combine graham cracker crumbs and melted butter. press into a 9 x 13-inch pan. beat cream cheese, powdered sugar and milk until smooth. fold in whipped topping. spread over crust. sprinkle with peanuts. freeze until firm.

Ingredients: 2 c. wide egg noodles, 3 Tbsp. bacon grease, 1 c. chopped onion, 1 c. chopped celery, 1 lb. ground beef, 1 c. cooked, diced carrots, 2 1/4 c. (No. 2 can) whole tomatoes, 2 tsp. salt, 1/2 tsp. chili powder, 1/4 tsp. pepper, 1/2 tsp. Worcestershire sauce
ReferenceRecipe: Peel, dice and cook carrots until done. Cook noodles according to package directions; drain. Add onion and celery to grease in Dutch oven and saute about 5 minutes. Add broken up ground beef; brown. Combine all ingredients to beef in Dutch oven. Simmer, stirring occasionally, until flavors are blended.
GeneratedRecipe: brown meat in hot grease. add onions, celery, carrots, carrots, salt and pepper. cook about 15 minutes. add tomatoes, seasonings and worcestershire sauce. simmer 30 minutes. add noodles and noodles.

Ingredients: 2 pkg (8 ounces each) cream cheese, 1 pkg (4 ounces) blue cheese, 2 Tbsp. chopped chives, 1/2 tsp. garlic salt, parsley, chopped nuts
ReferenceRecipe: Have cheese at room temperature, mix all ingredients well. Chill then form into a ball. Roll in parsley and chopped nuts. Refrigerate until ready to serve.
GeneratedRecipe: mix softened cream cheese with mixer until smooth. add chopped nuts, parsley, garlic salt and chives. mix well. roll into two logs. roll in finely chopped nuts. refrigerate until serving time. serve with crackers.

Ingredients: 1 pita bread (6 to 8-inch), 2 Tbsp. mayonnaise, 1/4 Tbsp. chopped jalapeno pepper, 4 sliced ripe tomatoes, halved, 1 (6 oz.) pkg. sliced ham, 2 pitted olives, sliced (optional), alfalfa sprouts (optional), 1/8 Tbsp. ground cumin
ReferenceRecipe: Cut pita bread into 8 wedges and lightly toast. In small bowl, combine mayonnaise, cumin and jalapeno pepper. Spread each wedge with a dab of the mayonnaise mixture. Top with half sliced tomato and 2 slices of your favorite ham. Garnish with a slice of olive and a few sprouts. Serve.
GeneratedRecipe: in a small bowl, combine mayonnaise, cumin, cumin and pepper. spread on pita bread. top with ham, tomatoes and olives. broil until cheese is melted.

Ingredients: 1 lb. apricots, diced and ground fine, 1/2 c. nuts, ground, 2/3 can Eagle Brand milk, coconut
ReferenceRecipe: Mix together first 3 ingredients. Roll in balls, then roll in coconut.
GeneratedRecipe: mix all ingredients together. shape into small balls and roll in coconut. store in airtight container in refrigerator.

Ingredients: 4 pork chops, 2 (8 oz.) cans tomato sauce, 1 1/2 c. water, 1/4 c. onion, 2 Tbsp. brown sugar, 1 tsp. salt, 1 c. uncooked regular rice
ReferenceRecipe: Brown pork chops and onions in oil. Drain grease and remove chops. Stir in remaining ingredients and add chops. Bring to a boil. Cover and simmer for 30 minutes. Makes 4 servings.
GeneratedRecipe: brown pork chops on both sides in a large skillet. remove chops from skillet and set aside. combine tomato sauce, water, brown sugar, salt and onion. pour over chops. cover and cook over low heat for 45 minutes or until rice is tender.

Ingredients: 2 envelopes Knox gelatine, 1 large angel food cake, 1 c. sugar, shredded coconut, 4 envelopes Dream Whip, 1 large can crushed pineapple (undrained), 1 to 2 tsp. lemon juice
ReferenceRecipe: Dissolve gelatine in 4 tablespoons cold water. Add 1 cup boiling water, lemon juice and pineapple with juice and sugar. Refrigerate until it begins to jell. Tear half of angel food cake into small pieces and spread over bottom of a 9 x 13-inch cake pan. Whip 2 envelopes Dream Whip and fold into gelatine mixture. Pour over cake in pan. Tear other half of cake into small pieces and spread over mixture in pan. Press down lightly. Whip remaining 2 envelopes Dream Whip and spread on top. Cover with shredded coconut. Chill overnight. Serves 13 to 20.
GeneratedRecipe: soften gelatine in 1/4 cup cold water. heat pineapple and sugar until sugar is dissolved. dissolve gelatine in pineapple juice and bring to a boil. add to mixture. remove from heat. add shredded cake, lemon juice and shredded pineapple. refrigerate until it starts to thicken. whip 1 package of dream whip and add knox gelatine to gelatine mixture and fold into mixture. cut angel food cake into small pieces; add 1/2 cup coconut to mixture. place angel food cake in pan and chill overnight.

Ingredients: 1 large can crushed pineapple, 1 (3 oz.) instant pistachio pudding, 1 c. miniature marshmallows, 1 small container Cool Whip, 1 c. pecan pieces, 1 jar cut-up maraschino cherries
ReferenceRecipe: Mix pineapple and pudding; add marshmallows, Cool Whip, pecans and cherries. Chill. Serve.
GeneratedRecipe: mix the pineapple with juice and pudding with the juice and marshmallows. stir in the cool whip, then add the marshmallows. add the pecan pieces and cherries. mix well.

Ingredients: 3 1/2 c. flour, 1 tsp. baking soda, 2/3 c. sugar, 1 Tbsp. baking powder, 1 c. raisins, 2 eggs, beaten, 1 1/2 c. buttermilk, 2 Tbsp. butter, melted
ReferenceRecipe: Stir the dry ingredients together. Add raisins and coat them well. In a separate bowl, combine eggs, buttermilk and butter. Add to flour mixture.
GeneratedRecipe: combine flour, sugar, baking powder and baking soda. add eggs, buttermilk and melted butter. mix well. stir in raisins.

Ingredients: 5 (3 oz.) pkg. jello, 5 c. sugar, 84 oz. unsweetened pineapple juice, 1 pt. lemon juice (real lemon or equivalent), 18 oz. grapefruit juice, 4 qt. cold water
ReferenceRecipe: May use any flavor gelatin. Dissolve jello in 5 cups boiling water. Add all other ingredients. Freeze. Keeps well. Set out of freezer 3 to 4 hours before serving (sometimes you have to chop with wooden spoon). Add 6 quarts 7-Up and 2 quarts ginger ale when serving. No need for ice or ice rings. Stays cold. Makes at least 150 punch cups.
GeneratedRecipe: dissolve jello, and 1 cup cold water. mix well and freeze for 3 hours. mix with 1/2 quart ginger ale when ready to serve.

Ingredients: 1 box banana instant pudding mix, 2 boxes vanilla instant pudding mix, 1 (12 oz.) carton Cool Whip, 4 c. milk, 8 oz. sour cream, 3 bananas, sliced, 1 large box vanilla wafers
ReferenceRecipe: Mix pudding and milk; mix in sour cream and 1/2 of the Cool Whip. In a very large bowl, put 1 layer of vanilla wafers, layer of pudding mixture and layer of bananas. Repeat layers. Top with remainder of Cool Whip.
GeneratedRecipe: mix pudding mix, sour cream and milk. add sour cream and cool whip, then layer vanilla wafers in dish. put sliced bananas on top and top with the vanilla instant wafers.

Ingredients: 2 qt. onions, 3 qt. green tomatoes, 6 hot peppers, 2 Tbsp. celery seed, 2 Tbsp. allspice, 2 Tbsp. ground cloves, 2 medium heads cabbage, 6 bell peppers, 1/3 c. salt, 8 c. sugar, 2/3 c. ground mustard, 2 Tbsp. cinnamon
ReferenceRecipe: Chop all vegetables fine. Mix with salt and let stand 24 hours. Drain off brine. Squeeze vegetables and add other ingredients. Mix thoroughly. Add good vinegar to cover. Simmer for 1 hour, keeping covered closely. Pack into hot dry jars and seal. Makes approximately 14 half-pints.
GeneratedRecipe: grind all vegetables. sprinkle with salt and let stand overnight. drain well. add sugar, mustard seed, celery seed, cloves and mustard seed. bring to a boil and simmer for 30 minutes. pack in hot jars and seal.

Ingredients: banana, raspberry yogurt or any other flavor, graham cracker crumbs
ReferenceRecipe: Cut banana into pieces easy for a child to get a fork into and also into their mouths! Put some yogurt in a small bowl. Put graham cracker crumbs in another bowl. (Used T.V. dinner trays work great.) Let child fork banana pieces, then dip into yogurt, crumbs and pop into mouth. Be imaginative, coconut flakes, etc. may be substituted.
GeneratedRecipe: mix the yogurt, graham cracker crumbs and yogurt, then add the banana slices. place in the center of the pie plate to make the banana layer. add yogurt. cover and chill.

Ingredients: 3/4 c. ground cinnamon, 1 Tbsp. allspice, 2 Tbsp. cloves, 1 Tbsp. nutmeg, 1 c. applesauce
ReferenceRecipe: Combine the first 4 ingredients. Blend well. Stir in applesauce. It will be thick. Roll out 1/4-inch thick. Cut with cookie cutter and lay on brown paper. Let dry for 4 to 5 days, uncovered. While wet, take a toothpick and cut hole for ribbon. Smaller cookie cutters work best. Use spatula to place on brown paper.
GeneratedRecipe: combine cinnamon, cloves and cloves and mix well. add applesauce. form into a ball and roll in granulated sugar. let dry 2 hours. slice into 1/4-inch slices. store in airtight container in refrigerator for 1 month.

Ingredients: 15 graham crackers, 15 soda crackers, 1/2 c. brown sugar, 1/2 c. margarine, 1/4 c. chopped nutmeats (optional)
ReferenceRecipe: Crush together graham and soda crackers; combine with brown sugar, margarine and nutmeats. Press into the bottom of a 9 x 13 pan and reserve 1 cup for the top.	Chill while preparing the filling.
GeneratedRecipe: line a 9 x 13-inch pan with whole graham crackers. sprinkle with chopped nutmeats. set aside. mix margarine and brown sugar. bring to a boil. let boil for 5 minutes. pour over crackers. add 1/2 c. nutmeats and another layer of graham crackers. add another layer of crackers ( do n't use a cookie crumbs ) and nutmeats ( optional ).

Ingredients: 3 lb. ground beef, 1 Tbsp. butter, 2 (15 oz.) cans chili beans
ReferenceRecipe: Brown beef in butter in 12-inch Dutch oven. Add beans and cook over low heat for 15 minutes.
GeneratedRecipe: heat chili and butter together. mix ground beef, beans and beans. simmer for 10 to 15 minutes.

Ingredients: 1 (10 oz.) pkg. chopped broccoli, 1/4 c. chopped onion, 2 grated carrots, 1 c. sour cream, 1 can cream of mushroom soup (can use cream of chicken), 2 pkg. Stove Top stuffing with rice, 3/4 c. melted butter, 1 c. water
ReferenceRecipe: Boil the broccoli and onion 5 minutes and then drain. Add grated carrot, sour cream and soup. Combine the 2 packages Stove Top stuffing with the melted butter.
GeneratedRecipe: combine rice, carrots, carrots and onion. put in casserole dish. combine soup, sour cream and water. pour over stuffing mixture. top with melted butter.

Ingredients: 1/2 lb. bologna, 1/2 lb. cheese (any kind), 1 small onion, 1/8 green pepper, 6 small sweet pickles, 1/2 tsp. salt, 6 Tbsp. mayonnaise, 1 tsp. prepared mustard
ReferenceRecipe: Grind bologna, cheese, onion, pepper and pickles in a bowl. Add other ingredients and mix well.
GeneratedRecipe: grind bologna, green pepper, onion and pickles. add mayonnaise, mustard, salt and pepper. mix well.

Ingredients: 6 oz. well-chilled Monterey Jack cheese, shredded, 1 large head romaine lettuce (1 lb.), torn into bite-sized pieces, 1 small head red lettuce (6 oz.), torn into bite-sized pieces, 1 Tbsp. walnut oil or vegetable oil, 3/4 c. walnuts, chopped
ReferenceRecipe: Heat walnut oil in heavy 6-inch skillet over medium-low heat. Add walnuts and cook until brown, stirring frequently, about 5 minutes. Cool. Combine with both lettuces and cheese in large bowl. Just before serving, add vinaigrette and toss.
GeneratedRecipe: in a large bowl, mix romaine and lettuce. in a small saucepan, heat the oil, then add oil as you would a dressing. pour over the lettuce and walnut. toss again. add the walnuts and cheese. serve immediately. serves 4.

Ingredients: 2 c. flour, 1 c. shortening, 1 c. sugar, 1 tsp. baking powder, 1/4 tsp. salt, 1 egg, 1 tsp. almond extract
ReferenceRecipe: Cut shortening into dry ingredients. Add beaten egg and almond extract. Mix, knead until soft. Form into little balls, flatten with hand. The sign of the Chinese Almond Cookie is a red dot in the center of the cookie, which is made with red food coloring. Use a chopstick and dot it!
GeneratedRecipe: blend together flour, baking powder and salt. cut in shortening and sugar. beat egg. stir into dry ingredients. add almond extract.

Ingredients: 1 (No. 2) can pineapple chunks, drained, 2 or 3 sliced oranges, 1 large apple, chunked, 3 bananas, sliced, 1/2 lb. seedless grapes, halved, 1/2 c. pineapple juice, 1/4 c. lemon juice, 1/4 lb. cheese (Cheddar or American), diced, 1 c. pecans (optional), 1/3 c. sugar, 1 whole egg plus 1 egg yolk
ReferenceRecipe: Beat well the egg and egg yolk. Cook egg, sugar, pineapple juice and lemon juice in double boiler until thick. When cool, pour over remaining ingredients. Chill. At Christmastime, add red and green cherries.
GeneratedRecipe: drain fruit and reserve juice. combine pineapple chunks, apple, bananas, apple and grapes in a large bowl. combine sugar, egg yolk, lemon juice, egg yolk and lemon juice in saucepan. cook over medium heat, stirring constantly, until thickened. cool slightly. pour over fruit and nuts. chill.

Ingredients: 1 lb. lean hamburger, 1 box frozen baby carrots, 1 large onion, 2 large potatoes, salt
ReferenceRecipe: You will need aluminum foil, 4 pieces, 12 x 12-inches.
GeneratedRecipe: brown hamburger with onion. drain excess fat. place in a large skillet and add water to cover. add carrots and carrots. add frozen vegetables. boil until carrots are tender. serve with cornbread.

Ingredients: 1/2 c. instant lemon flavored tea, 1 to 1 1/2 c. sugar, 2 c. Tang, 2 tsp. ground cinnamon, 1 tsp. ground cloves, 1 small pkg. sweetened lemonade mix
ReferenceRecipe: Mix all of the ingredients. Use 2 teaspoons of tea mixture to 1 cup hot water.
GeneratedRecipe: mix all ingredients well. use 2 tablespoons to 3 teaspoons of tea mixture per 1 cup, hot water ( 8 ounce ).

Ingredients: 1 c. flour, 1/2 c. milk, 2 Tbsp. mayonnaise
ReferenceRecipe: Stir up and put in muffin tin.
GeneratedRecipe: combine mayonnaise and milk. stir into flour and stir until well blended. cook and stir until mixture thickens and boils. serve over baked biscuits.

Ingredients: 2 hard-boiled eggs, 3 to 4 Tbsp. self-rising flour, approximately 5 Tbsp. Crisco, salt and pepper as desired
ReferenceRecipe: Boil eggs for chipping up in gravy. Peel and place aside.
GeneratedRecipe: cut eggs in half lengthwise. remove yolks and mash. add flour, salt and pepper to taste. roll out on floured board and cut into strips. drop into boiling broth. cook until done.

Ingredients: 1/2 c. butter, 1/2 c. brown sugar, 1/2 c. white sugar, 1 tsp. vanilla extract, 1/4 tsp. salt, 1 egg, 1 1/8 c. flour, 1/2 (12 oz.) bag chocolate chips, 1/2 tsp. baking soda, 1/2 c. walnuts (optional)
ReferenceRecipe: In a small pan, melt the butter. While it's hot, add both sugars. Let cool. While the butter mixture is cooling, mix the flour, soda and salt in a bowl. Beat the egg and add egg and vanilla to butter mixture. Stir. Add the butter mixture to the flour mixture. Stir again, then add chocolate chips and nuts. Stir everything well and put into the fridge to cool for 1 hour.
GeneratedRecipe: cream butter and sugar. add egg and vanilla. sift together flour, baking soda, salt and baking soda. add to creamed mixture. stir in chocolate chips and walnuts.

Ingredients: 1 (1 lb.) roll sausage, 3 Tbsp. flour, milk, 1/4 tsp. pepper, 1/4 tsp. sage
ReferenceRecipe: Brown sausage in skillet. Chop sausage into small chunks. After browning sausage, drain fat, reserving 3 tablespoons of fat. Add the flour; brown flour and fat. Add drained sausage. After mixture has been browned, gradually add milk; simmer until thickened. Add pepper and sage while gravy is simmering.
GeneratedRecipe: cook sausage until done; drain and crumble. add sage and pepper. melt flour; blend. stir in milk and bring to a boil; reduce heat and stir to low. cover; simmer 30 minutes more.

Ingredients: 1 1/3 c. graham cracker crumbs, 3 Tbsp. sugar, 1/4 c. soft butter or margarine
ReferenceRecipe: Mix crumbs with sugar. Blend in butter. Press firmly in bottom and sides of 9-inch pie pan.
GeneratedRecipe: put graham cracker crumbs, sugar and margarine in 9-inch spring-form pan ( save 1 cup for top ). press into bottom of pan.

Ingredients: 1 (6 oz.) pkg. Nestle butterscotch morsels (1 c.), 1/3 c. sweetened condensed milk, 1/2 tsp. vanilla, 1/3 c. chopped pecans, slightly beaten egg white, pecan halves
ReferenceRecipe: Melt butterscotch morsels over hot water; remove from stove. Stir in condensed milk and vanilla. Add chopped pecans; mix well. Chill until firm enough to handle. Form into 12-inch roll on waxed paper. Roll tightly in waxed paper to shape evenly. Unroll and mark surface lengthwise with tines of fork; brush with egg white. Press pecan halves into roll to completely cover surface. Wrap in wax paper. Chill. Cut in 1/2-inch slices with sharp knife. Makes 2 dozen slices (approximately).
GeneratedRecipe: microwave butterscotch morsels and sweetened condensed milk on high 1 to 2 minutes or until melted. stir in egg white and vanilla. stir in pecan halves. line a 9-inch square pan with wax paper and spread evenly. chill until firm. peel off paper and cut into squares.

Ingredients: 4 whole chicken breasts, 2 Tbsp. cornstarch, 1/2 tsp. pepper, 1/2 tsp. sugar, 2 Tbsp. soy sauce, 5 Tbsp. cooking oil, 1/2 c. cashews, 1 c. diced ham, 1 c. hot chicken broth
ReferenceRecipe: Cut chicken into 1 1/2-inch squares. Mix cornstarch, pepper, sugar, 1 tablespoon soy sauce and 2 tablespoons oil. Add chicken; stir to coat evenly. Saute nuts until golden in 1 tablespoon oil. Sprinkle with 1 teaspoon salt. Heat remaining oil. Add chicken mixture; stir-fry for 2 minutes. Add ham. Stir in remaining soy sauce and broth, scraping up brown bits from bottom of pan. Cook 1 minute longer. Serve over rice.
GeneratedRecipe: cut up chicken breasts and marinate in soy sauce for 1 hour. mix cornstarch, soy sauce, sugar and hot pepper sauce. set aside. cook chicken in oil and oil until brown. remove chicken and add chicken breasts. cook until done. add cashews to broth and simmer. serve over rice or noodles. yield: 2 servings.

Ingredients: 3/4 c. flour, 1 Tbsp. sugar, 1 Tbsp. corn meal, 2 tsp. baking powder, 1 tsp. salt, 3/4 c. milk, 2 1/2 c. chopped onion
ReferenceRecipe: Mix dry ingredients. Add milk and mix. Add onion and stir to coat. Drop by teaspoon in hot oil or fat. Fry until golden brown.
GeneratedRecipe: mix all ingredients together. drop by spoonfuls into hot oil. fry until golden brown. drain on paper towel.

Ingredients: 1 head lettuce, tear into pieces, 1/2 head cauliflower, separate florets, 2 carrots, grated, 2 stalks celery, sliced, 1 c. frozen peas, thaw with cold water, drain, 1 to 1 1/2 c. grated Colby cheese, 1/2 lb. fried bacon, crumbled, 4 to 6 hard-boiled eggs, sliced
ReferenceRecipe: Layer first five ingredients. Add Colby cheese, bacon and hard-boiled eggs. Make dressing.
GeneratedRecipe: layer all ingredients in order given in a large bowl. cover and refrigerate overnight. toss before serving.

Ingredients: 1 can shrimp, mashed, 1 (8 oz.) cream cheese, 1 tsp. Worcestershire sauce, 2 Tbsp. catsup, 2 Tbsp. mayo, 1/8 tsp. onion powder
ReferenceRecipe: Combine and chill. Serve with chips or crackers.
GeneratedRecipe: mix all ingredients together and chill. serve with crackers or chips. makes 1 1/2 cups. can be made ahead of time.

Ingredients: 1 1/2 c. all-purpose flour, 1 c. quick cooking rolled oats, 1 Tbsp. baking powder, 1/4 tsp. salt (optional), 2 eggs, slightly beaten, 1 1/2 c. milk, 6 Tbsp. butter, melted, 2 Tbsp. brown sugar, 1/2 c. chopped pecans (optional), 1/2 tsp. cinnamon
ReferenceRecipe: In large bowl, stir together flour, oats, baking powder, cinnamon and salt; set aside. In small bowl, stir together eggs, milk, butter and brown sugar. Add to flour mixture; stir until blended. Pour batter onto grids of preheated lightly greased waffle iron (amount will vary according to size of waffle iron). Sprinkle a few chopped pecans on top of batter; close lid quickly; do not open during baking. Remove cooked waffles and serve with maple syrup; fresh fruit and yogurt, etc. Yields 12 waffles (4-inch squares).
GeneratedRecipe: in a large bowl, combine flour, oats, baking powder, salt and cinnamon. in a small bowl, beat eggs, milk and butter until smooth. add to dry ingredients, stirring just until moistened. stir in pecans.

Ingredients: 1 (8 oz.) cream cheese, 1 c. sugar, 1 pkg. frozen strawberries, 1 large can crushed pineapple, drained, 1 (12 oz.) Cool Whip, 1 c. nuts, chopped
ReferenceRecipe: Cream sugar and cheese. Mix in all other ingredients. Freeze, thaw for 30 minutes before serving.
GeneratedRecipe: cream together cream cheese and sugar. add pineapple, strawberries and nuts. fold in cool whip. pour into 9 x 13-inch pan. freeze. cut into squares and serve.

Ingredients: 12 c. zucchini, 4 c. onion, 5 Tbsp. salt, 2 1/2 c. vinegar, 6 c. sugar, 1 Tbsp. dry mustard, 1/2 tsp. nutmeg, 3/4 Tbsp. cornstarch, 3/4 tsp. turmeric, 1 1/2 tsp. celery salt, 1/2 tsp. black pepper
ReferenceRecipe: Grind zucchini and onion. Mix with salt and let stand overnight. Rinse with cold water and drain. Mix rest of ingredients and cook until they start to thicken (does not get very thick, only less runny). Add vegetables, mix well and cook slowly 1/2 hour. Pour in jars and seal.
GeneratedRecipe: wash zucchini and cut in thin slices. put in large mixing bowl. sprinkle with salt. let sit 3 hours. drain well. add remaining ingredients and soak overnight. drain. add vinegar, cornstarch, salt, sugar, turmeric, turmeric, mustard and celery salt. mix thoroughly. add all ingredients. cook in medium kettle until thick and transparent. pour into hot sterilized bottles and seal. makes 7 pints.

Ingredients: 1 lb. ground beef, 1 lb. veal, 3/4 c. milk, 2 tsp. salt, dash of allspice, 2 eggs, beaten, 1 pt. sour cream, 1/2 lb. pork, 1 c. bread crumbs, 1 onion, 1/8 tsp. nutmeg, 1/4 tsp. black pepper, 4 Tbsp. flour
ReferenceRecipe: Mix meats together, then bread crumbs and milk. Stir to blend until a paste-like consistency. Add to ground meat in large bowl. Add seasonings and blend mixture well. Roll between hands into 1-inch balls. Set on waxed paper to dry.
GeneratedRecipe: blend beef with bread crumbs, onion, pepper, sour cream, eggs, milk, salt, nutmeg and allspice. form into 4 meatballs. fry with a little oil. cover and cook slowly about 1 hour.

Ingredients: 1 lb. hamburger, 1 lb. hot sausage, 4 stalks celery, 2 tsp. garlic, 2 bunches green onion, 1 tsp. file gumbo, 4 beef bouillon cubes, 4 chicken bouillon cubes, 4 c. water, 2 rice, 1 tsp. Tony's
ReferenceRecipe: Brown hamburger, sausage, celery and garlic; drain grease. Add water and bouillon cubes. Bring to a boil; add rice, onion, file gumbo and Tony's. Turn heat down and simmer with a lid for 25 minutes.
GeneratedRecipe: brown hamburger, sausage, sausage, garlic and onion. add water, rice, gumbo cubes and bouillon. let simmer for 15 minutes. add file and rice, file and tony 's seasoning. cook on low heat for 15 to 20 minutes.

Ingredients: 10 oz. pkg. frozen spinach, 1 1/2 c. sour cream, 1 c. mayonnaise, 1 pkg. dry vegetable soup mix, 1 (8 oz.) can water chestnuts, chopped and drained, 3 chopped green onions
ReferenceRecipe: Thaw and squeeze the spinach until dry. Stir in remaining ingredients, blending well. Cover. Refrigerate for 2 hours. Stir before serving.
GeneratedRecipe: thaw spinach and squeeze dry. mix all ingredients together and refrigerate overnight. serve with crackers or chips.

Ingredients: 2 to 3 cans clams (reserve 1/2 c. juice), 4 slices bacon, 1/2 c. onion, chopped, 1 c. peeled, diced raw potatoes, 2 c. water, 1/2 c. clam juice, 1/4 c. flour, 1 (13 oz.) can evaporated milk, 3 Tbsp. butter, 1 tsp. salt, 1 tsp. pepper
ReferenceRecipe: Rinse clams in strainer (reserving 1/2 cup juice). Saute bacon until crisp; add onion until tender and drain.
GeneratedRecipe: cook bacon until crisp. remove from pan and crumble. saute onion in bacon drippings until tender. stir in flour, salt and pepper. add clam juice, clam juice and water. bring to a boil, stirring constantly. reduce heat and simmer until potatoes are tender. add clams, milk and butter. heat to serving temperature. do not boil.

Ingredients: 1/2 c. mayonnaise, 1/4 c. Parmesan cheese, grated (1 oz.), 2 Tbsp. milk, 1 tsp. Italian seasoning, 1 lb. fish steaks or fillets (such as halibut or cod)
ReferenceRecipe: Mix mayonnaise, cheese, milk and Italian seasoning. Place fish on greased grill over medium hot coals or rack of broiler pan; brush with remaining mayonnaise mixture. Continue grilling or broiling 5 to 8 minutes or until fish flakes easily with fork. Makes 4 servings.
GeneratedRecipe: in a small bowl, combine mayonnaise, cheese and italian seasoning. dip fish fillets in milk mixture, then in mayonnaise mixture, coating both sides. place fish in shallow baking dish. cover with plastic wrap. microwave on high for 4 to 6 minutes or until fish flakes easily when tested with fork. let stand 5 minutes before serving.

Ingredients: 16 oz. 1% low-fat cottage cheese, 1/4 c. polyunsaturated margarine, 1 1/2 tsp. paprika, 1 tsp. dry mustard, 1 tsp. caraway seed, 2 Tbsp. thinly sliced scallions (white and green parts), 1 Tbsp. capers
ReferenceRecipe: Puree cottage cheese in blender; add margarine. Blend well. Add other ingredients. Blend well. Serve at room temperature. Yields 2 3/4 cups; 35 calories per serving.
GeneratedRecipe: in a small bowl, combine cottage cheese, margarine, caraway seed, mustard and caraway seed. beat until smooth. stir in scallions and capers. cover and chill.

Ingredients: 1/2 green pepper, diced, 1/2 tsp. salt, 1 Tbsp. mustard, dash of pepper, 1 egg, beaten, 2/3 c. salad dressing, 1 lb. crab meat, Old Bay to taste, bread crumbs
ReferenceRecipe: Mix together green pepper, salt, mustard, pepper, egg and salad dressing. Fold in crab meat. Put in a baking dish sprayed with Pam. Pour a thin coat of Old Bay seasoned bread crumbs on top of this. Sprinkle with paprika. Bake for 20 - 30 minutes at 350 degrees.
GeneratedRecipe: mix all ingredients except bread crumbs. shape into patties. fry in hot oil until golden brown. serve with tartar sauce.

Ingredients: 2 heads fresh broccoli, 1 c. raisins, 1 c. chopped pecans, 1 small red onion, chopped, 1 can sliced water chestnuts, 1/4 c. grated carrots, 1 lb. bacon, fried crisp, 1 c. mayonnaise, 1/2 c. sugar, 2 Tbsp. vinegar
ReferenceRecipe: Chop broccoli into small pieces and mix with raisins, pecans, onions, water chestnuts and carrots. Mix the mayonnaise, sugar and vinegar to make a dressing. Pour over the broccoli mixture and toss well. Top with crumbled bacon. Refrigerate and marinate several hours before serving.
GeneratedRecipe: put broccoli, water chestnuts, raisins, pecans, carrots and raisins in bowl. mix mayonnaise, sugar and vinegar to the dressing. pour over vegetables. toss.

Ingredients: 6 medium potatoes, peeled and cut into 1/4-inch slices, 1 medium onion, chopped, 6 slices bacon, cooked and crumbled, 1/2 c. vinegar, 1/2 c. water, 1/2 c. sugar, 2 Tbsp. cornstarch, 1/4 tsp. salt, 1/4 tsp. pepper, 3 hard-cooked eggs, chopped
ReferenceRecipe: Cook potatoes until tender. Drain well. Combine remaining ingredients except eggs in a saucepan. Cook 20 minutes, stirring frequently. Pour vinegar mixture over potatoes. Add eggs and toss. Serve immediately. Yields 6 servings.
GeneratedRecipe: cook potatoes in boiling salted water until tender. drain and cool. combine sugar, cornstarch, salt and pepper in a saucepan. stir in vinegar and water. cook and stir over medium heat until thickened and bubbly. remove from heat; stir in bacon and eggs.

Ingredients: 4 c. cooked rice, 4 Tbsp. oil, 1 1/2 c. cut up pork, chicken, etc., 1 stalk chopped celery, 2 tsp. soy sauce, 1/4 c. green onions, sliced, 1 tsp. salt, 1/4 tsp. pepper, 1 egg
ReferenceRecipe: Cook rice the day before and refrigerate. Heat oil in deep frying pan. Saute meat and celery. Add rice, stirring and press out any lumps. Add salt and pepper. Cook 1 minute, stirring constantly. Make a hollow in rice mixture and pour in beaten egg. Stir the pan until the egg begins to set. Add onions and soy sauce.
GeneratedRecipe: in frying pan, saute pork, celery and green pepper. remove meat from pan. saute chicken and celery in oil in large skillet for 5 minutes. add rice, soy sauce, celery, salt and pepper. cook over low heat until chicken is lightly browned. add chicken and cook 2 minutes. stir in egg; return meat with soy sauce. cover and simmer about 15 minutes. serve over rice. serves 6.

Ingredients: 1 lb. orange roughy fillets, 1/2 c. milk, 4 oz. salted peanuts, finely chopped, 1/4 c. flour, 2 Tbsp. butter
ReferenceRecipe: Cut fillets into serving size pieces. Combine peanuts and flour. Dip fish into milk, then into flour mixture, coating well. Heat butter in pan. Place fish in pan and cook for 6 to 8 minutes, turning once. (If using frozen fillets, allow an extra 3 minutes.) Drain. Serve immediately with salad or vegetable.
GeneratedRecipe: place fish in shallow baking dish. cover with plastic wrap; microwave on high for 5 minutes. let stand 1 minute. melt butter on high; blend in flour. stir in milk and cook at high, uncovered, on high for 1 1/2 minutes. stir. add 1/2 teaspoon peanuts. cook 2 to 3 minutes longer. sprinkle roughy with peanuts.

Ingredients: 4 slices bacon, chopped, 1 1/2 lb. thin-sliced round steak, slivered, 1 onion, chopped, 1 (16 oz.) can tomatoes, cut up, 1 beef bouillon cube, 1 (4 oz.) can mushroom pieces, drained, 2 Tbsp. catsup, 1/2 lb. spaghetti, cooked, Parmesan cheese
ReferenceRecipe: Brown bacon and round steak in skillet, stirring to brown all sides. Add next 5 ingredients, mixing well. Simmer for 45 minutes or until meat is tender. Stir in spaghetti and heat through. Serve sprinkled with Parmesan cheese.
GeneratedRecipe: cut steak into 1-inch pieces. brown in bacon fat. add onion and cook until tender. add tomatoes, bouillon cube, catsup, catsup and bouillon cube. cover and simmer for 1 hour. serve over spaghetti. sprinkle with parmesan cheese.

Ingredients: 1 lb. hamburger, 2 small cans (8 oz.) tomato sauce, 1 small onion, chopped, 1 pt. sour cream, 3 or 4 oz. cream cheese, Green onions, chopped (number to taste), 1/2 bag egg noodles, Cheddar cheese, grated
ReferenceRecipe: Brown meat and onion, add tomato sauce and simmer for 30 minutes. Cook noodles and drain. Combine sour cream, green onions and cream cheese. Layer in ungreased casserole dish: noodles, meat, cream mixture ending with noodles on top. Sprinkle grated cheese over top. Bake in 350 degree oven for 30 minutes.
GeneratedRecipe: saute meat, onion and onion in skillet. drain off grease. stir in tomato sauce and tomato sauce. simmer 15 minutes. add noodles and simmer for 10 minutes. drain well. add cheese and sour cream. simmer, but do not boil. layer noodles, noodles, cheeses, sour cream, green onions and hamburger mixture. continue until cheese is melted.

Ingredients: 3 Tbsp. butter, 1 large onion, salt and pepper to taste, 1 1/2 lb. ground meat (beef or lamb), 1 clove garlic, 1 c. tomato puree, 1/2 c. cold water, 1/4 tsp. nutmeg, 1/2 c. grated cheese, 1/2 c. salad oil, 1 c. flour, 2 medium eggplant, cut into 1/2 inch lengthwise
ReferenceRecipe: Cook onion in butter with salt and pepper for 5 minutes. Add meat and garlic; cook 10 minutes. Add puree, water and nutmeg; cook 10 minutes. Coat eggplant with flour seasoned with salt and pepper. Fry in hot oil. Place 1/2 of eggplant in baking dish and cover with 1/2 meat mixture. Repeat layers and top with cheese. Bake at 350 degrees until hot.
GeneratedRecipe: cut eggplant in 1/2-inch thick slices; set aside. combine beef and garlic in a large skillet with oil, oil and onion. brown slowly, stirring to coat meat with butter. stir in flour and tomato puree. add water; stir until mixture boils, about 5 minutes. add tomato puree well. pour puree into a 2-quart casserole. cover with plastic wrap. cook, uncovered, on high for 15 minutes, until eggplant is tender. top with cheese. cook, covered, 5 minutes. makes 5 ( 6 ounce ) servings.

Ingredients: 4 ears corn, 4 chicken quarters, 4 potatoes, quartered, 4 onions, quartered, 2 stalks celery, cut, 1 lb. smoked sausage, cut in chunks, 1 doz. steaming clams
ReferenceRecipe: Cover bottom of large pot with 1-inch of water. Put in rack. Layer corn, chicken, potatoes, onions and celery. Put sausage on top. Cover with aluminum foil with holes punched in it. Add clams. Bring to full steaming boil. Reduce heat to medium. Cook 45 minutes. Serves 4.
GeneratedRecipe: boil chicken until tender. remove chicken from bones and cut into bite size pieces. saute onions, celery and celery in butter. add corn, corn and clams. cook until vegetables are tender. add clams and steaming hot water to cover. simmer until potatoes are done.

Ingredients: 1/2 c. milk, 2 Tbsp. Crisco, 1/2 c. ice water, 1/2 c. warm water, flour, 1 tsp. salt, 2 Tbsp. sugar, 1 yeast cake
ReferenceRecipe: Scald 1/2 cup milk and 2 tablespoons Crisco. Take off stove and add ice water. Add yeast cake to warm water. Mix with flour, salt and sugar, sifted together. Make soft dough; roll out and let rise for 1 hour.
GeneratedRecipe: scald milk; add crisco, sugar and salt. cool to lukewarm. add lukewarm milk. dissolve yeast in warm water. add ice water. add yeast mixture, ice water, flour and ice water. beat. place dough in refrigerator until ready to use.

Ingredients: 4 chicken breast halves, cubed, 1 Tbsp. olive oil, 2 zucchini, sliced, 1 (14 1/2 oz.) can Mexican style stewed tomatoes, 1 (8 oz.) can tomato sauce, 1 (4 oz.) can diced green chiles, 1/2 tsp. cumin, 1 tsp. garlic powder
ReferenceRecipe: Brown chicken in oil in a large skillet for 8 to 10 minutes. Wipe up excess oil with paper towel. Combine cumin and garlic with tomato sauce and pour over chicken, then add remaining ingredients. Cook and simmer, covered, 8 to 10 minutes. Uncover and cook on high 8 to 10 minutes. Serve over cooked rice.
GeneratedRecipe: in skillet, brown chicken in olive oil, turning often. add zucchini, tomato sauce, chiles and green chiles. cover; simmer about 30 minutes or until tender.

Ingredients: 2 boxes apricot Jell-O, 2 cans crushed pineapple, 1 can mandarin oranges, 1 (8 oz.) Philadelphia cream cheese
ReferenceRecipe: Dissolve Jell-O in 2 cups boiling water; drain juice from fruit and add enough water for 2 cups. Add cheese while it's hot. Heat until dissolved, then add fruit. Refrigerate.
GeneratedRecipe: heat juice of jell-o, then cool. add cream cheese and pineapple. let set until slightly jelled. add mandarin oranges. chill.

Ingredients: 1 clove garlic, 2 (3 oz.) pkg. cream cheese, 1 tsp. Worcestershire sauce, 1 tsp. lemon juice, 1/2 tsp. salt, 1 1/2 c. clams, minced, 1 Tbsp. clam broth, potato chips
ReferenceRecipe: Rub inside of small bowl with cut clove of garlic. Blend cream cheese with seasonings. Add clams which have been drained and chopped. Add clam juice. Put in a bowl and chill.
GeneratedRecipe: melt cream cheese. blend in clam juice, salt, worcestershire sauce and worcestershire sauce; add clams and clam juice. serve warm as a dip for chips.

Ingredients: 3 or 4 lb. roast, 2 onions, chopped and divided, 1 c. water, 16 oz. barbecue sauce
ReferenceRecipe: Cut roast into 1 or 2-inch cubes and put into crock-pot with 1 chopped onion and water. Cook on low overnight (10 to 12 hours). After cooking, drain off liquid. Remove all fat and bones. Break up the lean meat with fingers and return to pot with 1 chopped onion and barbecue sauce. Cook on low for another 5 to 6 hours.
GeneratedRecipe: place roast in crock-pot. add onions, barbecue sauce and water. cover and cook on low for 6 to 8 hours.

Ingredients: 1 lb. bulk sausage, 1 (No. 2) can cream-style corn, 2 eggs, 1/4 tsp. salt, 2 Tbsp. chopped green pepper, 1 c. breadcrumbs, 2 Tbsp. butter or margarine
ReferenceRecipe: Brown sausage until crumbly, stirring occasionally to break it up. While it is frying, combine corn and eggs (slightly beaten). Season with salt and green pepper.
GeneratedRecipe: brown meat and green pepper in skillet; drain. combine eggs, salt, pepper, corn and breadcrumbs. mix well. shape into 4 patties. brown in butter.

Ingredients: 1/2 c. sugar, 1/2 c. Karo, 2/3 c. peanut butter, 3 c. cornflakes
ReferenceRecipe: Cook sugar and Karo to good boil. Immediately remove from heat and stir in peanut butter. Pour over cornflakes and drop on wax paper. Do not overcook. It takes approximately 2 minutes.
GeneratedRecipe: bring sugar and karo to a boil. remove from heat and add peanut butter and cornflakes. drop by teaspoon on wax paper.

Ingredients: pastry for 9-inch pie (double), 1 lb. ground beef, 1 medium onion, 2 c. coarsely grated potatoes, 1/4 tsp. salt, 1/4 tsp. pepper, 3 Tbsp. cornstarch, 1/4 c. water, 1 1/2 c. beef broth
ReferenceRecipe: Roll pastry to fit 9-inch pie pan. Brown beef and onion in a large skillet; cook until meat is brown. Drain off drippings. Add potatoes, broth, salt and pepper. Cover and simmer 15 minutes or until potatoes are tender.
GeneratedRecipe: in a large skillet over medium heat, brown meat and onion; drain. stir in salt and pepper. add potatoes, water and cornstarch. cook and stir until mixture thickens, stirring constantly. add broth and potatoes. cook until tender, stirring constantly. remove from heat; stir in cornstarch mixture. pour into prepared pastry shell. top with meringue.

Ingredients: 1/4 lb. (1 stick) sweet butter, 1 lb. box confectioners sugar, pinch of salt, 1/2 c. bourbon (I use Canadian Club whiskey), 1/2 c. pecans, finely chopped, sweetened cocoa or melted chocolate (for dipping)
ReferenceRecipe: In the mixing bowl of an electric mixer, beat the butter to soften, then gradually and thoroughly beat in the sugar and salt. Very slowly, so the mixture doesn't curdle, beat in the bourbon in a steady stream. Beat in the minced pecans and mix well. Cover and refrigerate 1 to 2 hours until firm.
GeneratedRecipe: mix sugar, butter, cocoa and salt. add bourbon and bourbon. mix well. shape into 1-inch balls. place on waxed paper. chill for 1 hour. melt chocolate in double boiler. dip balls in chocolate and place on wax paper.

Ingredients: 12 medium carrots, peeled, 3 Tbsp. butter, 2 Tbsp. pure maple syrup, 1 to 2 tsp. fresh basil, 1/4 tsp. salt
ReferenceRecipe: Cut carrots into 1/8-inch slices or run through slicer of food processor. Place them in vegetable steamer, covered, over boiling water for 10 minutes until tender, but not mushy. Remove from heat and set aside. Carrots may be steamed well in advance and combined with other ingredients immediately before serving. In a large, heavy saucepan, melt butter. Add maple syrup, carrots, basil and salt. Stir well to coat carrots thoroughly with butter sauce. Serves 4 to 6.
GeneratedRecipe: peel and cut carrots into 1/2-inch thick slices and cut in half. place in a large skillet and cook over medium heat until tender, about 15 minutes. turn off heat. add butter and syrup, salt and basil. cook until carrots are glazed, about 5 to 8 minutes. makes 4 servings.

Ingredients: 8-12 slices of bread (no crust), 1 1/2 lb. ham (chopped), 1 medium onion (chopped), 4 eggs, 1 can cream of mushroom soup (undiluted), 1 1/2 c. milk
ReferenceRecipe: In a 12 x 12 glass baking dish grease bottom then layer slices of bread on bottom- cut off all crust. Put ham, cheddar cheese and chopped onion on top of bread. In another bowl beat 4 eggs, add cream of mushroom soup, milk and mix together. Pour over top - set in. Refrigerate overnight. In the morning bake at 300 degrees for 1 hour.
GeneratedRecipe: tear bread into bite size pieces and place in bottom of greased 9 x 13-inch pan. combine eggs, onion, milk and soup. pour over bread mixture.

Ingredients: 26 oz. Tang, 5 oz. unsweetened tea (instant), 1 pkg. lemonade unsweetened Kool-Aid, 1 tsp. cloves, 1 Tbsp. cinnamon, 1 1/2 c. sugar
ReferenceRecipe: Mix all ingredients together. Store in container. Put 2 teaspoons to a cup of boiling water. Stir with spoon, then drink.
GeneratedRecipe: combine all ingredients. store in airtight container to make. use 2 heaping teaspoonfuls per cup of boiling water.

Ingredients: 1 raw egg, 2/3 c. olive oil, 2 to 3 Tbsp. vinegar, 2 cloves garlic, chopped, 1/2 tsp. sugar, 1 green onion, chopped, 1/2 tsp. mustard, 1/2 tsp. celery salt, 3 to 4 inches anchovy paste, 3 Tbsp. parsley, chopped, 1/2 c. Parmesan cheese
ReferenceRecipe: Mix egg, oil, vinegar, salt, pepper, sugar, parsley, garlic, onion, mustard and celery salt in blender, then add anchovy paste and parsley flakes. Then add Parmesan cheese. If mixture is too thin, add another egg and more cheese to make thick and creamy. Put dressing in refrigerator to chill until ready to serve.
GeneratedRecipe: combine first 5 ingredients in a blender and process until thoroughly blended. add oil, garlic, anchovy paste, salt and celery. beat until well blended. pour over salad. add olive oil and blend at high speed until smooth. makes 1 1/4 cups.

Ingredients: 2 sticks butter, 3 (10 oz.) pkg. white chocolate chips, 2 tsp. vanilla, 1 (8 oz.) jar marshmallow cream, 4 1/2 c. sugar, 1 can evaporated milk
ReferenceRecipe: In large bowl, mix marshmallow cream, butter and chips; set aside. In saucepan, cook sugar and milk on medium heat, stirring constantly. Bring to boil and continue boiling and stirring for 9 minutes. Pour over ingredients in bowl; add vanilla. Stir very well until creamy. Pour into greased 10 x 15-inch pans. Makes 2 large Pyrex pans.
GeneratedRecipe: combine sugar, butter and milk in saucepan. bring to a boil, stirring constantly. boil 5 minutes. remove from heat. add chocolate chips, marshmallow cream and vanilla. beat until well blended. pour into greased 9 x 13-inch pan. cool and cut into squares.

Ingredients: 8 oz. fresh mushrooms, 1 c. butter, 1 Tbsp. garlic powder, 1 large onion, 1 large green pepper
ReferenceRecipe: Slice and clean mushrooms. Put butter in a pan and bring to a slow simmer. Add mushrooms, sliced onion and green pepper. Cover and stir occasionally. Let cook about 15 or 20 minutes.
GeneratedRecipe: cut mushrooms in half and remove stems. chop onion and green pepper. saute in butter until tender. add garlic powder and garlic powder to taste.

Ingredients: 1/2 c. salt, 1 c. vinegar, 4 c. water, 1/2 grape leaf in qt. jar
ReferenceRecipe: Wash pickles. Place in 1 quart jar; cover with boiling vinegar mixture and seal. Good after 9 days.
GeneratedRecipe: bring vinegar, water and salt to boil. cut grape leaf into 1/4-inch slices. drop in hot mixture. cover with boiling syrup and let stand until cold. drain off liquid, leaving 1 1/2-inch headspace. add 2 quarts vinegar mixture to taste.

Ingredients: 2 (6 1/2 oz.) cans tuna, drained, 1 c. finely chopped celery, 1/4 c. finely chopped onion, 1/2 c. chopped apple, 1/4 c. chopped sweet pickle, 2 hard-boiled eggs, chopped, 1/2 c. or more mayonnaise, 1/2 tsp. lemon pepper seasoning
ReferenceRecipe: Mix all ingredients together and serve on lettuce.
GeneratedRecipe: mix all ingredients except apple and mix well. cover and chill 2 hours. stir before serving.

Ingredients: 2 (8 oz.) pkg. cream cheese, 2 c. shredded Cheddar cheese, 1 to 2 Tbsp. chopped green pepper, 1 Tbsp. finely chopped pimento, 1 Tbsp. finely chopped onions, 1 Tbsp. Worcestershire sauce, 1 Tbsp. lemon juice
ReferenceRecipe: Soften cream cheese with Worcestershire sauce and lemon juice. Add remaining ingredients; mix well. Chill! Shape into ball or log. Roll in chopped or ground pecans.
GeneratedRecipe: in a large bowl with a mixer, beat cream cheese until blended. add lemon juice, pimento, onions, lemon juice and worcestershire sauce. mix well. shape into ball and cover with plastic wrap. chill 2 hours or overnight. serve with assorted crackers.

Ingredients: 1/4 c. brown sugar, 1 egg yolk, 1/2 c. butter, 1 c. flour
ReferenceRecipe: Roll in balls and dip each in white of egg; roll in nuts. Bake 5 minutes. Take thimble and put hole in each. Bake 10 minutes longer. Fill with frosting or jam. Makes 14.
GeneratedRecipe: blend together butter and brown sugar. add egg yolk and flour. chill dough for 1 hour. roll out on floured board. pat into a 9 x 13-inch pan.

Ingredients: 4 medium apples (4 c.), 1 1/2 c. water, 1/4 tsp. cinnamon, 1/4 tsp. nutmeg, 1 Tbsp. butter, 1 (3 oz.) pkg. peach jello, 1 (3 oz.) pkg. instant vanilla pudding, 1 baked pie shell
ReferenceRecipe: Combine apples, water, spices and butter. Bring to a boil and reduce heat. Simmer 5 minutes. Stir in jello, then pudding. Mix well. Bring to a boil over high heat. Remove and let stand 5 minutes. Pour into pie shell. Chill 3 to 4 hours.
GeneratedRecipe: slice apples and place in baked pie shell. mix together pudding, water, cinnamon, nutmeg and nutmeg in saucepan. add to peach jello. cook until mixture is clear. stir occasionally. pour mixture over apples. chill until firm, then serve with whipped cream.

Ingredients: 1 pkg. active dry yeast, 5 3/4 to 6 1/2 c. flour, 2 1/4 c. milk, 2 Tbsp. sugar, 1 Tbsp. shortening, 2 tsp. salt
ReferenceRecipe: In large mixer bowl, combine yeast and 2 1/2 cups flour. Heat milk, sugar, shortening and salt, stirring constantly, to almost melt shortening. Add to dry mixture in bowl. Beat at low speed for 1/2 minute, scraping sides of bowl constantly. Beat 3 minutes at high speed. By hand, stir in enough of the remaining flour to make a moderately stiff dough. Turn out onto lightly floured surface. Knead until smooth and satiny (8 to 10 minutes). Shape into ball. Place in lightly greased bowl, turning once to grease surface. Cover and let rise in warm place until double, about 75 minutes.
GeneratedRecipe: combine yeast, shortening, sugar and salt in a large bowl. add milk and mix well. add flour and mix well. add enough flour to make a soft dough. turn out on a floured surface; knead in a smooth dough. place in a greased bowl; let rise until double in bulk, about 1 hour. punch down dough; roll out and let rise until double in size, about 1 hour. cut into squares; let rise until double in bulk.

Ingredients: 1/4 c. brown sugar, 1/4 c. chopped nuts, 1 tsp. cinnamon, 1 c. mashed bananas, 1/2 c. oil, 1/3 c. milk, 1 egg, 1 tsp. vanilla, 2 c. flour, 1/2 c. sugar, 3 tsp. baking powder, 1 tsp. salt, 1/3 c. chopped nuts (optional)
ReferenceRecipe: For streusel, mix brown sugar, 1/4 c. chopped nuts and cinnamon; set aside. In separate bowl, mix flour, sugar, baking powder, salt and 1/3 c. chopped nuts; set aside. In third bowl, beat bananas, oil, milk, egg and vanilla. Add flour mixture all at once, stirring with spoon, until flour is just moistened. Batter will be lumpy. Divide batter evenly among muffin cups. Sprinkle with streusel mix. Bake at 400 degrees approximately 15 minutes, or until toothpick comes out clean. Remove immediately and cool.
GeneratedRecipe: mix together flour, baking powder, salt and brown sugar. add egg, milk, oil and vanilla. mix well. add bananas and nuts. pour into greased and floured 9 x 13-inch pan.

Ingredients: 2 doz. eggs, hard-cooked, 2/3 c. mayonnaise, 1/4 c. minced pimiento-stuffed green olives, 1 tsp. oregano, 1/2 tsp. salt, 1/4 tsp. black pepper, 1/4 tsp. garlic powder, lettuce leaves

Ingredients: 1 stick butter, 2 lobster tails (6 oz. and up), defrosted, oil for greasing grill
ReferenceRecipe: Cut bottom of lobster to the shell, but not all the way through. Cut all membrane from under lobster and discard. Break shell so lobster can butterfly, but not completely in half. Brush lobster with butter and place on grill, meat side down, for 2 to 3 minutes. Turn lobster over; brush again with butter and season with garlic salt or preferred seasonings. Cook 7 to 10 minutes, shell side down, or until done, depending on size and heat of grill. Lobster is cooked when meat turns opaque.
GeneratedRecipe: wash lobster well. cut tails into quarters. melt butter with oil; add lobster tails. heat for about 10 minutes. add lobster and saute 3. sprinkle with salt and pepper. serve.

Ingredients: 3 eggs, 1 tsp. granulated sugar, 1/2 tsp. salt, 3/4 c. milk, 8 to 10 slices stale bread, icing sugar for sprinkling
ReferenceRecipe: In a mixing bowl, put eggs, sugar, salt and milk. Mix together thoroughly. Dip bread slices in batter. Fry on lightly greased medium hot pan. Brown on both sides. Serve sprinkled with icing sugar and fresh strawberries for a special treat.
GeneratedRecipe: soak bread in milk for 15 minutes. beat eggs, sugar and salt together. dip bread in egg mixture. fry in hot shortening until golden brown and brown.

Ingredients: 2 bunches carrots, cut diagonally into 1-inch pieces and cooked, 1/2 c. salad oil, 1/2 c. cider vinegar, 1/2 c. plus 2 Tbsp. sugar, 1 can tomato soup (undiluted), 1 large onion, chopped, 1 green pepper, chopped
ReferenceRecipe: Mix sauce; pour it over carrots while hot. Serve cold.
GeneratedRecipe: blend tomato soup, oil and sugar until smooth. add carrots, green pepper and onions. mix well. chill. serves 16.

Ingredients: 1 c. boiling water, 1/4 c. Crisco, 1/2 c. sugar, 1 tsp. salt, 1 c. evaporated milk, 1 pkg. yeast in 1/2 c. lukewarm water, 2 eggs, beaten, 7 1/2 c. all-purpose flour (approximately)
ReferenceRecipe: Pour hot water over Crisco and sugar. Stir and cool to lukewarm. Dissolve yeast in 1/2 cup lukewarm water and stir in cooled mixture. Add beaten eggs and milk. Stir in 4 cups of flour and beat. Add enough flour to make a stiff dough. Place in large bowl that has been oiled. Brush with melted Crisco. Cover with damp cloth and chill. When ready to use, knead lightly with flour and then roll to 1/4-inch and cut in diamond shapes. Fry in hot oil about 3-inches deep. Drain on towel. Then shake in bag with powdered sugar. This also makes good rolls and keeps well in refrigerator for several days.
GeneratedRecipe: soften yeast in lukewarm water. combine the crisco, sugar, milk and salt. cool to lukewarm. mix the boiling water and set aside to cool. mix evaporated milk and yeast with a warm water. add to sugar mixture, milk mixture, beaten eggs and eggs. mix together the yeast mixture and add to mixture. stir in flour. cover; let rise about 1 hour. divide into 4 portions.

Ingredients: 2 lb. Eckrich smoked sausage, cut in small pieces, 1/2 c. vinegar, 1/2 c. warm water, 4 heaping Tbsp. brown sugar, 1 Tbsp. Worcestershire sauce, 1 tsp. mustard
ReferenceRecipe: Place sausage pieces in crock-pot. Mix all other ingredients and pour over sausage. Start crock-pot on high, turn back to low for 4 to 6 hours.
GeneratedRecipe: combine sugar, vinegar and water. boil until clear. add smoked sausage and sausage pieces, cover. simmer for 20 minutes. serve over toothpicks, buns.

Ingredients: 6 medium potatoes, cooked and diced, 6 hard-boiled eggs, peeled and diced, 2 medium onions, grated, 1/2 c. diced sweet pickles, 1 c. Hellmann's mayonnaise, 1/4 c. olives, 1/4 c. sweet peppers, 2 tsp. sugar, salt and pepper to taste, 1 Tbsp. prepared mustard, 1 Tbsp. vinegar
ReferenceRecipe: Combine first five ingredients. Mix remaining ingredients. Stir well, until smooth. Pour over first set of ingredients and stir lightly until mixed well. Garnish with hard-cooked eggs.
GeneratedRecipe: combine potatoes, sweet pickles and peppers in bowl. combine next four ingredients. add vinegar and mustard. blend to a light taste. stir in the mayonnaise, sugar and salt and pepper, mixing well. pour over potato salad. chill. makes 6 to 8 servings.

Ingredients: 1 1/2 to 2 lb. stew beef, 1 pkg. onion soup mix, 1/2 stalk celery, 4 carrots, cut up, 5 to 6 medium size potatoes, cut and cubed, 1/2 c. flour, salt and pepper to taste
ReferenceRecipe: In a crock-pot, put stew beef, potatoes, carrots and celery. Stir. Also add remaining ingredients. Stir occasionally until all beef is cooked through and potatoes and carrots are easy to cut. Start crock-pot early in morning to give stew beef plenty of time to cook.
GeneratedRecipe: sprinkle beef with salt and pepper. roll in flour and brown in hot oil in dutch oven. cover with water. pour into crock-pot. add all vegetables, onion soup mix, celery soup mix and carrots. cook on high for 3 to 4 hours. serve with rice.

Ingredients: 3 Tbsp. margarine, 3 Tbsp. flour, 1/4 tsp. salt, 1 dash cayenne pepper, 1 1/2 c. milk, 1/4 c. Parmesan cheese
ReferenceRecipe: Melt margarine. Stir in flour, salt and cayenne. Cook for 1 minute. Remove. Stir in milk until mixture is smooth. Cook over low heat, stirring until thick. Add cheese.
GeneratedRecipe: melt margarine in saucepan. blend in flour, salt, pepper and cayenne. add milk and cook and stir over low heat until thick and bubbly. stir in parmesan cheese. serve over cooked rice or noodles.

Ingredients: 10 medium potatoes, cut in small cubes, 1 can evaporated milk, 3 Tbsp. butter, salt, 8 slices cooked bacon, 1/2 c. onion, diced
ReferenceRecipe: In large soup pan saute bacon, onion and celery until tender. Add cubed potatoes; cover with water and boil until potatoes are tender. Drain water until it covers potatoes. Add can of evaporated milk and butter. Mash potatoes and warm soup. Serve hot.
GeneratedRecipe: fry bacon until crisp in pan. remove bacon from pan; drain and crumble. add onion. cook until soft. add evaporated milk and butter. add potatoes and salt. heat thoroughly.

Ingredients: 3 c. flour, 5 Tbsp. ice water, 1 egg, well beaten, 1 tsp. salt, 1 1/4 c. shortening, 1 Tbsp. vinegar
ReferenceRecipe: Combine flour and salt. Work in shortening. Add vinegar and egg. Add ice water.
GeneratedRecipe: mix flour and salt. cut in shortening. add egg, water and vinegar. mix well. roll out on floured board. makes 2 crusts.

Ingredients: 1 c. carrots, shredded fine, 1 c. Granny Smith apples, chopped, 1 c. raisins, 1/2 c. salad dressing, 1/2 c. orange juice
ReferenceRecipe: Mix carrots, apples and raisins. Mix salad dressing and orange juice together and pour over other ingredients. Makes 6 servings.
GeneratedRecipe: combine apples, raisins and raisins. sprinkle with orange juice. toss lightly. add remaining ingredients. chill.

Ingredients: 6 apples, 6 oranges, 4 to 6 bananas, 1 to 2 lb. seedless grapes, 1 box vanilla pudding, 1 (6 oz.) can frozen orange juice
ReferenceRecipe: Peel and cut up apples, oranges and bananas. Add orange juice and pudding; mix well and chill.
GeneratedRecipe: cook vanilla pudding and orange juice to soften. slice apples and apples. cut oranges and oranges in thin pieces. slice bananas into small pieces. mix all in the fruit. add the pudding.

Ingredients: 2 c. cooked chicken or turkey, 1 pkg. frozen string beans, 1/4 can slivered blanched almonds, 1 can cream of mushroom soup, 1/2 c. milk or juice from beans, 2 c. prepared package stuffing, 2 Tbsp. butter, melted, 1/4 c. hot water, 4 oz. Swiss cheese (optional)
ReferenceRecipe: Cook and drain beans. In buttered shallow baking dish, distribute 2/3 cup of package stuffing crumbs. Arrange beans in layer over crumbs, then scatter almonds.
GeneratedRecipe: combine turkey, beans, water, soup, milk and cheese. cook, drain and place in a buttered casserole. combine stuffing, butter and stuffing mix.
